Has Ireland ever won a T20I series? Ireland's record against Full ICC member nations in T20Is listed
description: With ireland on the cusp of a series win over the mighty Indians, here is a look at how the Irish have performed against full ICC member countries so far.
content:
Has Ireland ever won a T20I series? Ireland's record against Full ICC member nations in T20Is listed originally appeared on Cricket News.
                Add Cricket News as a Preferred Source by clicking here.KEY TAKEAWAYS:Ireland has won several bilateral T20I series, with their only full-member wins over Zimbabwe and Afghanistan.They have never won a bilateral T20I series against a top-tier full member nation before.Leading India 1-0, Ireland can now secure their first-ever T20I series win over India.Ireland on the cusp of historyIreland has won a T20I series before. They have claimed bilateral honours against the likes of Kenya, Papua New Guinea, the United Arab Emirates, and Italy, while also tasting success in multi-team qualifiers and tri-nation events over the years.The bigger prizes, however, have largely eluded them. Their only bilateral series wins over fellow full members have come against Zimbabwe and Afghanistan, meaning a series victory over one of cricket's established powers has so far remained agonisingly out of reach.That is what makes the current series so significant. Having stunned India with a 34-run win in the opener, Ireland lead 1-0 with one match to play. Avoid defeat on June 28, and they will seal a maiden T20I series triumph over the world champions.MORE: 'Greatest win': Ireland legend rates win vs India bigger achievement than beating EnglandHas Ireland ever won a T20I series?Ireland's bilateral T20I series wins are listed below. The list underlines how their successes have generally come against associate sides or, at the full-member level, only against Zimbabwe and Afghanistan, the two nations closest to them in the format's pecking order.All the remaining Test-playing nations (Australia, Bangladesh, England, India, New Zealand, Pakistan, South Africa and West Indies)have never lost a T20I series against the Irish. SeriesSeasonOpponentMarginIreland in Kenya2011/12Kenya3-0Papua New Guinea v Ireland2015/16Papua New Guinea2-1Zimbabwe in Ireland2021Zimbabwe3-2Afghanistan in Ireland2022Afghanistan3-2Ireland in Zimbabwe2023/24Zimbabwe2-1Ireland v Italy2025/26Italy2-1Ireland in UAE2025/26UAE2-0MORE: Gill poses for a picture with Ronaldinho at FIFA World Cup 2026Ireland's record against full ICC member nations in T20I series listedThe table below charts Ireland's bilateral T20I series record against each full member nation they have faced. It lays bare just how dominant the traditional heavyweights have been, with Zimbabwe and Afghanistan the only sides Ireland have managed to beat across a series.OpponentSeriesWonLostDrawnIndia3030Pakistan1010England1010South Africa3021New Zealand1010West Indies3012Bangladesh3030Zimbabwe5221Afghanistan5140The numbers make Ireland's position against India all the more remarkable. A side without a single series win over a top-tier full member now stands one good day away from toppling the best team in the format, a result that would rewrite their record books entirely.For all the latest cricket news, opinion, and commentary and to share your voice, head to our Facebook, Instagram, and X (Twitter) pages.

title: Himachal's Bilaspur gets third AI-enabled ultra-portable X-ray machine
Friedkin give go-ahead for Dybala and Celik’s renewals
description: Roma is accelerating contract renewals. The Giallorossi are rushing to extend the contracts of Paulo Dybala, Gianluca Mancini, Zeki Celik, and Lorenzo Pellegrini. The next few hours will be crucial. F...
content: Friedkin give go-ahead for Dybala and Celik’s renewalsRoma is accelerating contract renewals. The Giallorossi are rushing to extend the contracts of Paulo Dybala, Gianluca Mancini, Zeki Celik, and Lorenzo Pellegrini. The next few hours will be crucial. For “La Joya,” the club awaits a definitive response from the capital club to the counter-proposal presented by the Argentine’s entourage. Confidence is high for all players whose contracts are expiring, or like Mancini, who could end their contracts with Roma in 2027 (June 30).As Corriere dello Sport reports, the Friekdins’ approval of the counterproposal presented by the player’s entourage could arrive in the next few hours. The same goes for Celik’s renewal. Mancini is also very close to a new agreement with the Roman club until 2030, and discussions with D’Amico are progressing quickly. There are still some details to iron out with Lorenzo Pellegrini, but the atmosphere remains positive. A little more patience will be needed, but confidence is filtering through from Trigoria: the desire to move forward together has never been lacking and represents a solid foundation on which to build a new understanding. The Giallorossi number 7 has always prioritized his permanence in Rome.

title: Report: Brighton Agree £20m Deal For Leeds Defender
description: Pascal Struijk to Brighton, £20m Deal Shows Seagulls Moving With Familiar PurposeBrighton Move Quickly After Van Hecke ExitCredit to The Athletic for the original information, Brighton & Hove Albion ...
content: Report: Brighton Agree £20m Deal For Leeds DefenderPascal Struijk to Brighton, £20m Deal Shows Seagulls Moving With Familiar PurposeBrighton Move Quickly After Van Hecke ExitCredit to The Athletic for the original information, Brighton & Hove Albion have verbally agreed a £20million deal with Leeds United for Pascal Struijk, a transfer that feels both practical and very Brighton.The Seagulls had a hole to fill after Jan Paul van Hecke’s £52m move to Tottenham Hotspur earlier this month. Rather than drift into the market looking for the most glamorous name, they appear to have found something more useful, a defender with experience, resale logic and enough Premier League exposure to avoid feeling like a gamble dressed up as strategy.Struijk Departure Ends Leeds ChapterStruijk leaves Leeds after eight and a half years, 196 appearances and involvement in Championship title wins in 2019-20 and 2024-25. That gives this deal a touch of sadness for Leeds supporters. He was not a passing figure at Elland Road, he was part of the furniture, part of the club’s recent rise, fall and return.Yet football rarely waits for sentiment. With his contract due to expire in June 2027, Leeds faced the risk of losing him for nothing in 12 months. At £20m, the decision has an obvious financial logic, even if it carries an emotional cost.Brighton Recruitment Looks MeasuredFor Brighton, this has the look of a deal made with clarity. Fabian Hurzeler’s side have also been pursuing Luka Vuskovic, currently at the World Cup with Croatia, but Struijk offers something different. He is 26, left-footed, accustomed to English football and able to step into a squad that needs defensive stability after a major sale.Photo IMAGOBrighton have built much of their modern identity on knowing when to sell and when to reinvest. The Van Hecke fee created room. Struijk, at less than half that amount, may prove to be another example of the club turning one departure into a broader strengthening of the squad.Leeds Must Now Replace ReliabilityLeeds, meanwhile, must make sure this does not become a familiar story of losing proven players without replacing their certainty. Struijk’s value was not only in what he did on the ball or in duels, but in his continuity. Clubs promoted to the Premier League need more of that, not less.The deal makes sense. That does not mean it will feel painless.Our View, EPL Index AnalysisFrom a Brighton supporter’s perspective, this report should bring cautious optimism rather than cartwheels. Struijk may not be the signing that dominates social media timelines, but Brighton rarely need applause in June to feel vindicated by May.There is a pleasing logic to it. Van Hecke leaves for £52m, Struijk arrives for £20m, and the squad still has room for another defensive addition if required. That is the Brighton model at its cleanest, sell high, buy smart, keep moving.The question is whether Struijk can handle the rhythm of Brighton’s football. Leeds often played with intensity and emotion, Brighton demand composure and precision. If he settles into that structure, his left foot, experience and physical profile could make him an excellent fit.For supporters, the key is not to view him as a direct Van Hecke replacement in emotional terms. He is a different player, at a different stage, arriving for a different purpose. Brighton needed a defender who could reduce the pressure on the back line quickly. Struijk looks like that kind of signing.At £20m, this feels sensible, maybe even quietly clever. And with Brighton, quietly clever often ages rather well.Word count: 617

title: Isner vs Mahut: Remembering the longest match in Wimbledon history
description: John Isner and Nicolas Mahut played out the longest match in tennis history on Wimbledon’s Court 18 between 22 and 24 June 2010. Their first-round encounter stretched over three days, lasting an 11 hours and 5 minutes, and set records that still stand today.
content: Photo by Alastair Grant-Pool/Getty ImagesJohn Isner and Nicolas Mahut played out the longest match in tennis history on Wimbledon’s Court 18 between 22 and 24 June 2010.Their first-round encounter stretched over three days, lasting an 11 hours and 5 minutes, and set records that still stand today.Isner eventually came through 6-4, 3-6, 6-7, 7-6, 70-68, in a contest that has become part of Wimbledon history.How John Isner and Nicolas Mahut made Wimbledon historyPhoto by Suzanne Plunkett-Pool/Getty ImagesThe match began quietly on Tuesday, 22 June, without any sense of what was to come. Isner took the opening set 6-4, before Mahut levelled by taking the second 6-3.Mahut then edged ahead by claiming the third in a tie-break, but Isner hit back by winning the fourth in another tie-break.At two sets apiece, the match was already tightly balanced, but no one could have predicted how long it would take to decide the winner.Light stopped play before the fifth set could begin, and when they returned the next day, the match entered uncharted territory.The final set carried on deep into Wednesday evening, with neither player able to break the other’s serve. At 59-59, play was halted again as darkness fell.It was not until Thursday that Isner finally broke through, taking the deciding set 70-68 after more than eight hours of play in the final set alone.Why the longest match in tennis will not happen again under current rulesThe numbers from Isner vs Mahut make it clear why the match stands apart. It lasted over 11 hours, included 183 games, and saw 138 games in the final set alone.Isner served 113 aces to Mahut’s 103, for a combined total of 216.The match became a cultural moment as well as a sporting one. It was the kind of contest that seemed to consume the tournament, drawing in players, fans, and officials as the score moved higher.One memorable line from the live coverage summed up the mood: “Let it end, let it end, it’s 46-all.”Wimbledon has since called it a record that will probably never be broken, and the rulebook now explains why.In 2019, Wimbledon introduced a final-set tie-break at 12-12, following another marathon involving Isner against Kevin Anderson the previous year.Grand Slam tournaments later agreed on a shared rule, now using a 10-point tie-break at 6-6 in the final set.That means a 70-68 fifth set cannot happen under current Grand Slam rules. The Isner vs Mahut match remains a record not just because of its length, but because tennis has changed since it happened.Read more:Alex de Minaur reacts after the turnaround in his game at Queen’sJannik Sinner turns to Novak Djokovic’s method after French Open exitYou’ll never guess what Jack Draper did to catch Andy Murray off guard

title: IShowSpeed drives outrageous custom Cristiano Ronaldo Lamborghini to Portugal World Cup game
description: Cristiano Ronaldo has not found his rhythm at the 2026 FIFA World Cup, despite his biggest fan’s best efforts to spur him on. While Lionel Messi has torn through Group J — six goals already and a record seven straight World Cup matches on the scoresheet — Ronaldo’s tournament has been stop-start.
content: Photo by Alex Pantling - FIFA/FIFA via Getty ImagesCristiano Ronaldo has not found his rhythm at the 2026 FIFA World Cup, despite his biggest fan’s best efforts to spur him on.While Lionel Messi has torn through Group J — six goals already and a record seven straight World Cup matches on the scoresheet — Ronaldo’s tournament has been stop-start. A quiet opener against DR Congo, a brace against Uzbekistan, then little against Colombia as Portugal drew 0-0 in Miami on Saturday to finish second in Group K.One person determined to drag him along for the ride was IShowSpeed. The streamer and lifelong Ronaldo superfan turned up to the Colombia game in the most on-brand way possible — behind the wheel of his custom CR7-themed Lamborghini.IShowSpeed’s Cristiano Ronaldo Lamborghini rolled into MiamiThe car is not a one-off gag.IShowSpeed, real name Darren Watkins Jr., bought the custom Huracan in 2024 and had it wrapped in a Ronaldo mural and Portugal’s colors — a build reported to sit somewhere between $249,000 and $500,000.In a clip posted to X before kickoff, the streamer told his followers: “Chat, we’re gonna pull up in the Ronaldo Lamborghini. He gotta win, bro — he gotta win.”The grand entrance did not rub off on the pitch. Ronaldo was quiet for long stretches as Portugal were held to a goalless draw, with Joao Felix looking the more likely of the two to break the deadlock.His sharpest moments at the tournament remain those two finishes against Uzbekistan.At 41, the questions about his role are fair. Ronaldo may now offer Portugal more as an impact substitute, sent on to chase a game rather than set its tempo. Roberto Martinez’s side still have the squad to go deep, but the balance around their captain needs work.Portugal finished second in Group K and face Croatia in the Round of 32 on July 2nd. The talent is there for a long run. Something, though, has to change.READ MORE: iShowSpeed gets trolled by Walmart employees with Lionel Messi jerseysIShowSpeed says USMNT ‘look like one of the best teams’ despite Cristiano Ronaldo predictionUSA’s opening goal against Turkiye obliterated an all-time World Cup record with 45 games remaining

title: Barcelona could have signed priority target for only €20 million not very long ago
description: Barcelona’s pursuit of Julian Alvarez may dominate today’s transfer headlines, but the club had the chance to sign the Argentine striker long before he became one of world football’s most sought...
content: Barcelona could have signed priority target for only €20 million not very long agoBarcelona’s pursuit of Julian Alvarez may dominate today’s transfer headlines, but the club had the chance to sign the Argentine striker long before he became one of world football’s most sought-after forwards.Indeed, according to AS, back in 2022, while Alvarez was still starring for River Plate, he was offered to Barcelona as he prepared to make the leap to European football. At the time, his price tag was just €20 million, making him one of the market’s biggest bargains.A dream move that never happenedAs per the report, Alvarez’s representatives believed Barcelona would be the ideal destination for him when he decided to leave River Plate.The Argentine striker had always dreamed of playing alongside Lionel Messi, and while that would not be possible, his name was still offered to Barcelona’s sporting department during Joan Laporta’s presidency.Despite recognizing his enormous potential, the Catalan club ultimately chose a different path.Barcelona were offered Julian Alvarez when he was at River Plate. (Photo by Rodrigo Valle/Getty Images)Barcelona chose Ferran Torres insteadAlthough Alvarez represented an affordable opportunity, Barcelona had more immediate priorities.As such, the club invested €55 million to sign Ferran Torres from Manchester City while also bringing Pierre-Emerick Aubameyang from Arsenal to Camp Nou on loan to strengthen the attack.At the time, then-manager Xavi Hernandez also had other established forwards at his disposal, including Ousmane Dembele and Memphis Depay. With attacking positions already crowded, Barcelona decided not to pursue Alvarez.Manchester City moved quicklyThe same proposal presented to Laporta was also offered to Manchester City CEO Ferran Soriano. Unlike Barcelona, City acted decisively and secured the Argentine’s signature.Following the agreement, Alvarez remained on loan at River Plate for several months before officially joining Pep Guardiola’s squad in July 2022.Although he enjoyed success at Manchester City, regular starts proved difficult to come by. With Erling Haaland established as the club’s first-choice striker, the Argentine often found himself playing a secondary role.After two seasons, he decided to seek a new challenge. Alvarez eventually joined Atletico Madrid, although those close to the player had reservations about the transfer from the beginning.In hindsight, those concerns appear justified. After two seasons under Diego Simeone, the striker has struggled to establish the relationship he hoped for with the Argentine coach and now wants to move on.Barcelona back in for AlvarezThe priority target. (Photo by Fran Santiago/Getty Images)Now the story has come full circle. Barcelona, the club that once declined the opportunity to sign Alvarez for around €20 million, arenow actively pursuing him as its preferred successor to Robert Lewandowski.The circumstances, however, are completely different. Having established himself as one of Europe’s elite forwards, Alvarez now commands a transfer fee many times higher than the one Barcelona passed on just a few years ago.Inside Barcelona, there is strong belief that the 26-year-old would thrive under Hansi Flick. The club’s sporting department considers him an excellent tactical fit thanks to his complete skill set.Barcelona also believe that playing alongside creative talents such as Lamine Yamal, Anthony Gordon, Pedri and the rest of Flick’s attacking unit would allow Alvarez to reach another level.The opportunity that once slipped away has returned, but this time the cost of bringing the Argentine to Camp Nou is far greater than it was in 2022.

title: Canada vs South Africa match preview: Historic Round of 32 clash at World Cup 2026
Sakinaka Murder Case: पत्नी की हत्या के लिए 6.7 लाख की सुपारी देने का आरोप, चार्जशीट में बड़ा खुलासा
description: Sakinaka Murder Case: मुंबई में दाखिल चार्जशीट में पुलिस ने दावा किया है कि मुख्य आरोपी ने कथित प्रेम संबंध के चलते पत्नी की हत्या की साजिश रची और वारदात को आत्महत्या दिखाने की कोशिश की।
content:
Sakinaka Murder Case News: साकीनाका इलाके में हुए एक सनसनीखेज हत्याकांड में पुलिस ने चार्जशीट दाखिल कर दी है। चार्जशीट के मुताबिक, मुख्य आरोपी सकाराम चौधरी ने राजस्थान की एक महिला के साथ अपने कथित प्रेम प्रसंग को जारी रखने के लिए अपनी ही पत्नी, नारंगी उर्फ गीता सकाराम चौधरी की हत्या की खौफनाक साजिश रची थी।
आरोपी अपनी गर्लफ्रेंड के साथ रहना चाहता था और अपनी पत्नी को इस रिश्ते में सबसे बड़ी रुकावट मानता था। अभियोजन पक्ष के अनुसार, सकाराम ने अपनी पत्नी के रास्ते से हटाने के लिए कई सह-आरोपियों के साथ मिलकर साजिश रची।
हत्या को बताया आत्महत्या, दी थी सुपारी

उसने पत्नी की हत्या के लिए करीब 6.7 लाख रुपये की सुपारी दी और वारदात को अंजाम देने के बाद मौत को आत्महत्या का रूप देने की कोशिश की।
हालांकि, पुलिस जांच में इस खौफनाक साजिश का पर्दाफाश हो गया। चार्जशीट में यह भी खुलासा हुआ है कि वह महिला पर लगातार दबाव बना रहा था। महिला और उसके परिवार ने राजस्थान पुलिस में सकाराम के खिलाफ शिकायत भी दर्ज कराई थी। आरोप है कि सकाराम शादीशुदा होने के बावजूद महिला का पीछा कर रहा था।
उसे जबरन मुंबई लाया। उसका सामान छीन लिया और रिश्ता खत्म करने पर उनकी अंतरंग तस्वीरें व वीडियो वायरल करने की धमकी देकर ब्लैकमेल कर रहा था।

ये भी पढ़ें :-  Rohit Shetty को फिर मिली जान से मारने की धमकी, 20 करोड़ की कथित रंगदारी मांगने का आरोप 
अदालती प्रक्रिया जारी
पुलिस की ओर से दाखिल चार्जशीट में कई दस्तावेजी और परिस्थितिजन्य साक्ष्यों का उल्लेख किया गया है। हालांकि, इन आरोपों पर अंतिम फैसला अदालत में सुनवाई और उपलब्ध साक्ष्यों के परीक्षण के बाद ही होगा। फिलहाल मामले की न्यायिक प्रक्रिया जारी है।

title: जिस पक्षी को लोग मानते थे… आज वो बना असम का गौरव; PM मोदी ने ‘मन की बात’ में सुनाई ‘हरगिला’ की कहानी
description: PM Modi On Hargila bird: पीएम मोदी ने 'मन की बात' में असम के दुर्लभ 'हरगिला' पक्षी के संरक्षण की कहानी साझा की। जीव-वैज्ञानिक पूर्णिमा देवी बर्मन के प्रयासों से यह पक्षी अब गांव की पहचान बन गया है।
content:
PM Modi Mann Ki Baat Hargila Bird:  प्रधानमंत्री नरेंद्र मोदी ने अपने रेडियो कार्यक्रम &#8216;मन की बात&#8217; के 135वें एपिसोड में एक ऐसी कहानी सुनाई जिसने पूरे देश का ध्यान असम के जंगलों और वहां की एक अद्भुत परंपरा की ओर खींच लिया।
पीएम मोदी ने असम के दुर्लभ पक्षी &#8216;हरगिला&#8217; (ग्रेटर एडजुटेंट स्टॉर्क) के संरक्षण की प्रेरक कहानी शेयर की, जो किसी समय अपने ही वजूद के लिए संघर्ष कर रहा था। प्रधानमंत्री ने इस प्रयास को समाज में जागरूकता और सामूहिक भागीदारी का बेहतरीन उदाहरण बताया है।
अंधविश्वास से पहचान तक का सफर
प्रधानमंत्री ने बताया कि एक दौर ऐसा भी था जब असम के स्थानीय समुदायों में &#8216;हरगिला&#8217; को एक &#8216;अशुभ&#8217; पक्षी माना जाता था। लोग इसे अपने घरों के आसपास देखना पसंद नहीं करते थे।
लंबे समय तक लोगों के मन में इसे लेकर गलत धारणाएं बनी रहीं और आलम यह था कि लोग उन पेड़ों को ही काट देते थे, जिन पर यह विशालकाय सारस अपने घोंसले बनाता था। लेकिन आज, संरक्षण के प्रयासों और लोगों की बदलती सोच ने इस पक्षी को उन गांवों की पहचान और गर्व का प्रतीक बना दिया है।
&#8216;हरगिला आर्मी&#8217; का जादू
इस बड़े सामाजिक बदलाव की नायक रहीं जीव-वैज्ञानिक पूर्णिमा देवी बर्मन। प्रधानमंत्री ने उनके योगदान की सराहना करते हुए बताया कि जब उन्होंने यह स्थिति देखी, तो उन्होंने लोगों की सोच बदलने का संकल्प लिया। पूर्णिमा देवी ने सबसे पहले स्थानीय महिलाओं के साथ संवाद शुरू किया। उन्होंने वैज्ञानिक तथ्यों के जरिए ग्रामीणों को समझाया कि हरगिला पर्यावरण के संतुलन और प्रकृति को स्वच्छ रखने के लिए कितना अनिवार्य है।
धीरे-धीरे महिलाएं इस अभियान की रीढ़ बन गईं और एक बड़ा जन-आंदोलन खड़ा हुआ। जिस पक्षी को कभी अशुभ मानकर गांवों से दूर भगाया जाता था, वही आज कई गांवों की पहचान बन चुका है। महिलाएं अब इसके संरक्षण को अपनी संस्कृति और गौरव का हिस्सा मानती हैं।
वैज्ञानिक दृष्टिकोण से क्यों है खास?
वैज्ञानिक दृष्टिकोण से देखें तो &#8216;हरगिला&#8217; दुनिया की सबसे दुर्लभ और विशाल सारस प्रजातियों में से एक है। इसका नाम संस्कृत के दो शब्दों &#8216;हड&#8217; (हड्डी) और &#8216;गिला&#8217; (निगलना) से मिलकर बना है, जिसका अर्थ &#8216;हड्डी निगलने वाला पक्षी&#8217; है। यह मुख्य रूप से भारत के असम और कंबोडिया के कुछ हिस्सों में पाया जाता है। वैश्विक स्तर पर इस पक्षी की करीब 80 प्रतिशत आबादी अकेले असम में रहती है।
यह भी पढ़ें:-  समुद्र से आसमान तक कांपेंगे दुश्मन! ‘मन की बात’ में PM मोदी ने गिनाई देश की उपलब्धियां, कही ये बड़ी बात
पर्यावरण के लिए क्यों जरूरी है हरगिला?
हरगिला एक मांसाहारी और मृतभक्षी (Scavenger) पक्षी है। यह सड़े-गले मांस, मरे हुए जीवों और कचरे को खाकर प्राकृतिक सफाईकर्मी की भूमिका निभाता है। साथ ही, यह आर्द्रभूमि (Wetland) और जलाशयों के आसपास के पारिस्थितिकी तंत्र को स्वच्छ और संतुलित बनाए रखने में भी महत्वपूर्ण योगदान देता है।

title: अमरनाथ यात्रा 2026: काशी से रवाना हुआ पहला जत्था… श्रद्धालुओं के चेहरे पर दिखी अलग ही खुशी
description: Varanasi Amarnath Yatra: अमरनाथ यात्रा शुरू होते ही वाराणसी से श्रद्धालुओं का पहला जत्था बाबा बर्फानी के दर्शन के लिए रवाना हुआ। श्री काशी विश्वनाथ सेवा समिति 26 वर्षों से सुविधाएं उपलब्ध करा रही है।
content:
Amarnath Yatra From Varanasi: बाबा बर्फानी के पवित्र दर्शन के लिए अमरनाथ यात्रा शुरू होते ही धर्मनगरी काशी से श्रद्धालुओं का पहला जत्था रविवार को रवाना हो गया। श्री काशी विश्वनाथ सेवा समिति के तत्वावधान में सेवादारों और श्रद्धालुओं का पहला दल वाराणसी कैंट रेलवे स्टेशन से हावड़ा-अमृतसर मेल के माध्यम से कश्मीर के लिए प्रस्थान किया।
हजारों श्रद्धालु बाबा अमरनाथ के दर्शन के लिए रवाना
हर वर्ष की तरह इस वर्ष भी काशी से बड़ी संख्या में श्रद्धालु बाबा अमरनाथ के दर्शन के लिए रवाना हो रहे हैं। समिति के अनुसार, काशी से हजारों श्रद्धालु अमरनाथ यात्रा में शामिल होते हैं। श्रद्धालु पहले अमृतसर पहुंचेंगे, जहां से जम्मू होते हुए पहलगाम तक का सफर तय करेंगे। इसके बाद पवित्र गुफा तक की यात्रा पैदल पूरी की जाएगी।
श्री काशी विश्वनाथ सेवा समिति पिछले 26 वर्षों से अमरनाथ यात्रियों की सेवा में जुटी हुई है। समिति की ओर से यात्रा के दौरान लगभग 300 श्रद्धालुओं के रहने, भोजन और अन्य आवश्यक सुविधाओं की व्यवस्था की जाती है। इस वर्ष भी समिति द्वारा बड़ी संख्या में यात्रियों को दर्शन कराने में सहयोग प्रदान किया जा रहा है।
सेवा कार्यों में जुटेंगे 80 से 90 सेवादारों का दल
समिति के सेवादार दिलीप सिंह ‘बंटी’ ने बताया कि 80 से 90 सेवादारों का दल यात्रा पर जा रहा है। इनमें 10 सेवादारों का समूह उनके, विवेक श्रीवास्तव और कुलदीप त्यागी के नेतृत्व में पंजाब जाएगा, जबकि लगभग 70 सेवादार बेगमपुरा एक्सप्रेस से सीधे जम्मू होते हुए चंदनबाड़ी पहुंचेंगे और वहां से सेवा कार्यों में जुटेंगे।
यह भी पढ़ें- Jagannath Rath Yatra: जगन्नाथ मंदिर में क्यों लगाया जाता है, खिचड़ी का भोग? जानिए महाप्रसाद की रसोई के चमत्कार
उन्होंने बताया कि अमरनाथ यात्रा के दौरान श्रद्धालुओं को हर संभव सहायता उपलब्ध कराने के लिए समिति पूरी तरह तैयार है। यात्रा में शामिल श्रद्धालुओं के लिए भोजन, आवास और अन्य व्यवस्थाओं को लेकर व्यापक इंतजाम किए गए हैं।
सेवा अभियान को मिल रहा जनप्रतिनिधियों और सामाजिक संगठनों का सहयोग
समिति के इस सेवा अभियान को जनप्रतिनिधियों और सामाजिक संगठनों का भी सहयोग मिल रहा है। आयोजन में महापौर अशोक तिवारी, विधायक डॉ. नीलकंठ तिवारी, विधायक सौरभ श्रीवास्तव, मंत्री दयाशंकर मिश्रा ‘दयालु’, शांति लाल जैन सहित कई गणमान्य लोगों का सहयोग प्राप्त हो रहा है। वहीं श्रद्धालुओं के लिए पान और मिठाई की व्यवस्था छक्कन दादा, राजेश चौरसिया और नंदनी परिवार की ओर से की जाएगी।

title: फेल हुए तो बन गए TET पेपर लीक के मास्टरमाइंड! भिवंडी पुलिस की गिरफ्त में आए 3 शातिर ग्रेजुएट्स
description: MAHA TET Paper Leak Mastermind: MAHA TET 2026 पेपर लीक मामले में भिवंडी पुलिस ने 3 शातिर ग्रेजुएट्स को गिरफ्तार किया है। खुद परीक्षा में फेल होने के बाद आरोपियों ने किया पेपर लीक।
content:
Failed Candidates Turn TET Paper Leak Masterminds: महाराष्ट्र शिक्षक पात्रता परीक्षा MAHA TET 2026 के पेपर लीक मामले ने पूरे राज्य को झकझोर कर रख दिया है। इस सनसनीखेज कांड में सबसे हैरान करने वाला खुलासा आरोपियों की शैक्षिक योग्यता को लेकर हुआ है। पुलिस की गिरफ्त में आए इस गिरोह के मुख्य सदस्य कोई अनपढ़ अपराधी नहीं, बल्कि बीएससी, बीकॉम और बीए जैसी डिग्रियां रखने वाले उच्च शिक्षित युवक हैं।
ठाणे की भिवंडी पुलिस द्वारा बिछाए गए जाल में फंसे तीन आरोपियों की पहचान राजीव कुमार, आकाश कुमार और धीरज कुमार के रूप में हुई है। जांच में सामने आया कि राजीव कुमार बीएससी ग्रेजुएट है और जमीन की खरीद-बिक्री के व्यवसाय से जुड़ा है। वहीं, आकाश कुमार ने बीकॉम किया है। गिरोह का तीसरा सदस्य धीरज कुमार बीए डिग्री धारक है। चौंकाने वाली बात यह है कि धीरज खुद कभी केंद्रीय विद्यालयों की शिक्षक भर्ती परीक्षा में शामिल हुआ था, लेकिन उसमें सफल नहीं हो सका था। आज वही युवक दूसरों को गलत तरीके से शिक्षक बनाने के नाम पर करोड़ों का सौदा कर रहा था।
1.5 करोड़ की डील और दिल्ली कनेक्शन
पुलिस जांच के अनुसार, यह गिरोह दिल्ली से मूल प्रश्नपत्रों के चार सेट लेकर आया था और उन्हें करीब 1.5 करोड़ रुपये में बेचने की फिराक में था। भिवंडी पुलिस ने गुप्त सूचना के आधार पर छापेमारी कर इनके पास से मोबाइल फोन, नकदी और प्रश्नपत्रों के मूल सेट बरामद किए हैं। महाराष्ट्र राज्य परीक्षा परिषद ने जब इन बरामद पेपर्स का मिलान असली प्रश्नपत्रों से किया, तो वे मेल खा गए, जिसके तुरंत बाद परीक्षा स्थगित करने का कड़ा फैसला लिया गया।
यह भी पढ़ें:  राजगड़ किले की यात्रा पड़ी भारी… पाबे घाट की गहरी खाई में गिरी पर्यटकों की बस; दो की मौत, 20 घायल 
6 लाख भविष्य अधर में, लगेगा मकोका?
इस पेपर लीक की वजह से महाराष्ट्र के 6 लाख से अधिक उम्मीदवारों का भविष्य अनिश्चितता में लटक गया है। सरकार ने इस मामले को गंभीरता से लेते हुए एसआईटी जांच के आदेश दिए हैं। उपमुख्यमंत्री एकनाथ शिंदे ने स्पष्ट किया है कि दोषियों के खिलाफ सख्त कानूनी कार्रवाई की जाएगी और सरकार इन मास्टरमाइंड्स पर मकोका लगाने पर भी विचार कर रही है।
समाज के लिए यह एक चिंता का विषय है कि डिग्री धारक युवा, जो देश के भविष्य के निर्माण में सहायक हो सकते थे, आज परीक्षाओं की शुचिता में सेंध लगाने वाले संगठित अपराध का हिस्सा बन रहे हैं। फिलहाल, पुलिस इस गिरोह के अन्य नेटवर्क और &#8216;दिल्ली लिंक&#8217; की गहराई से पड़ताल कर रही है।

title: Women | అర్థరాత్రి ఆస్పత్రిలో మహిళ హల్‌ చల్.. వీడియో
description: Women |  ఓ మహిళ కడుపునొప్పి ఉందంటూ ఎల్బీ నగర్‌ హాస్పిటల్‌లోని అత్యవసర విభాగంలో చేరింది. ప్రాథమిక చికిత్సనందించిన డాక్టర్లు ఆమెకు పరీక్షలు నిర్వహించి ఎలాంటి అనారోగ్య సమస్య లేదని తెలియజేశారు.
content:
Women | ఎల్బీ నగర్‌లోని హాస్పిటల్‌లో అర్ధరాత్రి ఓ మహిళ హల్‌ చల్‌ చేసింది. లలిత కరీర అనే మహిళ కడుపునొప్పి ఉందంటూ ఎల్బీ నగర్‌ శ్రేష్ఠ ఆరెంజ్ హాస్పిటల్‌లోని అత్యవసర విభాగంలో చేరింది. ప్రాథమిక చికిత్సనందించిన డాక్టర్లు ఆమెకు పరీక్షలు నిర్వహించి ఎలాంటి అనారోగ్య సమస్య లేదని తెలియజేశారు. దీంతో లలిత కరీర డాక్టర్లపై ఆగ్రహంతో ఊగిపోతూ దూషిస్తూ వారిపై దాడికి పాల్పడింది.
దాడి అనంతరం లలిత కరీర TS 08 HG 9824 నంబర్ కారును స్వయంగా నడుపుకుంటూ వనస్థలిపురంలోని సహారా హాస్పిటల్‌కు వెళ్లింది. ఈ నేపథ్యంలో ఆస్పత్రి సిబ్బంది పోలీసులకు ఫిర్యాదు చేశారు. ఫిర్యాదు ఆధారంగా ఎల్బీ నగర్ పోలీసులు కేసు నమోదు చేసి దర్యాప్తు కొనసాగిస్తున్నారు. ఇంతకీ ఆ మహిళ డాక్టర్లు, ఆస్పత్రి సిబ్బంది పట్ల అలా ఎందుకు ప్రవర్తించిదనేది తెలియాల్సి ఉంది.
 

ఎల్బీ నగర్‌ – శ్రేష్ఠ ఆరెంజ్ హాస్పిటల్‌లో అర్ధరాత్రి మహిళ హల్చల్
కడుపునొప్పి ఉందంటూ అత్యవసర విభాగoలో చేరిన లలిత కరీర అనే మహిళ
ప్రాథమిక చికిత్స అందించి పరీక్షలు నిర్వహించి, ఎలాంటి అనారోగ్య సమస్య లేదని తెలిపిన డాక్టర్లు.. దీంతో వారిపై ఆగ్రహంతో దూషిస్తూ దాడి

title: അവിശ്വാസപ്രമേയത്തെ സ്വാഗതംചെയ്യുന്നു, മാസത്തിൽ ഒന്നുവീതം പ്രതീക്ഷിച്ചതാണ്- വി.വി. രാജേഷ്
బ్రతుకు ఆశతో 4 వేల కిలోమీటర్లు ప్రయాణం..ల్యాండింగ్‌కు ముందే బాలిక మృతి!
description: Ethiopia Girl Cancer Death Shamshabad: క్యాన్సర్ (Cancer) బారిన పడిన తమ 13 ఏళ్ల కన్నబిడ్డను ఎలాగైనా బ్రతికించుకోవాలనే ఆశతో.. సుమారు 4,000 కిలోమీటర్ల దూరం...
content:
Ethiopia Girl Cancer Death Shamshabad: క్యాన్సర్ (Cancer) బారిన పడిన తమ 13 ఏళ్ల కన్నబిడ్డను ఎలాగైనా బ్రతికించుకోవాలనే ఆశతో.. సుమారు 4,000 కిలోమీటర్ల దూరం సరిహద్దులు దాటి వచ్చిన ఆ ఇథియోపియా (Ethiopia) దంపతులకు విధి అత్యంత ఘోరమైన శోకాన్ని మిగిల్చింది. హైదరాబాద్‌లోని కార్పొరేట్ వైద్యం తమ కూతురి ప్రాణాలు నిలబెడుతుందని నమ్మి విమానమెక్కిన ఆ తల్లిదండ్రులకు.. గమ్యస్థానం చేరేందుకు మరికొద్ది నిమిషాల వ్యవధి ఉందనగా కోలుకోలేని దెబ్బ తగిలింది. శంషాబాద్ అంతర్జాతీయ విమానాశ్రయంలో (RGIA) ఫ్లైట్ ల్యాండ్ అవ్వడానికి కొద్ది నిమిషాల ముందే ఆ బాలిక విమానంలోనే కన్నుమూసింది.



Read Also :Trump Photo US Passport: అమెరికా సరికొత్త పాస్‌పోర్టులపై ప్రెసిడెంట్ ట్రంప్ ఫోటో.. వైరల్ అవుతున్న డిజైన్!



ల్యాండింగ్‌కు ముందే ఆగిపోయిన శ్వాస



తమ 13 ఏళ్ల కుమార్తె ప్రాణాంతక క్యాన్సర్ వ్యాధితో తీవ్రంగా బాధపడుతుండటంతో, ఇథియోపియాలో మెరుగైన చికిత్స అందక ఆ తల్లిదండ్రులు తీవ్రంగా శ్రమించి హైదరాబాద్‌కు వచ్చేందుకు విమాన ప్రయాణం ప్లాన్ చేశారు. విమానం గాల్లో ఉండగానే బాలిక శ్వాస తీసుకోవడానికి తీవ్రంగా ఇబ్బంది పడింది. శంషాబాద్ ఎయిర్‌పోర్టులో రన్‌వేపై విమానం ల్యాండ్ కావడానికి కొద్ది నిమిషాల ముందు ఆమె ఆరోగ్యం పూర్తిగా విషమించి, తల్లిదండ్రుల ఒడిలోనే ప్రాణాలు విడిచింది. విమానం ల్యాండ్ అయిన తర్వాత వైద్యులు పరీక్షించి బాలిక అప్పటికే మృతి చెందినట్లు ధృవీకరించారు. కనీసం కూతురి మృతదేహాన్ని తిరిగి తమ సొంత దేశానికి (ఇథియోపియా) తీసుకెళ్లేందుకు కూడా ఆ అభాగ్య దంపతుల వద్ద పైసా ఆర్థిక స్థోమత లేదు. విమాన ప్రయాణానికే తమ వద్ద ఉన్నదంతా ఖర్చు చేయడంతో.. నిస్సహాయ స్థితిలో ఉన్న ఆ తల్లిదండ్రులు తమ బిడ్డ అంత్యక్రియలను హైదరాబాద్‌లోనే నిర్వహించాలని కన్నీటి పర్యంతమవుతూ నిర్ణయించుకున్నారు.



Ethiopia Girl Cancer Death Shamshabad: అంతర్జాతీయ రోగుల నిస్సహాయతకు సజీవ సాక్ష్యం



ఈ విషాద ఘటన వైద్య సేవల (Medical Tourism) కోసం తమ సొంత దేశాలు, సరిహద్దులు దాటి భారతదేశానికి వచ్చే పేద విదేశీ కుటుంబాల యొక్క దయనీయమైన ఆర్థిక స్థితిని మరియు నిస్సహాయతను కళ్లకు కట్టింది. తమ కళ్ల ముందే కూతురు అనంత లోకాలకు వెళ్లిపోవడంతో, భాష కూడా రాని ఆ ఇథియోపియా దంపతులు శంషాబాద్ విమానాశ్రయంలో రోదించిన తీరు అక్కడున్న వారిని సైతం కన్నీళ్లు పెట్టించింది. స్థానిక పోలీసులు మరియు ఎయిర్‌పోర్ట్ అధికారులు మానవతా దృక్పథంతో స్పందించి, మృతదేహానికి హైదరాబాద్‌లోనే అంత్యక్రియలు నిర్వహించేందుకు అవసరమైన చట్టపరమైన ఏర్పాట్లు చేస్తున్నారు.

title: 7 Modern Mehendi Trends That Go Beyond Traditional Henna
description: Traditional henna is getting a modern makeover by adding individuality and personality to the design with white, metallic, glitter, and abstract patterns.
content: For centuries, traditional henna has been appreciated for its complex flower designs, paisley patterns, and its reddish brown stain color. In recent times, however, mehendi has moved on from its traditional background and is now experimenting with new colors, new materials, and new artistic styles owing to fashion, social media, and body art trends.White MehendiWhite mehendi is among the most fascinating substitutes for traditional henna. It is made up of body cosmetic paints or adhesive agents unlike natural henna which stains the skin into different orange and brown colors. The white mehendi gives a beautiful, lace-like finish, and this helps in making intricate details pop. It works well with mono color outfits, beachwear, party wear, etc, and therefore many people like using it when doing photoshoots and posting on social media.Metallic MehendiMetallic designs of mehendi such as gold, silver, bronze, and rose gold incorporate a jewellery like design into the body. As opposed to using the natural colours provided by the earthy henna, the designs here use cosmetic pigments that are metallic and reflective in nature. The designs look very much like bracelets, rings, and other hand ornaments making them perfect for occasions such as parties and festivals.Glitter MehendiGlitter mehendi adds glitters either on top of or beside classic designs to make them attractive. Glitter is available in various colors and enhances the appearance of mehendi designs in an attractive manner. This is a different trend from the traditional one since it pays less attention to the henna design. It is preferred by people who like experimenting with fun and stylish designs.Colored MehendiWho says mehendi should always be brown? Coloured mehendi gives you the option of creating unique designs using shades like blue, green, red, purple, and even pastel colours. Instead of relying on the unique colour of the natural henna, coloured henna gives you the freedom of matching your mehendi to your outfit or your accessories to create a unique and way more interesting look.Negative Space MehendiIn negative space mehendi, all the attention lies on the untouched areas of the hand. Unlike the other forms of mehendi, this one deliberately leaves some areas of the skin empty, thus creating a contrasting effect. This new trend in henna is inspired by tattooing and minimalism, thus, it looks very modern, unique and elegant compared to the conventional densely filled patterns of henna.Finger-Only MehendiFinger-only mehendi represents an attempt to introduce minimalism in mehendi. Unlike conventional mehendi patterns, which cover the whole palm and forearms of the person, this mehendi consists only of patterns drawn on the fingers, fingertips, or knuckles, creating a subtle yet stylish look. Such patterns are usually inspired by fine jewelry and modern nail art and are suitable for everyday use.Abstract MehendiThe abstract mehendi is created not with the usual floral patterns but rather with flowing lines, geometrical shapes, asymmetry and artistic designs. Inspired by current art styles, the abstract mehendi is all about individuality and personal expression. Without any rigid rules and limitations, this style of mehendi is becoming increasingly popular among those who are fond of unconventional body decoration.

title: Love chai? Try these 8 delicious tea recipes from across India
'High-strung' camels race in Australian outback
description:
Camels with "a bit of fire in them" raced in a remote Australian outback town this weekend at an annual event celebrating the desert beasts first imported in the mid-19th century."You would want a little bit of temper, a little bit of fire in them -- a sort of splashy look in the eye," Woodhouse told AFP.
"They want to be wary of you a little bit but not, like, aggressive," she added.
content: Hundreds of spectators descended on Australian outback town Marree to watch an annual camel race (William WEST)Camels with "a bit of fire in them" raced in a remote Australian outback town this weekend at an annual event celebrating the desert beasts first imported in the mid-19th century.Hundreds of spectators descended on Marree, which has a population of 65 and lies nearly 600 kilometres (370 miles) north of the South Australian capital Adelaide, for a 13-race spectacle on Saturday known as the Marree Camel Cup.More than 10,000 camels were imported into Australia from 1840, many of them released into the wild with the development of railways and then the arrival of motor vehicles in the 1920s.Now, estimates of the wild camel population range from 300,000 to a million animals.Trainer Kyrraley Woodhouse, who started camel racing professionally in 2013, said most of her camels had been taken from the wild to run in the Marree event, which drew more than a dozen competitors.Picking the right animal is key."You would want a little bit of temper, a little bit of fire in them -- a sort of splashy look in the eye," Woodhouse told AFP."They want to be wary of you a little bit but not, like, aggressive," she added."We want something sort of like a racehorse, a little bit high strung, a little bit forward -- something that's got a heart, that's going to run."This year's Marree Camel Cup winner was Young Gun, ridden by Patrick Dennis.Muslim cameleers, many from Afghanistan and other parts of Central and South Asia, were brought to Australia in the 1860s to harness the animals for transport in the arid interior, and some of their descendants remain in Marree.Camels in the outback compete with stock for food, destroy fences, foul waterholes and damage Indigenous cultural sites, authorities say.Without management, camel populations could double every eight years, South Australia's primary industries department says. Camel numbers are kept in check by mustering, shooting and trapping at water points.Australia also exports a small number of live camels: 68 so far in 2026 heading to Malaysia and Indonesia.bur/djw/pbt

title: World Cup Watch: Red Representation High in Knockouts
description: Liverpool will be well-represented in the Round of 32 at the World Cup.
content: Netherlands' defender #04 Virgil van Dijk celebrates after winning the 2026 World Cup Group F football match between Tunisia and the Netherlands at the Kansas City Stadium in Kansas City on June 25, 2026. (Photo by Juan MABROMATA / AFP via Getty Images) | AFP via Getty Images	This edition of the World Cup has just wrapped up the group stage which means we can begin to turn our attention to the knockouts. Before we do, though, I just want to say: I’m already nostalgic for the group stage.Yes, I’ve more or less managed to not watch any of the matches save last week’s Netherlands-Sweden match (my Liverpool fandom betrayed my integrity here). But, honestly, the group stage is my favorite part of most tournaments. A big part of it, of course, is that this part of the schedule is absolutely dense with matches. I mean, most days, we’re talking at least 4 matches. As someone that loves football and the secondary activity that comes with watching it: conversing with others about it. And so, yes, the chaos and almost impossible task of keeping up with the narratives and moments in the group stage is kind of what I live for. In fact, this is true even beyond football: the NCAA basketball tournament is, in my opinion, at its best in the early rounds. But, we’re here now and when it comes to Liverpool, the angle here is that quite a lot of our players are still alive in the tournament. Let’s go through the list of teams and the corresponding Reds that are moving on in the World Cup.Argentina – Alexis Mac Allister; Brazil – Alisson; Germany – Florian Wirtz; Netherlands – Cody Gakpo, Ryan Gravenberch, and Virgil Van Dijk; Spain – Victor Munoz; Sweden – Alexander IsakWhen you consider past players (Mohamed Salah) and players who would be playing but sustained an injury (Wataru Endo), you reach double-digit figures for Reds entering the knockout rounds for the World Cup.It may seem like a relatively minor achievement, but looking at the fact that some nations with storied footballing history – Darwin Nunez’s Uruguay, for example – are already headed home, the challenge of putting together a decent run in this tournament is quite high.So, if you’re interested in seeing the Liverpool implications in the World Cup beyond, say, Yan Diomande, you’ve still got options. Here’s hoping the lads will continue to turn in decent performances – I’m personally rooting for strong tournaments from both Isak and Wirtz, respectively – and come back to Merseyside fit and ready to go for the next season. Given that we’re only about 6 weeks away from most players reporting to the AXA training facility to prep ahead of the new season, I can only hope that the good vibes keep rolling for our Reds.

title: Kessie and Freuler ‘not a priority’ for Roma
description: Roma is monitoring the profiles of muscular midfielders with excellent tactical reading who could also bring some experience to a team making its Champions League debut. There will be many debutants, ...
content: Kessie and Freuler ‘not a priority’ for RomaRoma is monitoring the profiles of muscular midfielders with excellent tactical reading who could also bring some experience to a team making its Champions League debut. There will be many debutants, most notably Gianluca Mancini, the leader of the group but making his footballing debut with the Champions League. That’s why the Giallorossi have been offered Kessie in midfield. The midfielder is playing in the World Cup with the Ivory Coast and, given his characteristics, could be the right player. Roma, however, disagrees.Kessie already knows Gian Piero Gasperini and Serie A, but he’s not a priority for Roma. As reported by Corriere della Sera, the Ivorian midfielder was offered to the Giallorossi, who declined. Several intermediaries attempted to arrange a transfer involving the former AC Milan player, but the Roman club’s response was firm: he’s not an attractive prospect. Another midfielder linked to Roma is Freluer who is also not considered a priority.

title: Ramanathapuram SP to receive Tamil Nadu Chief Minister’s Police Medal
20 करोड़ दो नहीं तो…, रोहित शेट्टी को फिर मिली धमकी, पुलिस जांच में सामने आया इस गैंग का नाम
description:
Rohit Shetty: फिल्म इंडस्ट्री के मशहूर निर्देशक रोहित शेट्टी को एक बार फिर धमकी मिली। इस बार उनसे एक कथित ऑडियो क्लिप के जरिए 20 करोड़ रुपए की रंगदारी मांगी गई है। इस ऑडियो में कहा गया है कि अगर रकम नहीं दी गई तो इस बार निशाना सीधे रोहित शेट्टी होंगे। इस घटना के.
The post 20 करोड़ दो नहीं तो…, रोहित शेट्टी को फिर मिली धमकी, पुलिस जांच में सामने आया इस गैंग का नाम appeared first on Dainik Savera Times.
content:
Rohit Shetty: फिल्म इंडस्ट्री के मशहूर निर्देशक रोहित शेट्टी को एक बार फिर धमकी मिली। इस बार उनसे एक कथित ऑडियो क्लिप के जरिए 20 करोड़ रुपए की रंगदारी मांगी गई है। इस ऑडियो में कहा गया है कि अगर रकम नहीं दी गई तो इस बार निशाना सीधे रोहित शेट्टी होंगे। इस घटना के सामने आने के बाद मुंबई पुलिस और क्राइम ब्रांच पूरी तरह से अलर्ट मोड में आ गई है और मामले की जांच शुरू कर दी गई है।
इस ऑडियो क्लिप में कहा गया है कि रोहित शेट्टी के जुहू स्थित घर पर पहले जो फायरिंग हुई थी, वह सिर्फ एक ट्रेलर था। अगर इस बार मांगी गई रकम नहीं दी गई, तो गोली सीधे फिल्ममेकर को निशाना बनाएगी।
जांच में सामने आया लॉरेंस बिश्नोई गैंग के सहयोगी का हाथ 
जानकारी के मुताबिक, यह लगभग 90 सेकंड लंबा ऑडियो क्लिप शनिवार सुबह रोहित शेट्टी के स्टाफ को मिला था। स्टाफ ने बिना देरी किए इस क्लिप को पुलिस के हवाले कर दिया, जिसके बाद जुहू पुलिस स्टेशन में मामला दर्ज करने की जांच प्रक्रिया शुरू की गई।
ये भी पढ़ें- Ketan Agarwal murder case: पुलिस ने क्राइम सीन किया रीक्रिएट, पूरी साजिश का हुआ पर्दाफाश!
 
शुरुआती जांच में ऑडियो में आवाज की पहचान की गई, तो वह कथित तौर पर लॉरेंस बिश्नोई गैंग के करीबी सहयोगी शुभम लोणकर से मिलती-जुलती पाई गई।
बाबा सिद्दीकी की हत्या से जुड़ा है शुभम लोणकर का नाम
पुलिस सूत्रों के अनुसार, शुभम लोणकर का नाम पहले भी कई गंभीर मामलों में सामने आ चुका है। वह 2024 में हुई नेता बाबा सिद्दीकी की हत्या और इसी साल रोहित शेट्टी के घर पर हुई फायरिंग के मामले में भी वांटेड है। हालांकि, पुलिस ने अभी इस आवाज की आधिकारिक पुष्टि नहीं की है और इसे फॉरेंसिक जांच के लिए भेज दिया गया है।
पुलिस को सौंपा धमकी भरा ऑडियो 
मुंबई क्राइम ब्रांच के एक वरिष्ठ अधिकारी ने बताया कि रोहित शेट्टी के स्टाफ द्वारा यह धमकी भरा ऑडियो पुलिस को सौंप दिया गया है और इसे गंभीरता से लिया जा रहा है। फिलहाल सभी तकनीकी पहलुओं पर जांच चल रही है और ऑडियो क्लिप के स्रोत का पता लगाने की कोशिश की जा रही है। जैसे ही फॉरेंसिक रिपोर्ट सामने आएगी, मामले में आगे की कार्रवाई तेज कर दी जाएगी।
The post 20 करोड़ दो नहीं तो…, रोहित शेट्टी को फिर मिली धमकी, पुलिस जांच में सामने आया इस गैंग का नाम appeared first on Dainik Savera Times.

title: ജൂലൈ ഒന്ന് മുതൽ യുഎഇയിൽ വൻ മാറ്റങ്ങൾ; എമിറേറ്റ്സ് ഐഡി മുതൽ യാത്രാ-പാസ്‌പോർട്ട് നിയമങ്ങളിൽ വരെ പുതിയ പരിഷ്കാരങ്ങൾ
description: ജൂലൈ ഒന്ന് മുതൽ യുഎഇയിൽ പ്രവാസികളെയും ബിസിനസ്സുകളെയും ബാധിക്കുന്ന നിരവധി മാറ്റങ്ങൾ പ്രാബല്യത്തിൽ വരുന്നു. ഇത്തിഹാദ് റെയിൽ പാസഞ്ചർ സർവീസ്, ഇന്ത്യൻ പാസ്‌പോർട്ട് ഫീസ് വർധന, സ്കൂൾ അവധി, ഷാർജയിലെ പുതിയ പാർക്കിംഗ് നിയമങ്ങൾ, ബിസിനസുകൾക്കുള്ള ഇ-ഇൻവോയ്‌സിംഗ് എന്നിവ ഇതിൽ ഉൾപ്പെടുന്നു.
content: <p>ദുബായ്: യുഎഇയിലെ പ്രവാസികൾക്കും ബിസിനസ്സ് മേഖലയ്ക്കും നിർണായകമായ നിരവധി മാറ്റങ്ങളാണ് ജൂലൈ ഒന്ന് മുതൽ പ്രാബല്യത്തിൽ വരുന്നത്. ഇത്തിഹാദ് റെയിലിന്റെ പാസഞ്ചർ സർവീസ് ആരംഭിക്കുന്നത് മുതൽ സ്കൂൾ വേനലവധി, പാസ്‌പോർട്ട് നിരക്ക് വർധന, ഷാർജയിലെ പാർക്കിംഗ് നിയമങ്ങൾ, ബിസിനസ് നിയമങ്ങളിലെ മാറ്റങ്ങൾ എന്നിങ്ങനെ അഞ്ച് സുപ്രധാന കാര്യങ്ങളാണ് ഈ മാസം മുതൽ മാറാൻ പോകുന്നത്.</p><p><strong>ഇത്തിഹാദ് റെയിൽ</strong></p><p>ഇത്തിഹാദ് റെയിൽ പാസഞ്ചർ സർവീസ് ആരംഭിക്കുന്നു. യുഎഇയുടെ ദേശീയ റെയിൽവേ ശൃംഖലയായ ഇതിഹാദ് റെയിലിന്‍റെ ആദ്യ പാസഞ്ചർ സർവീസ് ജൂൺ 30-ന് പൊതുജനങ്ങൾക്കായി തുറന്നുകൊടുക്കും. ജൂലൈ മാസം മുതൽ യാത്രാ ടിക്കറ്റുകൾ ബുക്ക് ചെയ്ത് ജനങ്ങൾക്ക് ട്രെയിൻ യാത്ര ആരംഭിക്കാം. അബുദാബിയിൽ നിന്ന് ഫുജൈറയിലേക്കാണ് ആദ്യ സർവീസ്.</p><p>ജൂൺ 23-ന് ബുക്കിംഗ് ആരംഭിച്ചതോടെ വൻ തിരക്കാണ് അനുഭവപ്പെട്ടത്. ആദ്യ രണ്ട് ദിവസത്തിനുള്ളിൽ തന്നെ 5,000-ത്തിലധികം യാത്രക്കാർ ടിക്കറ്റുകൾ ബുക്ക് ചെയ്യുകയും ജൂൺ 30-ലെ ആദ്യ മൂന്ന് സർവീസുകളിലെയും മുഴുവൻ സീറ്റുകളും വിറ്റുതീരുകയും ചെയ്തു.</p><p><strong>ട്രെയിൻ സ്റ്റേഷനുകൾ വരുന്ന ടൈംലൈൻ</strong></p><p>2026 സെപ്റ്റംബർ 30: ദുബായ് സ്റ്റേഷനും അൽ ദൈദ് സ്റ്റേഷനും തുറക്കും.</p><p>2026 ഡിസംബർ 30: അൽ ദഫ്ര സ്റ്റേഷനുകൾ തുറക്കും.</p><p>2027 മാർച്ച് 30: ഷാർജ സ്റ്റേഷൻ കൂടി തുറക്കുന്നതോടെ റെയിൽ ശൃംഖല പൂർണ്ണമാകും.</p><p>ഇന്ത്യൻ പാസ്‌പോർട്ട് ഫീസ് 75% കൂടും</p><p><strong>പുതിയ സേവന ദാതാവായി 'അൽഹിന്ദ്'</strong></p><p>യുഎഇയിലെ ഇന്ത്യൻ പ്രവാസികളെ ഏറ്റവും കൂടുതൽ ബാധിക്കുന്ന മാറ്റമാണിത്. ഇന്ത്യൻ വിദേശകാര്യ മന്ത്രാലയത്തിന്റെ പുതിയ വിജ്ഞാപന പ്രകാരം ജൂലൈ 1 മുതൽ ആഗോളതലത്തിൽ പാസ്‌പോർട്ട് നിരക്കുകൾ 75 ശതമാനം വരെ വർദ്ധിക്കും. ദിർഹത്തിലുള്ള പുതുക്കിയ ഫീസ് വിവരങ്ങൾ യുഎഇയിലെ ഇന്ത്യൻ എംബസി ഉടൻ പ്രഖ്യാപിക്കും.</p><p>ഇതോടൊപ്പം ബിഎൽഎസ് വഴിയുള്ള സേവനങ്ങൾ അവസാനിപ്പിച്ച് ജൂലൈ 1 മുതൽ 'ഇന്ത്യൻ കോൺസുലാർ ആപ്ലിക്കേഷൻ സെന്ററുകൾ' എന്ന ഒരൊറ്റ പ്ലാറ്റ്‌ഫോമിന് കീഴിൽ കോൺസുലാർ സേവനങ്ങൾ മാറും. അൽഹിന്ദ് ടൂർസ് ആൻഡ് ട്രാവൽസ് ആണ് ഈ സേവനങ്ങളുടെ പുതിയ ചുമതലക്കാർ.</p><p>പാസ്‌പോർട്ട് പുതുക്കൽ, ഒസിഐ കാർഡുകൾ, വിസ അപേക്ഷകൾ, പിസിസി, ഡോക്യുമെന്റ് അറ്റസ്റ്റേഷൻ എന്നിവയെല്ലാം ഇനി ഒരൊറ്റ കേന്ദ്രത്തിൽ ലഭിക്കും. ഓരോ ഇടപാടിനും 19 ദിർഹം മാത്രമാണ് അൽഹിന്ദ് സർവീസ് ചാർജ് ഈടാക്കുക. വെറും 30 മിനിറ്റിൽ പ്രൊസസിംഗും, അഞ്ച് ദിവസത്തിനകം അപ്പോയിന്റ്മെന്റും ലഭ്യമാക്കുമെന്ന് കമ്പനി വ്യക്തമാക്കുന്നു.</p><p><strong>യുഎഇ സ്കൂളുകളിൽ വേനലവധി ആരംഭിക്കുന്നു</strong></p><p>യുഎഇയിലെ സ്കൂളുകൾ വേനലവധിക്കായി ജൂലൈ 3 വെള്ളിയാഴ്ചയോടെ അടയ്ക്കും. എട്ട് ആഴ്ച നീണ്ടുനിൽക്കുന്ന നീണ്ട അവധിക്കാലമാണ് വിദ്യാർത്ഥികൾക്ക് ലഭിക്കുന്നത്. പ്രവാസികൾ നാട്ടിലേക്ക് മടങ്ങുന്ന വലിയൊരു യാത്രാ സീസണിന് കൂടിയാണ് ഇതോടെ തുടക്കമാകുന്നത്. പുതിയ അധ്യയന വർഷം ആഗസ്റ്റ് 31 തിങ്കളാഴ്ച ആരംഭിക്കും.</p><p><strong>ഷാർജയിൽ പെയ്ഡ് പാർക്കിംഗ് അർധരാത്രി വരെയാക്കി</strong></p><p>ഷാർജയിൽ താമസിക്കുന്നവരും ജോലി ചെയ്യുന്നവരുമായ ആളുകൾക്ക് പ്രധാനപ്പെട്ട മാറ്റം. ജൂലൈ 1 മുതൽ ഷാർജ സിറ്റി മുനിസിപ്പാലിറ്റി പൊതു പാർക്കിംഗ് സമയങ്ങൾ രാത്രി 12 മണി വരെ ദീർഘിപ്പിച്ചു. ഇതോടെ മഞ്ഞ ബോർഡുകളുള്ള പാർക്കിംഗ് ഏരിയകളും ബ്ലൂ ബോർഡ് സോണുകൾക്ക് തുല്യമായി അർധരാത്രി വരെ പെയ്ഡ് പാർക്കിംഗ് ആയി മാറും. ഷാർജ സിറ്റി, കൽബ, ഖോർഫക്കാൻ, അൽ ദൈദ് എന്നിവയുൾപ്പെടെ എല്ലാ മേഖലകൾക്കും ഇത് ബാധകമാണ്. വെള്ളിയാഴ്ചകളിലും പൊതുഅവധി ദിവസങ്ങളിലും പാർക്കിംഗ് സൗജന്യമായിരിക്കും (ആഴ്ചയിൽ 7 ദിവസവും ഫീസ് നിർബന്ധമാക്കിയ പ്രത്യേക സോണുകളിൽ ഒഴികെ).</p><p><strong>ദുബായ് സമ്മർ സർപ്രൈസസ് തുടങ്ങുന്നു</strong></p><p>ഷോപ്പിംഗ് പ്രേമികൾ കാത്തിരിക്കുന്ന 'ദുബായ് സമ്മർ സർപ്രൈസസ്' 29-ാമത് എഡിഷൻ ജൂലൈ 2 മുതൽ ആഗസ്റ്റ് 30 വരെ നടക്കും. "മേക്ക് ഇറ്റ എ ദുബായ് സമ്മർ" എന്ന പ്രമേയത്തിൽ 60 ദിവസമാണ് ഈ മെഗാ മേള നീണ്ടുനിൽക്കുക. വൻ വിലക്കിഴിവുകൾ, സംഗീത പരിപാടികൾ, കുടുംബങ്ങൾക്കായുള്ള വിനോദങ്ങൾ എന്നിവ ഇതിന്റെ ഭാഗമായി ഒരുക്കിയിട്ടുണ്ട്.</p><p><strong>ബിസിനസ്സുകൾക്ക് '-ഇൻവോയ്‌സിംഗ്' നിർബന്ധമാകുന്നു</strong></p><p>യുഎഇയിലെ കോർപ്പറേറ്റ് അല്ലെങ്കിൽ ബിസിനസ്സ് മേഖലയിലുള്ളവർക്ക് ജൂലൈ 1 ഒരു നിർണ്ണായക സമയപരിധിയാണ്. പുതിയ നികുതി വ്യവസ്ഥകളുടെ ഭാഗമായി ബിസിനസ്സുകൾ ഔദ്യോഗികമായി ഒരു 'അക്രെഡിറ്റഡ് സർവീസ് പ്രൊവൈഡറെ' തിരഞ്ഞെടുത്ത് തങ്ങളുടെ ധനകാര്യ സിസ്റ്റങ്ങൾ ഇ-ഇൻവോയ്‌സിംഗ് രീതിയിലേക്ക് മാറ്റേണ്ടതുണ്ട്. ഭാവിയിൽ നികുതി റിപ്പോർട്ടിംഗിൽ തടസ്സങ്ങൾ ഒഴിവാക്കാൻ ഈ മാറ്റം അടിയന്തിരമായി ചെയ്യേണ്ടതാണ്.</p>

title: Iran bow out of World Cup: Late drama ends Team Melli’s knockout dream
description: Austria’s 3-3 draw with Algeria ultimately decides Iran’s fate as Team Melli crash out of the 2026 World Cup.
content: Iran’s ‌hopes of reaching the World Cup knockout phase for the first time came to ⁠an agonising end after Austria’s last-gasp equaliser against Algeria left them outside the tournament’s eight best third-placed teams.Amir Ghalenoei’s side completed their Group G campaign on Friday with a ⁠1-1 draw against Egypt, leaving them waiting to discover on ⁠Saturday whether three points would be enough to earn a spot in the round of 32.Iran had already endured one major setback when a stoppage-time ⁠winner against Egypt was ruled out for offside.Iran’s Shoja Khalilzadeh, left, shows disappointment after his stoppage-time goal was ruled out after a VAR check [Troy Wayrynen/Imagn Images via Reuters]That left them needing other results in group stage matches to go their way, and for a few minutes on Saturday, it looked as if Iran were going to squeeze through when Algeria struck in stoppage time to achieve a 3-2 lead over Austria.However, the Austrians equalised with ‌almost the final kick of the game, salvaging a 3-3 draw that sent both teams through and denied Iran a place in the knockouts in their seventh World Cup appearance.Iran leave the tournament unbeaten after draws with Belgium, New Zealand and Egypt in a challenging campaign due to issues off the pitch.Uncertainty over visas and the US-Israel war on Iran meant the team had to commute from their tournament base in cohosts Mexico for their three group games ⁠in the United States.US authorities required them to enter within 24 hours ⁠of a match and leave the same day although those restrictions were eased slightly for their final game in Seattle, where they were allowed to arrive two days before the game.US President Donald Trump said in March that ⁠Iran were welcome to participate in the World Cup but he did not believe it was appropriate for them to be in the US “for their own life and safety”.After the draw with Egypt, ⁠captain Mehdi Taremi described the situation as a logistical “disaster” and questioned whether his team were truly welcome at the tournament.“Who wants to help us?” Taremi asked reporters. “If they want us to be out, OK, let’s be out. But that’s not fair.”Key ‌members of the delegation were unable to join the squad in the US, and coach Ghalenoei said his team were being “oppressed”.Ultimately, Iran’s campaign came down to moments.Had Taremi scored ‌a ‌first-half penalty against Egypt or had his header hit the net instead of the crossbar later on, Iran might have been looking forward to a knockout match for the first time.Iran’s Ramin Rezaeian and Mehdi Taremi look dejected after their 1-1 draw with Egypt [Carlos Barria/Reuters]

title: 35 డిగ్రీలకే కరుగుతున్న యూకే రోడ్లు
description: UK roads:వేడిగాలుల సమయంలో తారు రోడ్లు కరగడం వెనుక ఉన్న అసలు కారణం పదార్థాల శాస్త్రం అని చెప్పాలి. యూకే వంటి చల్లని దేశాల్లో రోడ్లు తక్కువ...
content:
UK roads:వేడిగాలుల సమయంలో తారు రోడ్లు కరగడం వెనుక ఉన్న అసలు కారణం పదార్థాల శాస్త్రం అని చెప్పాలి. యూకే వంటి చల్లని దేశాల్లో రోడ్లు తక్కువ ఉష్ణోగ్రతలను తట్టుకునేలా మెత్తని బిటుమెన్ వాడతారు. అకస్మాత్తుగా ఉష్ణోగ్రతలు 35 డిగ్రీలకు పెరిగినప్పుడు ఉపరితలంపై వేడి 80 డిగ్రీల వరకు చేరుతుంది. దీనివల్ల రోడ్లు కరగడం లేదా మెత్తబడటం వంటి సమస్యలు ఎదురవుతాయి. భౌగోళిక పరిస్థితులకు అనుగుణంగా రోడ్లను నిర్మించకపోవడమే ఈ పరిస్థితికి ప్రధాన కారణం.



Read also: Canada Visa: భారతీయ ఫుట్‌బాల్ ఫ్యాన్స్‌కు కెనడా బిగ్ షాక్.. భారీగా వీసాలు రిజెక్ట్.. కారణం ఇదే!



Asphalt roads softening in the United Kingdom



భారతదేశంలో రోడ్ల నాణ్యత 



భారతదేశంలో రోడ్ల నిర్వహణపై తరచుగా చర్చలు జరుగుతుంటాయి. మన దేశంలో వేడిని తట్టుకోవడానికి గట్టి బిటుమెన్ మరియు పాలిమర్ వాడతారు. కేవలం ఎండలే కాకుండా భారీ వాహనాల బరువు, అధిక వర్షాలు రోడ్లు పాడవడానికి కారణం అవుతున్నాయి. మౌలిక సదుపాయాల కల్పనలో గతంతో పోలిస్తే గణనీయమైన ప్రగతి కనిపిస్తోంది. రోడ్లు గుంతలుగా మారినప్పుడు కేవలం వాతావరణాన్ని మాత్రమే కాకుండా నిర్మాణంలో వాడే పదార్థాల నాణ్యతను కూడా పరిశీలించాలి.



UK roads:రోడ్ల మన్నిక పెంచే శాస్త్రీయ మార్గాలు



రోడ్లు దెబ్బతినకుండా ఉండాలంటే ఆధునిక సాంకేతికతను అనుసరించడం ఎంతో కీలకం. ప్రపంచవ్యాప్తంగా మారుతున్న వాతావరణ పరిస్థితులకు అనుగుణంగా ఇంజనీరింగ్ ప్రమాణాలు పెరగాలి. నాణ్యమైన తారు మిశ్రమాలను ఉపయోగించడం ద్వారా మాత్రమే రోడ్లు ఎక్కువ కాలం మన్నిక కలిగి ఉంటాయి. రోడ్ల నిర్మాణం బాధ్యతాయుతంగా జరిగినప్పుడే ప్రయాణం సురక్షితంగా ఉంటుంది. వ్యవస్థలో మార్పులు రావాలంటే విమర్శల కంటే శాస్త్రీయ దృక్పథంతో సమస్యను అర్థం చేసుకోవడం చాలా ముఖ్యం.

అమెరికా సరికొత్త పాస్‌పోర్టులపై ప్రెసిడెంట్ ట్రంప్ ఫోటో.. వైరల్ అవుతున్న డిజైన్!

title: ഇത് ഇന്ത്യയിൽ മാത്രമേ സംഭവിക്കൂ; 4 ദിവസം മുമ്പ് മറന്നുവച്ചതാണ്, പക്ഷേ തിരികെ കിട്ടി, അനുഭവം പങ്കുവച്ച് പോളിഷ് യുവതി
description: ഇന്ത്യയിൽ താമസിക്കുന്ന ഡോമിനിക എന്ന പോളിഷ് യുവതി ഷെയര്‍ ചെയ്ത അനുഭവം ശ്രദ്ധേയമാകുന്നു. ഒരു മെഡിക്കൽ ഷോപ്പിൽ മറന്നുവെച്ച മരുന്നുകൾ നാല് ദിവസത്തിന് ശേഷം തിരികെ ലഭിച്ച ഹൃദയസ്പർശിയായ അനുഭവമാണ് ഡോമിനിക പറയുന്നത്.
content: <p>ഇന്ത്യയിൽ താമസിക്കുന്ന ഡോമിനിക പടാലസ് കൽറ എന്ന പോളിഷ് യുവതിയുടെ ഹൃദ്യമായ അനുഭവമാണ് ഇപ്പോൾ സോഷ്യൽ മീഡിയയിൽ വൈറലായി മാറുന്നത്. താൻ മെഡിക്കൽ ഷോപ്പിൽ മറന്നുവെച്ച മരുന്നുകൾ നാല് ദിവസത്തിന് ശേഷവും അവിടെ സുരക്ഷിതമായി സൂക്ഷിച്ചുവെച്ചതിന്റെ ഹൃദയസ്പർശിയായ അനുഭവമാണ് ഡോമിനിക്ക പങ്കുവെച്ചിരിക്കുന്നത്. ഈ സംഭവം തന്നെ സന്തോഷിപ്പിച്ചതായും അതിശയിപ്പിച്ചതായും ഡോമിനിക ഇൻസ്റ്റാഗ്രാമിൽ ഷെയർ ചെയ്ത വീഡിയോയിൽ പറയുന്നു.</p><p>ഒരു മെഡിക്കൽ ഷോപ്പിൽ നിന്ന് മരുന്നുകൾ വാങ്ങിയെങ്കിലും അത് ബാഗിൽ വെക്കാൻ താൻ മറന്നുപോയതായി ഡോമിനിക പറയുന്നു. നാല് ദിവസത്തിന് ശേഷമാണ് അവർ കടയിലേക്ക് തിരിച്ചെത്തിയത്. '4 ദിവസങ്ങൾക്ക് മുമ്പ് ഞാൻ ഒരു കെമിസ്റ്റിൽ നിന്ന് കുറച്ച് മരുന്നുകൾ വാങ്ങി, പക്ഷേ അത് ബാഗിൽ വെക്കാൻ മറന്ന് അവിടെത്തന്നെ വച്ചു. 4 ദിവസത്തിന് ശേഷം അവ ഇപ്പോഴും അവിടെയുണ്ടോ എന്ന് നോക്കാനായി ഞാൻ പോവുകയാണ്. ഇത് അവരുടെ തെറ്റല്ല, ഞങ്ങളാണത് എടുക്കാൻ മറന്നത്. അതിനാൽ അവ അവിടെയുണ്ടോ എന്ന് നോക്കാം' വീഡിയോയിൽ ഡോമിനിക്ക പറയുന്നത് കേൾക്കാം.</p><p>തുടർന്ന് അവർ കടയിൽ കയറി മരുന്നുകളെക്കുറിച്ച് ചോദിക്കുന്നത് വീഡിയോയിൽ കാണാം. 'നിങ്ങൾ പാക്ക് ചെയ്ത ഒരു പേപ്പർ ബാഗ്...' എന്ന് അവർ ചോദിച്ചപ്പോൾ തന്നെ, 'അതെ, അതെ, അതെ' എന്ന് കടയുടമ മറുപടി നൽകി. പിന്നാലെ പാക്കറ്റ് അവർക്ക് നൽകി. പാക്കറ്റ് ലഭിച്ച ശേഷം അവർ നന്ദി പറഞ്ഞ് അതീവ സന്തോഷത്തോടെ കടയിൽ നിന്ന് ഇറങ്ങുന്നതും കാണാം.</p><p>കടയ്ക്ക് പുറത്തിറങ്ങിയ ഡോമിനിക, മരുന്നുകൾ തനിക്കായി സുരക്ഷിതമായി സൂക്ഷിച്ചുവെച്ചതിൽ താൻ അത്ഭുതപ്പെട്ടതായി പറഞ്ഞു. 'എനിക്ക് എന്റെ മരുന്നുകൾ കിട്ടി. 4 ദിവസമായി അവ അവിടെ എനിക്കായി കാത്തിരിക്കുകയായിരുന്നു. ഇത് എന്നെ സംബന്ധിച്ച് വളരെ ഞെട്ടിക്കുന്നതാണ്. ഇന്ത്യ വളരെ വലിയൊരു രാജ്യമാണ്, ഇത്രയധികം ജനസംഖ്യയുമുണ്ട്, എന്നിട്ടും 4 ദിവസത്തിന് ശേഷം ഞാൻ അവിടെ ചെന്നപ്പോൾ ഇവ അവിടെ കാത്തിരിപ്പുണ്ടായിരുന്നു, വാവ്' അവർ പറഞ്ഞു.</p><p>&nbsp;</p>&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;View this post on Instagram&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;<p>A post shared by Dominika Patalas-Kalra (@domipatalas)</p><p>&nbsp;</p><p></p><p>'ഇതിനാലാണ് ഞാൻ ഇന്ത്യയെ സ്നേഹിക്കുന്നത്. ഞാൻ കുറച്ച് മരുന്നുകൾ വാങ്ങി, അത് ബാഗിൽ വെക്കാൻ മറന്ന് അവിടെ തന്നെ വച്ചിട്ട് പോന്നു. ഞാൻ നഗരത്തിൽ ഇല്ലാതിരുന്നതിനാൽ 4 ദിവസത്തിന് ശേഷമാണ് അത് വാങ്ങാൻ പോയത്, ഇത് സംഭവിക്കുമെന്ന് ഞാൻ ശരിക്കും പ്രതീക്ഷിച്ചില്ല. എന്റെ മരുന്നുകൾ ഒരു വശത്ത് മാറ്റിവെച്ച് എനിക്കായി കാത്തിരിക്കുകയായിരുന്നു അവർ. ഇത്രയും വലിയ ജനസംഖ്യയുള്ള ഇന്ത്യയെപ്പോലൊരു വലിയ രാജ്യത്ത് ഇപ്പോഴും ഇത്തരം കാര്യങ്ങൾ സംഭവിക്കുന്നു എന്നതിൽ ഞാൻ അത്ഭുതപ്പെടുന്നു' എന്ന ക്യാപ്ഷനോടെയാണ് അവർ വീഡിയോ പങ്കുവെച്ചത്.</p><p>നിരവധിപ്പേരാണ് പോസ്റ്റിന് കമന്റുകൾ നൽകിയത്. ഇത് ഇന്ത്യയിൽ മാത്രമേ സംഭവിക്കൂ എന്നാണ് പലരും അഭിപ്രായപ്പെട്ടത്.</p>

title: MEA Warns Kailash Mansarovar Pilgrims: Don't Travel Without These Mandatory China Documents
description: The MEA has urged Kailash Mansarovar pilgrims to secure all mandatory Chinese travel documents before departure after dozens of Indian travellers were stranded, highlighting the importance of careful planning for the sacred journey.
content: The spiritual journey to Kailash Mansarovar is a dream for thousands of devotees every year. Revered by Hindus, Buddhists, Jains and followers of Bon, the pilgrimage is considered one of the world's most sacred and physically demanding journeys. But before setting out for the high-altitude trek, India's Ministry of External Affairs (MEA) has issued an important reminder: make sure your travel documents are complete.The advisory comes after 52 Indian pilgrims travelling through Nepal were left stranded because they did not possess the mandatory permits required to enter China's Tibet Autonomous Region. According to the MEA, several travellers had begun their journey assuming that their passport and Chinese visa would be enough. However, access to Kailash Mansarovar through Nepal requires additional travel authorisations issued by Chinese authorities.The government has urged pilgrims to verify all documents before leaving India to avoid delays, financial losses or disruptions to their pilgrimage. Travellers have also been advised to book only through authorised tour operators familiar with the latest cross-border requirements.Which Documents Are Mandatory?If you are travelling to Kailash Mansarovar via Nepal, carrying a valid passport alone is not sufficient. Pilgrims must also have:A valid Chinese visa.The necessary Tibet Travel Permit.Any additional group travel permits or entry approvals required by Chinese authorities for foreign visitors entering Tibet through Nepal.  These permits are generally arranged by authorised tour operators in coordination with their counterparts in Nepal and China. Independent applications are usually not permitted, making it crucial to choose a reliable operator and confirm that every approval has been secured before travelling.Why This Matters?Unlike many international trips where visa formalities end before departure, the Kailash Mansarovar Yatra involves crossing into a highly regulated region. Entry into Tibet is subject to strict controls, and authorities may deny access even if one required permit is missing.The recent incident involving the stranded pilgrims serves as a reminder that overlooking paperwork can derail months of planning. Apart from emotional disappointment, travellers may face unexpected accommodation costs, transportation expenses and prolonged waits while documentation issues are resolved.Planning Your PilgrimageWhether you are undertaking the pilgrimage through the official government route or via Nepal, preparation goes beyond booking flights and packing warm clothing. Experts recommend confirming document requirements with your tour operator well in advance, checking passport validity, keeping multiple copies of important papers and purchasing comprehensive travel insurance that covers high-altitude travel.  It is equally important to prepare physically. Kailash Mansarovar sits at elevations exceeding 4,500 metres, where oxygen levels are significantly lower than at sea level. Pilgrims are encouraged to undergo medical check-ups, acclimatise properly and follow all health and safety guidelines during the journey.For many, the Kailash Mansarovar Yatra is a once-in-a-lifetime spiritual experience. Ensuring every required permit is in place before departure can help keep the focus where it belongs—on the journey itself, rather than unexpected obstacles at the border.

title: Rohit Shetty Gets Fresh Death Threats; Alleged Audio Clip Warns Of Deadly Attack
description: Filmmaker Rohit Shetty has reportedly received a fresh death threat through an alleged audio clip demanding Rs 20 crore. Mumbai Crime Branch has launched an investigation and sent the clip for forensic examination.
content: Ahead of Khatron Ke Khiladi 15, filmmaker Rohit Shetty has reportedly received fresh death threats after an alleged audio clip demanding Rs 20 crore in extortion surfaced. The development has once again raised concerns over the filmmaker's security, months after a firing incident outside his Juhu residence. According to police, the audio clip was received by Shetty's staff and is suspected to have been sent by individuals linked to the Lawrence Bishnoi gang. Mumbai Crime Branch has begun investigating the case and sent the clip for forensic analysis to verify its authenticity. Rohit Shetty receives Rs 20 crore extortion threatIANS reported that Rohit Shetty  has received a fresh extortion threat through an alleged audio clip demanding Rs 20 crore. The clip, allegedly sent by the Lawrence Bishnoi gang, warns that the earlier firing outside his Juhu residence was only a "trailer" and threatens a direct attack if the money is not paid. “Rohit Shetty’s staff told us they had received the audio clip containing the threat,” said a police officer from the Mumbai Crime branch. Juhu Police have registered a case and sent the audio clip for forensic examination after suspecting the voice in it belongs to Shubham Lonkar.    Firing incident outside Rohit Shetty' residence On February 1, 2026, five bullets were fired outside Rohit Shetty's residence near Hasya Kalakar Mehmood Chowk in Juhu shortly after midnight. The Lawrence Bishnoi gang had claimed responsibility for the incident. Police later arrested the alleged shooter, Deepak Sharma, in Agra while he was on the run. Khatron Ke Khiladi 15Meanwhile, Rohit Shetty is all set to return as the host of Khatron Ke Khiladi 15 after a two-year break, promising the most challenging season in the show's history. Filmed in Cape Town, South Africa, the upcoming edition introduces a revamped format that brings together returning contestants and first-time participants.            View this post on Instagram            A post shared by ColorsTV (@colorstv) The season, themed 'Darr Ka Naya Daur', features high-risk stunts performed atop skyscrapers, inside cages, and alongside snakes and insects. Sharing an update after the shoot, Shetty described the experience as "hectic, tiring, and physically challenging," adding that viewers can expect a never-before-seen season filled with surprises. The contestant lineup includes Gaurav Khanna, Rubina Dilaik, Avinash Mishra, Orry, Karan Wahi, Rithvik Dhanjani, Jasmin Bhasin, Vishal Aditya Singh, Harsh Gujral, Avika Gor, Shagun Sharma, and Farrhana Bhatt. Khatron Ke Khiladi 15 will premiere on July 25 on Colors TV and will also stream on JioHotstar.

title: China Brings GLM-5.2, Another Mythos-Like AI Model With In A Week, To Take On Anthropic
description: China's GLM-5.2 AI challenges Anthropic's Mythos with advanced cybersecurity capabilities, signalling a shrinking gap between Chinese and US AI technology.
content: Modern warfare is now governed by artificial intelligence tools. Countries are rushing to make their own powerful AI models. To compete with Anthropic’s Mythos, China has launched another advanced AI model, GLM-5.2, which has demonstrated strong performance in finding software security flaws, as per the Wall Street Journal.GLM-5.2 Shows Strong Cybersecurity SkillsAs per WSJ, China’s AI company Zhipu has released its GLM-5.2 model. It can identify software flaws at a level comparable to some of the latest AI tools developed in the US. Reportedly, this AI model can perform particularly well in cybersecurity-related tasks, making it useful for discovering vulnerabilities before hackers can exploit them. Unlike advanced AI models from OpenAI and Anthropic, GLM-5.2 is reportedly an open-weight model. This means that developers can download, modify and run it on their own hardware without depending on the original company.Moreover, the model has also gained popularity among developers and has ranked among the most-used AI models on OpenRouter. Some benchmarks tests also reportedly even showed GLM-5.2 outerperforming Anthropic’s Claude Opus 4.8 in certain bug-finding tasks. It is noteworthy that China’s AI progress comes at a time when the US initially imposed a ban on Anthropic’s Claude AI model for the foreign nationals and now allowed it to be used by a select group of organisations. This shows how the two countries are constantly competing with each other to build a better AI model that can find critical software flaws on its own. Meanwhile, OpenAI has also limited access to its latest GPT-5.6 model while the US government reviews new security rules for advanced AI tools. Earlier this week, Chinese cybersecurity company 360 Security Technology released its own software flaw detection AI model called Tulongfeng. This is another powerful tool which has the Mythos-class capabilities. China making its own Mythos-class AI models suggest that the technological gap between Chinese and American AI companies is shrinking faster than expected. As Chinese models become more capable and widely available, governments may face decisions on balancing innovation, national security and global competitiveness. The growing availability of powerful open-weight AI models could also make advanced defensive tools more accessible while increasing the risk that sophisticated cyber capabilities fall into the hands of malicious actors.

title: ‘Oh Madam, **** Kya?’ Mumbai Delivery Guy Harasses Woman, Sends Sexually Explicit Voicemails
description: A Mumbai woman was left harassed and fearing for her “safety” after a logistics delivery partner allegedly sent her sexually explicit and abusive voicemails. Here’s the entire matter…
content: In a highly disturbing incident, a Mumbai woman was left fearing for her safety after allegedly being harassed by a logistics company’s delivery partner. The incident unfolded on June 16, which is when the delivery guy had tried to call her. Allegedly, due to being unavailable at the time, the woman could not attend the call. However, the voicemail that she later heard was nothing but a nightmare that left her “terrified” and fearing for her “safety”. “EMERGENCY!! I have something extremely serious to report regarding a Shadowfax delivery partner.”“On the 16th of this month, I was not at home when the delivery agent called me. I couldn’t answer the call, and it got diverted to my voicemail. Today, when I listened to that voicemail, I was shocked and terrified by what I heard,” the post read.Allegedly, not only did the man send a sexually explicit audio message to the woman, but he also abused her. “The delivery agent said: Madam, aapki awaaz sunkar toh humara k**** ho gaya hai. Oh, madam, d*** kya? Oh b*****, oh *****. These are the exact words he used,” the post read.Left shaken by the incident, the woman took to her social media handle. Recalling everything, the woman sought the logistics company’s and the Mumbai Police’s help.The post immediately went viral, pulling in many reactions. Most demanded strict action against the man, while others recalled their own similar instances.Check out the viral post:“I need your support. @mumbaipolice @shadowfax.in. I have shared a very disturbing incident involving a delivery partner who left sexually explicit and abusive messages on my voicemail and has access to my home address. As a woman, this has left me feeling extremely unsafe. Please help me amplify this matter by tagging and mentioning Mumbai Police and Shadowfax in the comments so that this issue gets the attention it deserves and strict action is taken. No woman should have to fear for her safety because of a delivery,” the post’s caption read. The post was shared on Instagram, by the handle ‘Nisha Balkrishna’. The post was shared yesterday and pulled many views from people.        View this post on Instagram            A post shared by Nisha (@nisha.balkrishna)

title: Connor Zilisch falls short to Shane van Gisbergen at Sonoma in 2026
description: Connor Zilisch has fallen short to Shane van Gisbergen in the NASCAR O'Reilly Series race at Sonoma Raceway in 2026.
content: Connor Zilisch was aiming to win his second straight NASCAR O'Reilly Series race at Sonoma Raceway, but it wasn't meant to be on Saturday. Shane van Gisbergen won the O'Reilly Series race at Sonoma after flipping Stage 2. Zilisch and the No. 1 team decided to run out Stage 2, coming down pit road for tires and fuel.Zilisch hoped that he would be able to catch van Gisbergen with fresher tires and more gas, but the No. 9 car never wavered. Van Gisbergen is arguably the best road course driver in NASCAR history, and his ability to run in the lead and save fuel was on full display at Sonoma.In 2025, Zilisch was able to hold off van Gisbergen on the final lap, but there wasn't any drama on Saturday. Van Gisbergen drove into the sunset in Wine Country, earning a much-needed win after San Diego last weekend. Zilisch has dropped a race to van Gisbergen, and he hopes to earn it back on Sunday.More: How to watch NASCAR live at Sonoma in June 2026, full scheduleThis article originally appeared on Motorsports Wire: Connor Zilisch falls short to Shane van Gisbergen at Sonoma in 2026

title: Juventus hold exploratory talks for Soule’s return
description: Matias Soulé is among the candidates to leave Roma in the coming days and be sacrificed on the altar of capital gains. The Argentine winger isn’t pushing to leave; on the contrary, he’s stalling....
content: Juventus hold exploratory talks for Soule’s returnMatias Soulé is among the candidates to leave Roma in the coming days and be sacrificed on the altar of capital gains. The Argentine winger isn’t pushing to leave; on the contrary, he’s stalling. Those close to the 2003-born player have recently expressed disappointment at the situation. Soulé arrived in the capital with the prospect of replacing Dybala. He was a key figure until mid-season, but was then hampered by groin pain, which he also played over, and has now been kicked out. Now, the former Frosinone player could return to Juventus, the club from which Roma acquired him for €25.6 million plus bonuses.Juventus is looking for players to raise the level of their attack. The Bianconeri club is working to sign Kolo Muani, but as La Gazzetta dello Sport reports, they are also considering the return of Matias Soulé. The Argentine winger’s relationship with Roma now appears to be over, and the player doesn’t want to go to Saudi Arabia. Contacts for the former Frosinone player have been rekindled in recent days regarding a second stint at Continassa. Juventus is seeking creativity and has Soulé on its radar. The deal could be a long-term one, likely to materialize after June 30th.

title: CBSE 10th Result 2026 Live Updates: Class 10 Scorecard Link Shortly; Board to Release Pass Percentage and Toppers
description: CBSE 10th Result 2026 Live Updates: The Central Board of Secondary Education (CBSE) is expected to announce the Class 10 Second Board Examination Results 2026 shortly. While the board has not officially confirmed the date and time of the declaration, students who appeared for the improvement examination are advised to keep checking the official CBSE result portals for the latest updates.The second board examination was introduced as part of CBSE's new two-exam system for Class 10, giving students an opportunity to improve their performance after the main board examination. Once declared, students will be able to access their revised scorecards online using their login credentials.CBSE will make the provisional digital marksheet available through its official websites as well as DigiLocker and the UMANG app. Students are advised to verify all details on the marksheet, including their name, roll number, subject-wise marks, grades and qualifying status. The original marksheet will be issued separately by the board through schools.How to Download the CBSE Class 10 Second Board MarksheetVisit the official CBSE result portal.Click on the CBSE Class 10 Second Board Result 2026 link.Enter your Roll Number, School Number, Admit Card ID, and other required credentials.Click Submit.Your result and provisional marksheet will appear on the screen.Download and save the marksheet for future reference. Students can also access their digital marksheet through DigiLocker and the UMANG app.

title: नागपुर में युवक कांग्रेस का हल्ला बोल, सरकार के कार्यकाल में व्यवस्था बन चुका है पेपर लीक
description: Nagpur Protest TET Exam: नीट और टेट पेपर लीक के विरोध में युवक कांग्रेस ने नागपुर में मशाल मार्च निकाला। शिक्षा मंत्रियों के इस्तीफे, दोषियों पर कार्रवाई और सख्त कानून बनाने की मांग उठाई।
content:
Nagpur Protest Youth Congress: नीट और टेट परीक्षा के पेपर लीक मामले को लेकर नागपुर शहर युवक कांग्रेस ने बेरायटी चौक से झांसी रानी चौक तक मशाल मार्च निकालकर केंद्र और राज्य सरकार के खिलाफ जोरदार प्रदर्शन किया। इस दौरान केंद्रीय शिक्षा मंत्री धर्मेंद्र प्रधान और महाराष्ट्र के शालेय शिक्षा मंत्री दादा भुसे के इस्तीफे की मांग की गई।
युकां का आरोप- पेपर लीक पर लगे सख्त कानून
युकां उपाध्यक्ष कपिल ढोके सहित युकां पदाधिकारियों ने आरोप लगाया कि वर्तमान सरकार के कार्यकाल में पेपर लीक एक नई व्यवस्था बन गई है। उन्होंने कहा कि छात्रों के भविष्य के साथ खिलवाड़ करने वालों के खिलाफ कड़ी कार्रवाई की जाए। साथ ही पेपर लीक के आरोपियों को मिलने वाला राजनीतिक संरक्षण तत्काल समाप्त करने तथा पेपर लीक रोकने के लिए कठोर कानून बनाने की मांग की गई।
यह भी पढ़ें:-नागपुर में फसल ऋण पर मीटिंग: मंत्री बावनकुले ने बैंकों की ढिलाई पर जताई नाराजगी; सांसद व कलेक्टर रहे मौजूद
केंद्र व राज्य के मंत्री दें इस्तीफा नहीं तो आंदोलन
आंदोलनकारीयों ने चेतावनी दी गई कि जब तक शिक्षा मंत्री धर्मेंद्र प्रधान और महाराष्ट्र के मंत्री दादा भुसे इस्तीफा नहीं देते, तब तक आंदोलन और अधिक तीव्रता से जारी रहेगा। आंदोलन में अनुराग भोयर, रितेश पांडव, अभिषेक धवड़, अक्षय हेटे, भूषण मरस्कोल्हे, आकाश गुजर, रौनक चौधरी, सागर चव्हाण, सुशांत लोखंडे, कौस्तुभ शिर्के, हेमंत कातुरे, मेहुल अडवाणी, नयन तरवटकर, फजलूर कुरैशी, अजहर शेख, अभिषेक राऊत, राज संतापे, ऋषभ धुले, आयुष राऊत, अनिकेत हार्डे, अफजल खान सहित बड़ी संख्या में कार्यकर्ता शामिल हुए।

title: Running full every day; Kerala's 2 Vande Bharat trains top Southern Railway's 100% occupancy list
Ahilyanagar Rainfall : जूनच्या पावसात ६० टक्क्यांपेक्षा अधिक तूट; पेरण्या रखडल्या
description: अहिल्यानगर (प्रतिनिधी) जिल्ह्यात यंदा मान्सून लांबल्याचा मोठा फटका खरीप हंगामाला बसताना दिसत आहे. जून महिना संपत आला तरी जिल्ह्यात केवळ ४६.८ मिलीमीटर पावसाची नोंद झाल्याने खरिपाच्या पेरण्या पूर्णपणे रखडल्या आहेत. अहिल्यानगर जिल्ह्यात जून महिन्याची सरासरी १०८ मि.मी. असते; मात्र यंदा प्रत्यक्षात अवघा ४३.३ टक्के सरासरीच्या तुलनेत टक्क्यांहून ६५ अधिक घट पाऊस झाला आहे. अद्याप सर्वदूर […]
content:
अहिल्यानगर (प्रतिनिधी)



जिल्ह्यात यंदा मान्सून लांबल्याचा मोठा फटका खरीप हंगामाला बसताना दिसत आहे. जून महिना संपत आला तरी जिल्ह्यात केवळ ४६.८ मिलीमीटर पावसाची नोंद झाल्याने खरिपाच्या पेरण्या पूर्णपणे रखडल्या आहेत. अहिल्यानगर जिल्ह्यात जून महिन्याची सरासरी १०८ मि.मी. असते; मात्र यंदा प्रत्यक्षात अवघा ४३.३ टक्के सरासरीच्या तुलनेत टक्क्यांहून ६५ अधिक घट पाऊस झाला आहे. अद्याप सर्वदूर दमदार पाऊस झालेला नसल्याने शेतकऱ्यांसह कृषी विभाग आशेने आभाळाकडे डोळे लावून बसला आहे.



गेल्या ११ वर्षांतील जून महिन्यातील हा सर्वात कमी पाऊस ठरला आहे. जिल्ह्यात साधारणपणे जूनच्या पहिल्या आठवड्यात मान्सून सक्रिय होतो. यंदा मात्र महिना संपत आला तरी सर्वदूर पाऊस न झाल्याने जमिनीत आवश्यक ओल निर्माण झालेली नाही. परिणामी, बहुतांश शेतक-यांनी पेरण्या थांबवून दमदार पावसाची प्रतीक्षा सुरू केली आहे. गेल्या वर्षी परिस्थिती याच्या नेमकी उलट होती. मे महिन्यात झालेल्या अवकाळी पावसामुळे जमिनीत पुरेशी ओल होती. त्यामुळे गेल्या वर्षी २६ जूनअखेर सुमारे तीन लाख हेक्टरवर खरिपाच्या पेरण्या पूर्ण झाल्या होत्या, बंदा मात्र स्थिती अत्यंत नाजूक असून, पाऊस आणखी लांबल्यास खरिपाचे गणित कोलमडण्याची भीती आहे.



जिल्ह्यात खरीप हंगामासाती ६ लाख ७४ हजार ४६१ हेक्टर पेरणीयोग्य क्षेत्र आहे. त्यापैकी आतापर्यंत केवळ २० हजार हेक्टरवर (सुमारे ३ ते ४ टक्के) क्षेत्रावर पेरणी झाली आहे. शुक्रवारी नेवासा तालुक्यात काही ठिकाणी दमदार पाऊस झाला असून, तिथे वाफ्ता (पेरणीयोग्य ओल) होलाच मशागत व पेरण्या सुरू होण्याची शक्यता आहे. मात्र, जोपर्यंत जमिनीत पुरेशी ओल होत नाही, तोपर्यंत शेतकयांनी घाईघाईने पेरण्या करू नयेत, असे आवाहन कृषी विभागाने केले आहे.



जिल्ह्यात सर्वात कमी पाऊस राहुरी तालुक्यात अभ्या ७.५ टक्के नोंदगला गेला आहे. तर सर्वाधिक पाउन्स कर्जत तालुक्यात ११२.६ टके झाला आहे. जर जिल्ह्या तील अकोले, राहाता, संगमनेर, कोपरगाव, श्रीरामपूर या तालुक्यांमध्ये पाऊस अत्यंत कमी आहे. नगर ५.३ टके, पारनेर ३८ टक्के, श्रीगोंदा ६३ टक्के, कर्जल ११२. ८ टके, जामखेड २६ टके, शेवगाव ५६ टक्के, पाथर्डी ५६ टके, नेव ासा ७१ टक्के, राहुरी ७.५ टके, अकोले १०.९ टक्के, संगमनेर १६ टक्के, कोपरगाव १८ टक्के, श्रीरामपूर २२ टक्के, राहता १२ टक्के असा एकूण ४८.८ टक्के पाऊस झालेला आहे.
