title: Road Accident Report : मृत्यूचा ‘स्पीड’ वाढला, सुरक्षेचा ‘ब्रेकफेल’; महाराष्ट्रासह नाशिकच्या सुरक्षेचे धिंडवडे
description: नाशिक | प्रतिनिधी | Nashik नाशिक शहर आणि जिल्ह्यातून (Nashik City and District) जाणाऱ्या राष्ट्रीय आणि राज्य महामार्गांवरून प्रवास करताना हेल्मेट किंवा सीटबेल्ट वापरत नसाल, तर तुम्ही थेट मृत्यूला आमंत्रण देत आहात. ‘ब्लूमबर्ग फिलान्थ्रोपीज’ आणि ‘जॉन्स हॉपकिन्स इंटरनॅशनल इंज्युरी रिसर्च युनिट’ने महाराष्ट्र हायवे पोलीस आणि स्थानिक प्रशासनाच्या विद्यमाने जाहीर केलेल्या ‘रोड सेफ्टी स्टेटस समरी २०२५’ […]
content:
नाशिक | प्रतिनिधी | Nashik



नाशिक शहर आणि जिल्ह्यातून (Nashik City and District) जाणाऱ्या राष्ट्रीय आणि राज्य महामार्गांवरून प्रवास करताना हेल्मेट किंवा सीटबेल्ट वापरत नसाल, तर तुम्ही थेट मृत्यूला आमंत्रण देत आहात. ‘ब्लूमबर्ग फिलान्थ्रोपीज’ आणि ‘जॉन्स हॉपकिन्स इंटरनॅशनल इंज्युरी रिसर्च युनिट’ने महाराष्ट्र हायवे पोलीस आणि स्थानिक प्रशासनाच्या विद्यमाने जाहीर केलेल्या ‘रोड सेफ्टी स्टेटस समरी २०२५’ या अहवालात राज्यातील रस्ते सुरक्षेचे भीषण वास्तव समोर आले आहे. यामध्ये राज्यातील अपघाती मृत्यूंची (Accident Death) संख्या तब्बल १५ हजार २२४ वर पोहोचली असून, त्यात सर्वाधिक बळी हे दुचाकीस्वार, पायदळ चालणारे आणि सायकलस्वारांचे (एकूण ७१ टक्के) जात असल्याचे स्पष्ट झाले आहे.



नाशिक महानगरपालिका क्षेत्र, मुंबई-आग्रा राष्ट्रीय महामार्ग (Mumbai-Agra National Highway) आणि जिल्ह्यातील (District) राज्य महामार्गावरून धावणाऱ्या वाहनांच्या वेगावर आणि बेशिस्तीवर या अहवालाने थेट बोट ठेवले आहे. निरीक्षणाखाली आलेल्या वाहनांचा सरासरी वेग ५६ किमी/तास इतका जास्त आढळून आला आहे. वेग मर्यादचे उल्लंघन करणाऱ्यांमध्ये प्रामुख्याने सेडान कार (२५ टक्के), एसयूव्ही (२१ टक्के) आणि दुचाकी (१६ टक्के) आघाडीवर आहेत. तर, एक्स्प्रेस वे (७ टक्के) च्या तुलनेत राज्य महामार्गावर २१ टक्के आणि राष्ट्रीय महामार्गांवर १५ टक्के वाहनेअतिवेगाने धावताना आढळली.



नाशिकमधून (Nashik) जाणारे महामार्ग याच श्रेणीत येत असल्याने स्थानिक वाहनचालक किती धोक्यात आहेत, हे यावरून स्पष्ट होते. योग्य पद्धतीने हेल्मेट वापरणाऱ्या चालकांचे प्रमाण केवळ १९ टक्केच आहे. तर दुचाकीच्या मागे बसणाऱ्या प्रवाशांमध्ये (पिलियन रायडर) हेल्मेट वापरण्याचे प्रमाण फक्त ४ टक्के म्हणजेच जवळपास शून्य आहे. तसेच, चारचाकी वाहनांमध्ये फक्त ३१ टक्के लोकांनी सीट बेल्ट लावल्याचे आढळले. धक्कादायक बाब म्हणजे, १२ वर्षांखालील लहान मुलांसाठी ‘चाईल्ड रिस्ट्रॅट’ (सुरक्षा सीट /बेल्ट) चा वापर शून्य शून्य आढळला आहे. तर ओला-उबरसारख्या राईड शेअरिंग वाहनांमध्ये वेग मर्यादेचे उल्लंघन करण्याचे प्रमाण सर्वाधिक २३ टक्के आहे.



मृत्यूचा वाढता आलेख (महाराष्ट्राची स्थिती)



अहवालानुसार, २०२० मध्ये रस्ते अपघातातील मृत्यूंची संख्या ११,५६९ वर खाली आली होती, मात्र त्यानंतर ती सातत्याने वाढून २०२२ पर्यंत १५,२२४ वर जाऊन पोहोचली आहे.



‘ब्लूमबर्ग’ चा थेट इशारा!



या अहवालात नाशिक महानगरपालिका, जिल्हा व शहर पोलीस आणि हायवे पोलिसांना थेट उपाययोजना करण्याचे निर्देश व शिफारसी देण्यात आल्या आहेत.



मुद्दे




– मॅन्युअल आणि ई-चलन सक्तीः केवळ कॅमेऱ्यावर विसंबून न राहता, अतिवेगाच्या कॉरिडॉरवर पोलिसांनी थेट मॅन्युअल कारवाई सुरू करावी आणि ई-चलन प्रणालीतील त्रुटी सुधारून दंड वसुली करावी.



– स्पीड ब्रेकर आणि साईन बोर्ड्स: नाशिक मनपा आणि एमएसआरडीसीने अंतर्गत मुख्य रस्ते तसेच महामार्गावर गतिरोधक, रंबल स्ट्रिप्स आणि मलो-स्पीड झोनफचे साईन बोर्ड तातडीने लावणे गरजेचे आहे.



– ‘हेल्मेट क्लास्प’वर कारवाई: मोटार वाहन कायदा कलम १२९ (बी) नुसार केवळ हेल्मेट डोक्यावर ठेवणे पुरेसे नाही, तर हेल्मेटची पट्टी लॉक केली आहे की नाही, यावर कडक मोहीम राबवावी.




रस्ते वापरकर्ते – मृत्यूचे प्रमाण (टक्के)



दुचाकीस्वार       –   ५१%चारचाकी प्रवासी –  २४%पायी चालणारे    –   १९%इतर              –  ५ %सायकलस्वार     –    १%

title: Indian Ship: ବୋମା ମାଡ଼ ମଧ୍ୟରେ ହର୍ମୁଜ୍ ଅତିକ୍ରମ କଲା ଭାରତୀୟ ଜାହାଜ
description:
ନୂଆଦିଲ୍ଲୀ: ହର୍ମୁଜ୍ ପ୍ରଣାଳୀରେ ବଢୁଥିବା ଉତ୍ତେଜନା ଏବଂ ବାଣିଜ୍ୟ ଜାହାଜ ଉପରେ ଆକ୍ରମଣ ମଧ୍ୟରେ, ଭାରତୀୟ ଚାଷୀଙ୍କ ପାଇଁ ଆଶ୍ୱସ୍ତିର ଖବର ଆସିଛି। ଇରାନ ଦ୍ୱାରା ପ୍ରଦାନ କରାଯାଇଥିବା ନିର୍ଦ୍ଦିଷ୍ଟ ସମୁଦ୍ରିକ ପଥ ଦେଇ ଶନିବାର ଭାରତୀୟ ପତାକା ଥିବା ମାଲବାହୀ ଜାହାଜ ‘ଏପିଜେ ପ୍ରୀତି-୨’ ସୁରକ୍ଷିତ ଭାବରେ ହର୍ମୁଜ୍ ପ୍ରଣାଳୀ ପାର କରିଥିଲା। ସେହି ଅଞ୍ଚଳରେ କିଛି ଘଣ୍ଟା ପୂର୍ବରୁ ଏକ ତୈଳ ଟ୍ୟାଙ୍କର ଉପରେ ଆକ୍ରମଣ ହୋଇଥିଲା। ଇରାନ ଆକ୍ରମଣ ପରେ, ଆମେରିକା ମଧ୍ୟ ଇରାନର ସାମରିକ ଘାଟି ଉପରେ ଆକ୍ରମଣ କରିଥିଲା। ତେବେ ଏବେ ମଧ୍ୟ ପାରସ୍ୟ ଉପସାଗରରେ ୧୫ଟି ଭାରତୀୟ ଜାହାଜ ଫସି ରହିଛନ୍ତି।
କର୍ମଚାରୀ ସୁରକ୍ଷିତ
ଶନିବାର ଦିନ ହର୍ମୁଜ୍ ପ୍ରଣାଳୀରେ କତାର ତେଲ ବୋଝେଇ ଟ୍ୟାଙ୍କର ଉପରେ ଆକ୍ରମଣ ହୋଇଥିଲା। ଏହା ଏକ ସପ୍ତାହ ମଧ୍ୟରେ ବାଣିଜ୍ୟ ଜାହାଜ ଉପରେ ଦ୍ୱିତୀୟ ଆକ୍ରମଣ ଥିଲା। ୟୁକେର ସାମୁଦ୍ରିକ ସୁରକ୍ଷା ଏଜେନ୍ସି ୟୁକେଏମଟିଓ ଅନୁସାରେ, ଆକ୍ରମଣରେ ଜାହାଜର ବ୍ରିଜ୍ କ୍ଷତିଗ୍ରସ୍ତ ହୋଇଥିଲା,କିନ୍ତୁ କର୍ମଚାରୀମାନେ ସୁରକ୍ଷିତ ଥିଲେ ଏବଂ କୌଣସି ତେଲ ଲିକ୍ ହୋଇ ନଥିଲା।
El Nino effect: ମୌସୁମୀକୁ ବାଧା ଦେଉଛି ଏଲ୍ ନିନୋ: ଉତ୍ତର ପ୍ରଦେଶ-ମଧ୍ୟପ୍ରଦେଶ-ଓଡ଼ିଶାରେ ବର୍ଷା ସଙ୍କଟ
ରିପୋର୍ଟ ଅନୁଯାୟୀ, ଏପର୍ଯ୍ୟନ୍ତ ୪୪ଟି ଜାହାଜ ହର୍ମୁଜ୍ ପ୍ରଣାଳୀ ଦେଇ ଭାରତକୁ ପରିବହନ କରିଛନ୍ତି। ସେମାନଙ୍କ ମଧ୍ୟରେ ୧୭ଟି ଭାରତୀୟ ପତାକା ଏବଂ ୨୭ଟି ବିଦେଶୀ ପତାକା ଜାହାଜ ଥିବା ଜାହାଜ ଅନ୍ତର୍ଭୁକ୍ତ ଅଛନ୍ତି। ସେସବୁ ମଧ୍ୟରେ ଅଶୋଧିତ ତୈଳ ଟ୍ୟାଙ୍କର, ଏଲପିଜି ଏବଂ ଏଲଏନଜି ବାହକ, ବଲ୍କ ବାହକ, କଣ୍ଟେନର ଜାହାଜ ଏବଂ ଅନ୍ୟାନ୍ୟ ମାଲବାହୀ ଜାହାଜ ଅନ୍ତର୍ଭୁକ୍ତ ରହିଛନ୍ତି।

title: യുവതിക്ക് ഊബർ ഡ്രൈവറുടെ അധിക്ഷേപ മെസ്സേജുകൾ, പരാതി നൽകിയിട്ടും നടപടിയില്ല
description: ഊബറില്‍ ടാക്സി ബുക്ക് ചെയ്തതിന് പിന്നാലെ ഡ്രൈവര്‍ തെറ്റായ ദിശയിലേക്ക് വണ്ടിയോടിച്ചു പോയി. ചോദ്യം ചെയ്തപ്പോള്‍ ഡ്രൈവര്‍ അധിക്ഷേപകരമായ മെസ്സേജുകള്‍ അയച്ചതായി യുവതി.
content: <p>ഊബർ, ഓല പോലെയുള്ള ടാക്സിയിലെ ഡ്രൈവർമാർ മോശമായി പെരുമാറിയതിന്റെ അനേകം അനുഭവങ്ങൾ സോഷ്യൽ മീഡിയയിൽ ശ്രദ്ധിക്കപ്പെടാറുണ്ട്. അതുപോലെ ഒരു പോസ്റ്റാണ് ഇപ്പോൾ സോഷ്യൽ മീഡിയയിൽ ശ്രദ്ധിക്കപ്പെടുന്നത്. മുംബൈയിൽ തർക്കത്തിന് പിന്നാലെ ഊബർ ഡ്രൈവർ, ആപ്പ് വഴി അധിക്ഷേപ സന്ദേശമയച്ചതായിട്ടാണ് യാത്രക്കാരിയുടെ പോസ്റ്റ്. കനത്ത മഴയുള്ള സമയത്ത് തന്റെ അമ്മയ്ക്കായി ഊബർ ബ്ലാക്ക് റൈഡ് ബുക്ക് ചെയ്തപ്പോഴാണ് ഈ ദുരനുഭവമുണ്ടായതെന്ന് അങ്കിത പഥക് എന്ന യുവതി ലിങ്ക്ഡ്ഇന്നിൽ പങ്കുവെച്ച കുറിപ്പിൽ ആരോപിക്കുന്നു. സുരക്ഷയും വിശ്വാസ്യതയും മുൻനിർത്തിയാണ് താൻ ഊബർ ബ്ലാക്ക് തിരഞ്ഞെടുത്തതെന്നും അവർ വ്യക്തമാക്കി.</p><p>ജൂൺ 24 -നാണ് സംഭവം. ബുക്കിംഗ് കൺഫേം ചെയ്ത ശേഷം ഡ്രൈവർ അങ്ങോട്ട് വരാതെ എതിർദിശയിലേക്ക് വണ്ടി ഓടിച്ചുപോയി. ഫോൺ വിളിച്ചപ്പോൾ പ്രതികരിച്ചതുമില്ല. ഇതിനെക്കുറിച്ച് ചോദിച്ചപ്പോൾ 'എന്ത് വേണമെങ്കിലും ചെയ്തോളൂ', 'എന്നെ വിട്ടേക്കൂ, എനിക്ക് ഒരു കുഴപ്പവുമില്ല' എന്ന രീതിയിലായിരുന്നു ഡ്രൈവറുടെ മറുപടി. ഇതിന് പിന്നാലെ ഊബർ ആപ്പിൽ തന്നെ ഡ്രൈവർ അധിക്ഷേപകരമായ സന്ദേശം അയച്ചതായി അങ്കിത ആരോപിക്കുന്നു.</p><p>സ്ക്രീൻഷോട്ടുകൾ സഹിതം പരാതി നൽകിയിട്ടും 48 മണിക്കൂറോളം ഊബറിന്റെ ഭാഗത്തുനിന്ന് യാതൊരു പ്രതികരണവും ഉണ്ടായില്ലെന്നും അങ്കിത പറയുന്നു. ഇത്തരം ഗുരുതരമായ പരാതികൾ അവഗണിക്കപ്പെടുകയാണെന്നും, സ്വന്തം ആപ്പിലൂടെ ഇത്തരം സന്ദേശങ്ങൾ അയക്കാൻ അനുവദിച്ചിട്ട് പ്ലാറ്റ്ഫോം മൗനം പാലിക്കുകയാണെന്നും അവർ കുറ്റപ്പെടുത്തി. പോസ്റ്റ് ശ്രദ്ധിക്കപ്പെട്ടതിന് പിന്നാലെ കമ്പനി ബന്ധപ്പെട്ടതായി അങ്കിത പിന്നീട് കമന്റിലൂടെ അറിയിച്ചു. ഡ്രൈവറെ പ്ലാറ്റ്‌ഫോമിൽ നിന്ന് നീക്കം ചെയ്തതായി ഊബർ സ്ഥിരീകരിച്ചിട്ടുണ്ട്.</p><p></p><p>'പിന്തുണച്ചവർക്കും പോസ്റ്റ് പങ്കുവെച്ചവർക്കും നന്ദി. പരസ്യമായി എഴുതാൻ മടിയുണ്ടായിരുന്നുവെങ്കിലും മറ്റ് വഴികളില്ലായിരുന്നു' എന്നും അങ്കിത കുറിച്ചു. എങ്കിലും പരാതി നൽകിയപ്പോഴല്ല മറിച്ച് പോസ്റ്റിട്ടപ്പോഴാണ് നടപടിയുണ്ടായതെന്ന കാര്യത്തിലെ നിരാശയും അവർ പങ്കുവച്ചു. നിരവധിപ്പേരാണ് പോസ്റ്റിന് കമന്റുകൾ നൽകിയത്. സമാനമായ അനുഭവം പങ്കുവച്ചുതന്നെ ഒരുപാടുപേർ കമന്റ് നല്‌കി.</p>

title: Integrated command centre powers multi-layered Amarnath yatra security in Jammu
description:
Jammu, Jun 28: Security arrangements for this year's Amarnath Yatra have witnessed a major technological transformation, with a state-of-the-art integrated command and control centre serving as the nerve centre of an advanced, multi-tier surveillance network to ensure seamless coordination and real-time monitoring, officials said.
The command centre for Jammu city was officially inaugurated in March 2023 under the Smart Cities Mission to act as the nerve centre for intelligent traffic management and civic operations. It integrates hundreds of CCTV and PTZ cameras across the city to monitor traffic violations and enhance public safety.
Officials said the integrated command and control centre (ICCC) will be playing a central role in ensuring the smooth, safe, and efficient management of the Amarnath Yatra, scheduled to begin on July 3, by bringing multiple departments together under one roof.
The facility enables security agencies to monitor Yatra routes, base camps and other key installations in real time through the extensive CCTV and advanced surveillance network, allowing continuous monitoring of movement and helping security personnel respond swiftly to any suspicious activity, they said.
Chief Information Security Officer, ICCC, Ankush Kapoor, said J-K police, Traffic Police and Jammu Municipal Corporation (JMC) are working in coordination through the facility to provide real-time monitoring and rapid response.
He said the city police continuously monitors more than 610 CCTV cameras to keep an eye on any suspicious movement round-the-clock. The traffic police is ensuring smooth movement of vehicles while the JMC is assigned to address civic issues such as sanitation, sewage, accommodation-related assistance, parking, transportation, and other essential public services. Pilgrims and citizens can seek assistance through the JMC toll-free number or helpline, he said.
The official said the ICCC serves as a single coordination platform, allowing all departments concerned to work together seamlessly.
“Instead of approaching multiple offices separately, information is shared instantly, enabling faster decision-making and coordinated responses during the Yatra,” Kapoor said.
With advanced technology, inter-departmental coordination, and round-the-clock surveillance, he said the Centre is set to play a pivotal role in ensuring a safe, secure, and well-managed Amarnath Yatra for pilgrims and residents alike.

title: Complete Collapse of Talks: US Hits 10 Targets in Iran, Tehran Strikes Back
description: Tensions in West Asia escalated as the US conducted airstrikes on Iranian military targets following an attack on a commercial oil tanker in the Strait of Hormuz.
content: Tensions in West Asia flared once again as the United States carried out a fresh round of military strikes on Iran, prompting Tehran to launch retaliatory missile and drone attacks on US military installations in Kuwait and Bahrain.The latest exchange marks the second consecutive day of US military action against Iran and raises concerns over the fragile ceasefire  reached between the two countries, even as both sides continue negotiations for a broader peace agreement.US Targets 10 Military Sites in IranThe US Central Command (CENTCOM) said American forces struck 10 Iranian military targets after a commercial oil tanker came under attack while transiting the Strait of Hormuz.According to CENTCOM, the strikes targeted Iranian surveillance infrastructure, communication systems, air defence sites, drone storage facilities and minelayer capabilities at multiple locations in and around the strategic waterway.The US military alleged that Iranian forces used a one-way attack drone to strike the oil tanker Kiku, which was transporting more than two million barrels of crude oil through the Strait of Hormuz."Iran had a chance to honour the ceasefire agreement but elected not to," CENTCOM said, adding that commercial shipping through the Strait of Hormuz continues while US forces remain "vigilant, lethal and ready."The command also released footage showing the military operation.Trump Warns IranReacting to the strikes, Trump accused Iran of repeatedly violating the ceasefire agreement and warned of more severe military action if hostilities continue. "United States aircraft just struck Iranian missile and drone storage locations and coastal radar sites, for violating the Cease Fire Agreement, AGAIN!" Trump posted on Truth Social.He further warned that if the US is forced to resume full-scale military operations, "the Islamic Republic of Iran will no longer exist."Iran Retaliates With Strikes on Kuwait, BahrainHours later, Iran's Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps (IRGC) announced a joint missile and drone operation targeting US military facilities in Kuwait and Bahrain.The Guards claimed they had struck eight key American military installations, including the Ali al-Salem Air Base in Kuwait and the US Fifth Fleet headquarters in Bahrain's Port Salman.In a statement, the IRGC warned that any further military action against Iran would invite a "crushing response."Iran's Khatam al-Anbiya Central Headquarters also accused Washington of violating the ceasefire, saying any future aggression—regardless of its scale—would effectively end ongoing diplomatic efforts.The headquarters added that, under the interim understanding reached between the two countries, Iran would continue regulating maritime traffic through the Strait of Hormuz and warned that vessels deemed hostile would face tougher action.The IRGC Navy separately declared that US military bases across West Asia would experience "hell" if attacks continued.Peace Talks Continue Despite Fresh HostilitiesDespite the renewed military confrontation, diplomatic negotiations between Washington and Tehran remain underway. The two sides are discussing guarantees for the safe movement of commercial shipping through the Strait of Hormuz, the future of Iran's nuclear programme and the disposition of its stockpile of highly enriched uranium.Under the interim agreement reached earlier, both countries have 60 days to negotiate and finalise the terms of a comprehensive peace deal.

title: Tovino on how 'Manichitrathazhu' haunted his childhood
description: Actor Tovino Thomas shared how the classic Malayalam film 'Manichitrathazhu' deeply impacted him as a child, leaving him scared of the dark for weeks. He also revealed his lifelong passion for cinema stems from his family's tradition of movie outings and later, weekend video cassette rentals at home. This upbringing, filled with shared cinematic experiences, ignited his own journey into filmmaking.

title: অসমত টীকাকৰণ কাৰ্যসূচীৰ ৯৯ শতাংশৰো অধিক ডিজিটেল হৈ পৰিছেঃ অশোক সিংহল
description:
ডিজিটেল সংবাদ,ধুবুৰীঃ  সমগ্ৰ অসমৰ লগতে ধুবুৰী জিলাতো ৰাষ্ট্ৰীয় প্ৰতিষেধক দিৱস উপলক্ষে পালছ পলিঅ' কাৰ্যসূচীৰ আনুষ্ঠানিকভাৱে শুভাৰম্ভ কৰা হয়। ধুবুৰী মেডিকেল কলেজ আৰু চিকিৎসালয়ত কেন্দ্ৰীয়ভাৱে আয়োজন কৰা এই কাৰ্যসূচীৰ শুভাৰম্ভ কৰে কেবিনেট মন্ত্ৰী তথা ধুবুৰীৰ অভিভাৱক মন্ত্ৰী অশোক সিংহলে। 
পলিঅ' মুক্ত ভাৰত গঠনৰ সংকল্পৰে আয়োজিত এই কাৰ্যসূচীত ভাগ লৈ মন্ত্ৰী সিংহলে উল্লেখ কৰে যে- সমগ্ৰ ৰাজ্যৰ ২৪ হাজাৰ স্বাস্থ্য কেন্দ্ৰত আজি প্ৰায় ৫২ হাজাৰ স্বাস্থ্য কৰ্মীয়ে সক্ৰিয়ভাৱে এই টীকাকৰণ অভিযান ৰূপায়ণ কৰিছে। পলিঅ' নিৰ্মূলৰ এই ৰাষ্ট্ৰীয় যুঁজখনত অসমেও সমগ্ৰ দেশৰ সৈতে সমানে ভৰি মিলাইছে বুলি তেওঁ উল্লেখ কৰে। শিশু আৰু মাতৃক বিভিন্ন মাৰাত্মক ৰোগৰ পৰা সুৰক্ষিত কৰি ৰাখিবলৈ চৰকাৰে এনেধৰণৰ স্বাস্থ্যমূলক সেৱাসমূহ নিৰন্তৰভাৱে চলাই যাব বুলিও তেওঁ আশ্বাস প্ৰদান কৰে।
লগতে তেওঁ কয় যে- আজি অসমত টীকাকৰণ কাৰ্যসূচীৰ ৯৯ শতাংশৰো অধিক ডিজিটেল হৈ পৰিছে। সমগ্ৰ ব্যৱস্থাটো এতিয়া আধুনিক টেকন'ল'জিৰ দ্বাৰা পৰিচালিত হয়। আমাৰ নিষ্ঠাবান স্বাস্থ্য কৰ্মীসকলৰ অশেষ প্ৰচেষ্টাৰ ফলতে আজি অসমত ৯৫ শতাংশ মাতৃ আৰু শিশুক সফলতাৰে টিকাকৰণ কৰিবলৈ সক্ষম হোৱা গৈছে।
আনফালে, ভাষণ প্ৰসংগত তেওঁ লগতে কয়- মুখ্যমন্ত্রী হিমন্ত বিশ্ব শৰ্মাৰ বলিষ্ঠ নেতৃত্বৰ বাবেই আজি ৰাজ্যৰ স্বাস্থ্য বিভাগে এই অভূতপূৰ্ব সফলতা অৰ্জন কৰিবলৈ সমৰ্থ হৈছে।
ধুবুৰী মেডিকেল কলেজত অনুষ্ঠিত আজিৰ এই কেন্দ্ৰীয় কাৰ্যসূচীত ধুবুৰী স্বাস্থ্য বিভাগৰ যুটীয়া সঞ্চালক ডা: জ্যোতি কুমাৰ দাস, ধুবুৰী মেডিকেল কলেজ আৰু চিকিৎসালয়ৰ অধ্যক্ষ ডা: অংকুমণি শইকীয়াৰ লগতে স্বাস্থ্য বিভাগৰ কেইবাগৰাকীও শীৰ্ষ বিষয়া আৰু ভালেসংখ্যক আশাকৰ্মী তথা স্বাস্থ্য কৰ্মী উপস্থিত থাকে।

title: J&K govt denies irregular hiring, hits back at PDP
description:
Ministers say PDP responsible for outsourcing framework and past backdoor entries
Srinagar, June 28 : The Jammu and Kashmir government on Sunday rejected the People's Democratic Party's allegations of large-scale backdoor appointments through outsourcing, asserting that all recruitments are being carried out through transparent procedures and in accordance with established rules.
Chief Minister's Advisor Nasir Aslam Wani said all government recruitments are conducted through proper channels with transparency, while outsourcing is undertaken in accordance with the prescribed tendering process.
"There is no truth in the allegations of backdoor appointments. If anyone has evidence, they should produce it and action will be taken," Wani told reporters.
He said claims that the government was making appointments through the backdoor were baseless and accused the PDP of spreading misinformation.
Wani alleged that several backdoor appointments had taken place during the PDP's tenure and claimed the government possessed evidence of such recruitments. He also blamed the PDP for developments that led to the loss of Jammu and Kashmir's special status and statehood.
Cabinet Minister Sakina Itoo said outsourced engagements were temporary arrangements meant to address additional workload and should not be treated as permanent government employment.
She said outsourcing in departments was introduced between 2014 and 2018 and that the practice of engaging manpower through agencies began in 2016, before the present government assumed office.
"The figure of 25,000 alleged backdoor appointments being circulated is completely baseless. All regular recruitments are made through the prescribed procedure, while outsourcing is only a temporary arrangement under an existing government framework," Itoo said.
She added that security personnel and sentry workers engaged in hospitals were deployed to meet operational requirements and reiterated that outsourcing was not equivalent to regular recruitment.
Itoo also accused the PDP of misleading people over the issue and alleged that irregular appointments, including in J&K Bank, had taken place during its tenure.
Minister Javed Ahmad Dar also dismissed the PDP's allegations, saying outsourcing was a Central government-backed framework and not a policy introduced by the present administration.
He said all outsourcing engagements were being carried out through a transparent process and accused the PDP of attempting to mislead the public on the issue.(KNS)

title: RAPO 23 | రూ.100 కోట్ల బ‌డ్జెట్‌.. రేపే గ్రాండ్‌గా ప్రారంభం కానున్న రామ్ పోతినేని ‘RAPO23’
description: RAPO 23 | ఎనర్జిటిక్ స్టార్ రామ్ పోతినేని తన కెరీర్‌లో సరికొత్త అధ్యాయాన్ని లిఖించబోతున్నారు. ఆయన కథానాయకుడిగా నటిస్తూ, తొలిసారి దర్శకుడిగా మెగాఫోన్ పడుతున్న ప్రతిష్టాత్మక చిత్రం #RAPO23.
content:
RAPO 23 | ఎనర్జిటిక్ స్టార్ రామ్ పోతినేని తన కెరీర్‌లో సరికొత్త అధ్యాయాన్ని లిఖించబోతున్నారు. ఆయన కథానాయకుడిగా నటిస్తూ, తొలిసారి దర్శకుడిగా మెగాఫోన్ పడుతున్న ప్రతిష్టాత్మక చిత్రం #RAPO23. ఈ ప్రాజెక్ట్ రేపు (జూన్ 29)న గ్రాండ్ పూజా కార్యక్రమంతో అధికారికంగా ప్రారంభం కానుంది. “ది స్టోరీ ఆఫ్ ఎ లోన్ ఉల్ఫ్” అనే ఆసక్తికరమైన ట్యాగ్‌లైన్‌తో వస్తున్న ఈ స్టైలిష్ సైకలాజికల్ యాక్షన్ థ్రిల్లర్‌లో రామ్ ‘వీర’ అనే ఎంతో పవర్‌ఫుల్ పాత్రలో కనిపించనున్నారు.
రాపో సినిమాటిక్స్ బ్యానర్‌పై నిర్మాత కృష్ణ పోతినేని దాదాపు 100 కోట్ల భారీ బడ్జెట్‌తో రామ్ కెరీర్‌లోనే అత్యంత వ్యయభరితంగా ఈ చిత్రాన్ని నిర్మిస్తున్నారు. జాతీయ అవార్డు గ్రహీత తిరు సినిమాటోగ్రాఫర్‌గా, మలయాళ సెన్సేషన్ సామ్ సీఎస్ సంగీత దర్శకుడిగా, మరియు ప్రముఖ ఫైట్ మాస్టర్ పీటర్ హెయిన్ యాక్షన్ కొరియోగ్రాఫర్‌గా ఈ చిత్రానికి పనిచేస్తున్నారు. ఇప్పటికే విడుదలైన ఫస్ట్ లుక్ పోస్టర్ సోషల్ మీడియాలో విపరీతమైన క్రేజ్ సంపాదించుకోగా, రేపటి ముహూర్తం అనంతరం ఈ సినిమా రెగ్యులర్ షూటింగ్ జరుపుకుని, ఇదే ఏడాది డిసెంబర్ 2026లో ప్రపంచవ్యాప్తంగా భారీ ఎత్తున విడుదల కానుంది.

The Lone Wolf awakens. #RAPO23 is all set to begin its Epic journey with a Grand Pooja Ceremony Tomorrow, 29th June

title: Road accident | ట్రాలీ ఆటోను ఢీకొట్టిన లారీ.. ముగ్గురు దుర్మ‌ర‌ణం
description: Road accident | ఆంధ్ర‌ప్ర‌దేశ్ రాష్ట్రంలో ఆదివారం ఉద‌యం ఘోర రోడ్డు ప్ర‌మాదం జ‌రిగింది. శ్రీకాకుళం జిల్లా కవిటి మండలం జమేదారిపుట్టుగ వద్ద ట్రాలీ ఆటోను లారీ ఢీకొట్టింది. ఈ ప్రమాదంలో ఆటోలో ప్రయాణిస్తున్న ముగ్గురు మహిళలు అక్కడికక్కడే మృతి చెందారు. పలువురు గాయపడ్డారు.
content:
Road accident : ఆంధ్ర‌ప్ర‌దేశ్ రాష్ట్రంలో ఆదివారం ఉద‌యం ఘోర రోడ్డు ప్ర‌మాదం జ‌రిగింది. శ్రీకాకుళం జిల్లా కవిటి మండలం జమేదారిపుట్టుగ వద్ద ట్రాలీ ఆటోను లారీ ఢీకొట్టింది. ఈ ప్రమాదంలో ఆటోలో ప్రయాణిస్తున్న ముగ్గురు మహిళలు అక్కడికక్కడే మృతి చెందారు. పలువురు గాయపడ్డారు. స్థానికుల ద్వారా స‌మాచారం అందుకున్న పోలీసులు హుటాహుటిన ఘ‌టనా ప్రాంతానికి చేరుకున్నారు.
గాయ‌ప‌డిన వారిని చికిత్స నిమిత్తం ఆస్ప‌త్రుల‌కు పంపింది. మృత‌దేహాల‌ను పోస్టుమార్టానికి త‌ర‌లించారు. ఈ ఘ‌ట‌న‌పై కేసు న‌మోదుచేసి ద‌ర్యాప్తు చేప‌ట్టిన‌ట్లు పోలీసులు తెలిపారు. ప్ర‌మాదంలో మృతి చెందిన వారి వివరాలు తెలియాల్సి ఉందని అన్నారు.

Venezuelan earthquake death toll rises amid increasingly dire search
description: The death toll from Venezuela’s twin earthquakes has reached 1,430, with an estimated 51,000 people still missing.

title: Ahmed on 'Welcome 3': 'Don't need anyone to explain comedy to me'
description: Ahmed Khan shared insights into the challenging logistics of 'Welcome to the Jungle,' revealing that coordinating an ensemble of more than 30 actors extended the shoot to two and a half years. He reflected on stepping in to steer the franchise away from Anees Bazmee and credited Akshay Kumar and Suniel Shetty for their vital funding support, as they prioritized quality filmmaking over immediate profits.

title: Tom Holland is being called the most boring husband
description: Tom Holland is affectionately dubbed 'Bore-O' due to his honest reflections on his life with Zendaya, which he describes as stable, sober, and deeply committed. While his choice of a serene life and non-alcoholic beer contrasts sharply with the extravagant lifestyles typically associated with Hollywood, many view this moniker as a sign of affection. Holland has joyfully revealed that Zendaya is his 'person', expressing gratitude for her unwavering support.

title: Aishwarya Rai, Abhishek Bachchan & Aaradhya Serve Twinning Goals As They Jet Off For Vacation; WATCH
description: Bollywood's beloved family, Aishwarya Rai Bachchan, Abhishek Bachchan and their daughter Aaradhya Bachchan were spotted at Mumbai airport as they headed out for a family vacation. The trio grabbed attention in coordinated all-black outfits, effortlessly serving twinning goals with their stylish airport appearance. Black continues to be the Bachchans' signature airport style, while Aishwarya once again stayed true to her classic travel look, straight hair, bold red lips and an elegant black ensemble. Watch video!#AishwaryaRaiBachchan #AbhishekBachchan #Aaradhya

title: Sydney Home Auction Activity Weakens as Costs, Tax Changes Weigh
description: Sydney posted its weakest weekend home auction clearance rate in more than six years as higher interest rates and property tax changes dampen activity and weigh on prices, after years of rapid gains.

title: El Nino effect: ମୌସୁମୀକୁ ବାଧା ଦେଉଛି ଏଲ୍ ନିନୋ: ଉତ୍ତର ପ୍ରଦେଶ-ମଧ୍ୟପ୍ରଦେଶ-ଓଡ଼ିଶାରେ ବର୍ଷା ସଙ୍କଟ
description:
ନୂଆଦିଲ୍ଲୀ: ଦେଶର ଅନେକ ସ୍ଥାନରେ ବର୍ଷା ହେଉଛି, କିନ୍ତୁ ଏବେ ବି ଅନେକ ଅଞ୍ଚଳ ଅଛି ଯେଉଁଠାରେ ମୌସୁମୀରେ ମଧ୍ୟ ବର୍ଷା ହୋଇନି। ଏପର୍ଯ୍ୟନ୍ତ ଦେଶରେ ସ୍ୱାଭାବିକ ଅପେକ୍ଷା ୪୩ ପ୍ରତିଶତ କମ୍ ବର୍ଷା ହୋଇଛି। ଉତ୍ତର ପ୍ରଦେଶ, ମଧ୍ୟପ୍ରଦେଶ ଏବଂ ଓଡ଼ିଶା ସମେତ ଦେଶର ଅନେକ ସ୍ଥାନରେ ଏଲ୍ ନିନୋର ପ୍ରଭାବ ଅନୁଭୂତ ହେଉଛି। ତେବେ ଆସନ୍ତା ମାସରେ ସାରା ଦେଶରେ ମୌସୁମୀ ପହଞ୍ଚିବ ଏବଂ ବର୍ଷା ଅଭାବକୁ ପୂରଣ କରିବ ବୋଲି ପାଣିପାଗ ବିଭାଗ ପୂର୍ବାନୁମାନ କରିଛି। ଭାରତ ଏଲ୍ ନିନୋ ଦ୍ୱାରା ବହୁ ପରିମାଣରେ ପ୍ରଭାବିତ ହେଉଛି। ତେଣୁ ଚଳିତ ବର୍ଷ ସ୍ୱାଭାବିକ ଅପେକ୍ଷା କମ୍ ବର୍ଷା ହେବାର ଆଶଙ୍କା ସୃଷ୍ଟି ହୋଇଛି।
ଏଲ୍ ନିନୋର ପ୍ରଭାବ କମିବାର ଏକ ଉପାୟ ରହିଛି। ଯଦି ଇଣ୍ଡିଆନ୍ ଓସେନ୍ ଡାଇପୋଲ୍ (ଆଇଓଡି)ନାମକ ଏକ ସ୍ଥିତି ସୃଷ୍ଟି ହେବ ତେବେ ଏପରି ସ୍ଥିତିରୁ ମୁକ୍ତି ମିଳିପାରିବ ବୋଲି ବିଶେଷଜ୍ଞ ମତପୋଷଣ କରିଛନ୍ତି। ଆଇଓଡି ହେଉଛି ଏକ ଜଳବାୟୁ ସ୍ଥିତି ଯାହା ଭାରତ ମହାସାଗରର ପଶ୍ଚିମ ଏବଂ ପୂର୍ବ ଅଂଶ ମଧ୍ୟରେ ସମୁଦ୍ର ପୃଷ୍ଠର ତାପମାତ୍ରାରେ ପାର୍ଥକ୍ୟ ଦ୍ୱାରା ସୃଷ୍ଟି ହୋଇଥାଏ। ଏହା ଏଲ୍ ନିନୋ-ସର୍ଦନ ଆସିଲେସନ(ଇଏନଏସଓ)ସହିତ ଉତ୍ତାପ ଦ୍ବାରା ମୌସୁମୀକୁ ପ୍ରଭାବିତ କରିବାର ମୁଖ୍ୟ କାରଣ। ତେବେ ଏଭଳି ସ୍ଥିତି ସୃଷ୍ଟି ହେବା ଅସମ୍ଭବ । ୨୦୨୩ରେ ଆଇଓଡି ଯୋଗୁଁ ଏକ ଶକ୍ତିଶାଳୀ ଏଲ୍ ନିନୋର ପ୍ରଭାବ ଯଥେଷ୍ଟ ହ୍ରାସ ପାଇଥିଲା। ଯାହା ଫଳରେ ଭାରତରେ ପ୍ରାୟ ସ୍ୱାଭାବିକ ଭାବେ ମୌସୁମୀ ଋତୁକାଳୀନ ବର୍ଷା ହୋଇଥିଲା।
Kailash Mansarovar: ଭିସା-ପରମିଟ୍ ନଥିଲେ କୈଳାସ ମାନସରୋବର ଯାତ୍ରା କରନ୍ତୁ ନାହିଁ: ବୈଦେଶିକ ମନ୍ତ୍ରଣାଳୟର ପକ୍ଷରୁ ଆଡଭାଇଜରି ଜାରି
ପାଣିପାଗ ବିଭାଗ ପୂର୍ବାନୁମାନ କରିଛି ଯେ, ଚଳିତ ବର୍ଷ ମୌସୁମୀ ସ୍ୱାଭାବିକଠାରୁ ୧୦ ପ୍ରତିଶତ କମ୍ ବର୍ଷିବ। ଆଇଏମଡି ପୂର୍ବରୁ ସ୍ୱାଭାବିକଠାରୁ କମ୍ ବର୍ଷାର ପୂର୍ବାନୁମାନ କରିଛି। ଜୁନ୍ରୁ ସେପ୍ଟେମ୍ବର ପର୍ଯ୍ୟନ୍ତ ମୋଟ ବର୍ଷା ସ୍ୱାଭାବିକଠାରୁ ୧୦% କିମ୍ବା ତା’ଠାରୁ ଅଧିକ ହେବାର ୬୦% ସମ୍ଭାବନା ଅଛି। ଭାରତୀୟ ପାଣିପାଗ ବିଭାଗ ଅନୁଯାୟୀ, ଚଳିତ ବର୍ଷ ଜୁନ୍ରୁ ସେପ୍ଟେମ୍ବର ମଧ୍ୟରେ ବର୍ଷା ସ୍ୱାଭାବିକଠାରୁ କମ୍ ହୋଇପାରେ। ଏହି ପୂର୍ବାନୁମାନ ଯୋଗୁଁ ଅନେକ ଅଞ୍ଚଳରେ ମରୁଡ଼ିକୁ ନେଇ ଚିନ୍ତା ବୃଦ୍ଧି ପାଇଛି। ଦେଶର ଅନେକ ରାଜ୍ୟରେ ଚାଷୀମାନେ କେବଳ କୃଷି ପାଇଁ ବର୍ଷାଜଳ ଉପରେ ନିର୍ଭର କରୁଥିବାରୁ, ଜଳକଷ୍ଟ କୃଷିକୁ ପ୍ରଭାବିତ କରିବା ଆଶଙ୍କା ଦେଖାଦେଇଛି।।
ଓଡ଼ିଶାରେ ୫୨ ପ୍ରତିଶତ କମ୍ ବର୍ଷା
ମେଘାଳୟରେ ୮୨ ପ୍ରତିଶତ ବର୍ଷା ହ୍ରାସ ହୋଇଥିବା ରେକର୍ଡ କରାଯାଇଛି। ଗୁଜୁରାଟରେ ୭୯ ପ୍ରତିଶତ, ମଣିପୁରରେ ୭୧ ପ୍ରତିଶତ, ଛତିଶଗଡ଼ରେ ୬୮ ପ୍ରତିଶତ, ଝାଡ଼ଖଣ୍ଡରେ ୬୬ ପ୍ରତିଶତ, ମହାରାଷ୍ଟ୍ରରେ ୫୯ ପ୍ରତିଶତ, ଉତ୍ତର ପ୍ରଦେଶରେ ୫୬ ପ୍ରତିଶତ, ଓଡ଼ିଶାରେ ୫୨ ପ୍ରତିଶତ ବର୍ଷା ହ୍ରାସ ପାଇଛି। ବିହାରରେ ଏପର୍ଯ୍ୟନ୍ତ ୫୦ ପ୍ରତିଶତ ବର୍ଷା ହ୍ରାସ ପାଇଛି। ମଧ୍ୟପ୍ରଦେଶରେ ସ୍ୱାଭାବିକ ତୁଳନାରେ ୪୧% କମ୍ ବର୍ଷା ହୋଇଛି। ଏହି ଅଞ୍ଚଳ ମୌସୁମୀ ଉପରେ ବହୁଳ ଭାବରେ ନିର୍ଭରଶୀଳ, ଏବଂ ଏଠାକାର କୃଷି ମଧ୍ୟ ମୌସୁମୀ ଉପରେ ନିର୍ଭରଶୀଳ। ଦକ୍ଷିଣ ଭାରତରେ କର୍ଣ୍ଣାଟକ, କେରଳ, ତାମିଲନାଡୁ ଏବଂ ତେଲେଙ୍ଗାନାରେ ଦୁଇରୁ ତିନି ସପ୍ତାହ ପୂର୍ବରୁ ମୌସୁମୀ ପହଞ୍ଚିଥିବା ସତ୍ତ୍ୱେ ବର୍ଷାରେ ୩୦% ରୁ ଅଧିକ ହ୍ରାସ ରେକର୍ଡ କରାଯାଇଛି। ସାମଗ୍ରିକ ଭାବରେ ମଧ୍ୟ ଭାରତରେ ମୌସୁମୀ ବର୍ଷାରେ ସର୍ବାଧିକ ୫୭% ହ୍ରାସ ଘଟିଛି। ସେହିପରି ପୂର୍ବ ଏବଂ ଉତ୍ତର-ପୂର୍ବ ଭାରତରେ ୪୪%, ଦକ୍ଷିଣ ଭାରତରେ ୩୦% ଏବଂ ଉତ୍ତର-ପଶ୍ଚିମ ଭାରତରେ ୨୭% ମୌସୁମୀ ବର୍ଷା ହ୍ରାସ ପାଇଥିବା ପାଣିପାଗ ବିଭାଗ କହିଛି।

title: Woman Death: ବିବାହିତା ମହିଳାଙ୍କୁ ଦୁଷ୍କର୍ମ ପରେ ହତ୍ୟା, ଅଭିଯୁକ୍ତ ଅଟକ
description:
ବୈଶିଙ୍ଗା: ବେତନଟୀ ଥାନା ଇଲାକାର ଜନୈକା ୩୯ବର୍ଷୀୟା ବିବାହିତା ମହିଳାଙ୍କୁ ଦୁଷ୍କର୍ମ ପରେ ଯୌନାଙ୍ଗରେ ମଦବୋତଲ କିମ୍ବା କୌଣସି କଠିନ ଧାତବ ପଦାର୍ଥ ପୁରାଇବାରୁ ପ୍ରବଳ ରକ୍ତସ୍ରାବରେ ମୃତ୍ୟୁ ଘଟଣାରେ ବେତନଟୀ ପୁଲିସ ଦୁଷ୍କର୍ମ ପରେ ହତ୍ୟାକାଣ୍ଡ ଜନିତ ମାମଲା ରୁଜୁକରି ଶବ ବ୍ୟବଚ୍ଛେଦ କରାଇ ଥିବାବେଳେ ଅଭିଯୁକ୍ତ ପୁରୁଷ ବନ୍ଧୁକୁ ଅଟକ ରଖି ପଚରାଉଚରା ଜାରି ରଖିଛି l ଅଟକ ରହିଥିବା ପୁରୁଷବନ୍ଧୁ ଜଣକ ହେଉଛନ୍ତି ବେତନଟୀ ଥାନା ବଡଜାମବଣି ଫାଣ୍ଡି ଅଧୀନ ଗରୁଡବସା ଗ୍ରାମର ଦାମୋଦର ମହାନ୍ତଙ୍କ ପୁଅ କଟି ଓରଫ ଜିତେନ୍ଦ୍ର ମହାନ୍ତ(୩୫) l
ଲୁଗା କିଣିବା ଲାଗି ଘରୁ ବାହାରି ଥିଲେ
ସୂଚନା ମୁତାବକ ଶୁକ୍ରବାର ସକାଳ ୧୦ଟା ପାଖାପାଖି ସମୟରେ ଲୁଗା କିଣିବା ପାଇଁ ପୀଡ଼ିତା ଘରୁ ବାହାରି ଆସିଥିଲେ l ମାତ୍ର ସନ୍ଧ୍ୟା ପର୍ଯ୍ୟନ୍ତ ଘରକୁ ନଫେରିବାରୁ ଘରଲୋକେ ବାରମ୍ବାର ଫୋନ କରିଥିଲେ ସୁଦ୍ଧା ପୀଡ଼ିତା ଆଦୌ ଫୋନ ରିସିଭ କରିନଥିଲେ l ଶେଷରେ ବିଳମ୍ବିତ ରାତି ପ୍ରାୟ ୧୨ଟା ପାଖାପାଖି ସମୟରେ ପୀଡ଼ିତା ବିବାହିତା ମହିଳାଙ୍କୁ ଗୁରୁତର ଅବସ୍ଥାରେ ବାରିପଦା ଡାକ୍ତରଖାନାରେ ଭର୍ତ୍ତି କରିଥିଲେ ସୁଦ୍ଧା ତାଙ୍କର ମୃତ୍ୟୁ ହୋଇଥିବା ନେଇ ପୁରୁଷବନ୍ଧୁ ଅଭିଯୁକ୍ତ କଟି ଓରଫ ଜିତେନ୍ଦ୍ର ଫୋନଯୋଗେ ପୀଡ଼ିତାଙ୍କ ଘରଲୋକଙ୍କୁ ଏ ବାବଦରେ ପ୍ରଥମେ ଖବର ଜଣାଇଥିଲେ l ସକାଳେ ଡାକ୍ତରଖାନା କର୍ତୃପକ୍ଷଙ୍କ ସୂଚନାକ୍ରମେ ପୁଲିସ ବାରିପଦା ଜିଲ୍ଲା ମୁଖ୍ୟ ଡାକ୍ତରଖାନାରେ ପହଞ୍ଚିଥିବା ବେଳେ ପୀଡ଼ିତାଙ୍କ ସ୍ୱାମୀ ଏବଂ ଘରଲୋକ ମଧ୍ୟ ପହଞ୍ଚିଥିଲେ l
Woman Attack: ବୋହୂର ପନିକି ଚୋଟରେ ଶାଶୂ ଗୁରୁତର
ପୀଡ଼ିତାଙ୍କ ମୃତଦେହର ପଞ୍ଚନାମା ସମୟରେ ପୀଡ଼ିତାଙ୍କ ଯୌନାଙ୍ଗରେ ଗଭୀର ଆଘାତଲାଗି ପ୍ରବଳ ରକ୍ତସ୍ରାବ ହୋଇଥିବାର ଦେଖିବାକୁ ପାଇଥିଲେ l ତେବେ ଅଭିଯୁକ୍ତ ଜିତେନ୍ଦ୍ର ହିଁ ଦୁଷ୍କର୍ମ କରି ହତ୍ୟା କରିଥିବା ନେଇ ପୀଡ଼ିତାଙ୍କ ସ୍ୱାମୀ ଏତଲାରେ ଦର୍ଶାଇଛନ୍ତି l ଏନେଇ ବେତନଟୀ ଥାନା ଆଇଆଇସି କ୍ରିଷ୍ଣା ପିଙ୍ଗୁଆ ୨୭୨ନମ୍ବରରେ ଦୁଷ୍କର୍ମ ପରେ ହତ୍ୟାକାଣ୍ଡ ଜନିତ ମାମଲା ରୁଜୁକରି ଶବ ବ୍ୟବଚ୍ଛେଦ କରାଇଥିବା ବେଳେ ପୁରୁଷବନ୍ଧୁ କଟି ଓରଫ ଜିତେନ୍ଦ୍ରଙ୍କୁ ଅଟକରଖି ଅଧିକ ପଚରାଉଚରା ଜାରି ରଖିଛନ୍ତି l

title: Police Recreate Crime Scene With Siya, She Shows Chetan's Exact Hiding Spot
description: On Sunday, Pune police reconstructed the crime scene at Lohagad Fort with Siya Goyal, the primary suspect in the murder of her fiancé, Ketan Agrawal.
content: Pune police on Sunday recreated the crime scene at Maharashtra's Lohagad Fort with Siya Goyal, the prime accused in the alleged murder of her fiancee, Ketan Agrawal. She allegedly walked investigators through every step of the crime. According to police sources, the scene reconstruction began at around 8:30 am, during which Siya showed officers the route she took to reach the fort, explained how the alleged murder was carried out, and pointed out the exact spot where co-accused Chetan Chaudhary was allegedly hiding before the attack. Investigators also carried a mannequin, which was used to recreate how the alleged crime is believed to have unfolded on June 18.A police team reached the fort with Siya at around 8 a.m. and spent nearly two and a half hours at the spot conducting the reconstruction. The team returned around 10:30 a.m. Several senior police officers were present throughout the exercise to supervise the investigation and examine the scene in detail.Police said Chetan Chaudhary, the other accused in the case, will also be taken to Lohagad Fort separately for a similar reconstruction exercise. Siya Goyal and Chetan Chaudhary have been arrested for allegedly conspiring to kill Ketan Agrawal. Police claim the two planned the murder after Siya allegedly decided she did not want to marry Ketan but feared that calling off the wedding would bring embarrassment to her family.The investigation is continuing, with police examining the planning of the alleged crime, the accused's movements, digital evidence and other material linked to the case.As a security precaution, the entry gate to Lohagad Fort was temporarily closed during the reconstruction. Tourists and members of the public were not allowed inside until the process was completed.According to investigators, the objective of the exercise was to verify the sequence of events, corroborate evidence already collected, and better understand how the alleged murder was carried out on June 18.

title: ‘India needs to augment its strategic crude oil reserves’: EY's BIG warning as import dependence tops 90% in FY26
description: India's petroleum economy: The report noted that India's degree of dependence on imported crude "has increased in a secular way, rising from 55 per cent in FY1999 to slightly above 90 per cent in FY26."
content: India's petroleum economy: EY in its latest report has said that India needs to "augment its strategic crude oil reserves to reduce its vulnerability to external shocks" and reverse the trend of growing dependence on imported crude. It further warned that petroleum remains a key external risk for the domestic economy.‘India may need to augment its strategic crude oil reserves’"Going forward, India may need to augment its strategic crude oil reserves... Further, India may develop a detailed strategy for maintaining crude oil reserves which spells out the volume of reserves, strategy of purchases and releases from such reserves taking into account the relevant carrying costs," the report stated. It added that the country should also "continue to augment its refining capacity" and "accelerate the shift towards greener options and other alternative sources of energy, including nuclear energy."EY report highlights 2 structural featuresEY's analysis, titled India's petroleum economy: Coping with vulnerabilities, highlights two structural features. "First, its high dependence on imports of crude oil. The contribution of domestic production of crude oil has remained quite limited. Second, its domestic capacity to refine this imported crude oil and its ability to export these refined PoL products... The first dimension is a vulnerability, and the second dimension is strength," the report said.Import dependence breaches 90% in FY26The report noted that India's degree of dependence on imported crude "has increased in a secular way, rising from 55 per cent in FY1999 to slightly above 90 per cent in FY26." Domestic crude production, after peaking at 35.9 million metric tons in FY12, has eased to 26.0 million metric tons in FY26, while consumption of petroleum products surged from 90.6 MMT in FY1999 to 243.2 MMT in FY26.The positive frontOn a positive note, EY said "the efficiency in producing petroleum products through India's domestic refining process has increased over time," with the efficiency parameter rising from "just above 0.95 in FY1998 to 1.27 in FY26," amounting to "about 33 per cent improvement in petroleum refining efficiency." Energy intensity of GDP has also fallen, which "augurs well for sustaining an energy-efficient growth at a reasonably high level for a relatively longer period."Yet forex pressures are mounting. The report shows a "widening gap between the value of imported crude vis-a-vis exported PoL products by India in US$ terms," driven by global prices and volumes. Growth in domestic consumption of PoL products was at a CAGR of 3.9 per cent over FY06 to FY26, compared with 2.1 per cent for exports.EY flagged India's thin buffer stocks as a concern. "As per information available from the US EIA, India's strategic oil inventories at 21 million barrels are significantly lower than that of China at 1,397 million barrels," the report said, noting India's reserves "suffice only for about five days of consumption." It recommended that "as soon as the global crude situation begins to normalize, India may start investing in building up its crude oil reserves."EY said the trend of dependence "needs to be reversed by emphasizing the exploitation of domestically available crude, while accelerating the shift towards greener options and other alternative sources of energy, including nuclear energy."(With ANI inputs)

title: MX-5 for the family? Manual Mazda 3 is an everyday driver's delight
description:
Much of what the five-star MX-5 so great is evident in this humble hatchback

I worry about the future of smaller car firms. With so much new technology to invest in and develop and new rivals flooding the market, the relative minnows are getting squeezed.
That's why, like many of its contemporaries, Mazda is increasingly reliant on partnerships, sharing development with Toyota and Changan. Such deals give a firm like Mazda a path into the future, but the fear is that they lose some of the individuality that is a core part of their appeal.
I've been reminded of that every time I've jumped behind the wheel of this 3 because, gosh, Mazda really does know how to make a car handle nicely. Even in a humble family hatchback – never mind, say, an MX-5 – there's a certain sharpness and feel to the steering of a Mazda that is both enriching and rewarding.

The firm makes much of its 'jinba ittai' ('horse and rider') philosophy, which prioritises making the driving experience feel natural. And when you're behind the wheel of a Mazda, you know it's more than a marketing slogan. A few weekend jaunts into the Hampshire countryside recently have given me the chance to enjoy driving the 3 on some entertaining, flowing roads, and while it isn't an outright hot hatch, it's certainly engaging.
The steering is direct and well weighted in a very pleasing Mazda sort of way, so when you turn into a corner you have confidence the car will go where you point it. Helping the Mazda's cornering stability is that the ride is on the firm side, although there's clearly a drawback to this given the current state of British roads.
Hit a bump or a pothole and it can jar a bit, although thankfully that nimble steering means that if you're paying attention you've got a decent chance of missing them.
My habit of entering random running events in the countryside often involves having to park up in a field, which can be quite unpleasant in some stiff hatches. But Mazda seems to have found a reasonable balance in firming up the handling without making life too uncomfortable, impressive given that I suspect most hatchback buyers these days are likely to be chasing a level of driver engagement beyond what mass-market SUVs and crossovers usually offer.

The 3's mildly hybridised but naturally aspirated 2.5-litre petrol four is nicely responsive too, although it confuses me a little. Given the unusually large displacement for a family hatch, I had expected it to be noisier than some rivals, but it's actually really rather quiet.
In fact, a few times when stopped at traffic lights and the auto stop-start has kicked in, it has been hard to know when the engine has re-engaged, so hushed and smooth is it at idle.
In a way, the engine note is a bit like the 3 itself: nicely understated. It's engaging and entertaining in all the right ways, yet simultaneously quite relaxing and calming. It just feels right and is a pleasure to drive. And that's why I spent a few weeks filling up my diary so that I was too busy to hand it over to magazine editor Rachel Burgess, who is running the 3. Sadly she finally insisted I relinquish the keys a week or so back. 
So I'm left finding excuses to ask for another go, and hoping that Mazda can find some way to preserve its ability to make cars handle in a future of shared development.

title: Kailash Mansarovar: ଭିସା-ପରମିଟ୍ ନଥିଲେ କୈଳାସ ମାନସରୋବର ଯାତ୍ରା କରନ୍ତୁ ନାହିଁ: ବୈଦେଶିକ ମନ୍ତ୍ରଣାଳୟର ପକ୍ଷରୁ ଆଡଭାଇଜରି ଜାରି
description:
ନୂଆଦିଲ୍ଲୀ: କୈଳାସ ମାନସରୋବର ଯାତ୍ରା କରିବାକୁ ଯୋଜନା କରୁଥିବା ଶ୍ରଦ୍ଧାଳୁଙ୍କୁ ନେଇ ଭାରତୀୟ ବୈଦେଶିକ ମନ୍ତ୍ରଣାଳୟର ପକ୍ଷରୁ ଆଡଭାଇଜରି ଜାରି କରାଯାଇଛି। ଭିସା-ପରମିଟ୍ ନଥିଲେ କୈଳାସ ମାନସରୋବର ଯାତ୍ରା କରନ୍ତୁ ନାହିଁ ବୋଲି ମନ୍ତ୍ରଣାଳୟ ସତର୍କ କରାଇ ଦେଇଛି। ନେପାଳ ଦେଇ ଚୀନ୍ ସୀମା ନିକଟ ତିବ୍ଦତକୁ ଯାତ୍ରା କରୁଥିବା ସମୟରେ ଫସି ରହିଥିବା ଭାରତୀୟ ନାଗରିକଙ୍କ ଅଭିଯୋଗ ପରେ, ଭାରତ ସରକାରଙ୍କ ବୈଦେଶିକ ମନ୍ତ୍ରଣାଳୟ ଏଭଳି ଗୁରୁତ୍ୱପୂର୍ଣ୍ଣ ପରାମର୍ଶ ଜାରି କରିଛି। ବୈଦେଶିକ ମନ୍ତ୍ରଣାଳୟ ସ୍ପଷ୍ଟ ଭାବରେ କହିଛି ଯେ, ଚୀନ୍‌ରେ ପ୍ରବେଶ ପାଇଁ ଆବଶ୍ୟକ ସମସ୍ତ ବୈଧ ଯାତ୍ରା ଡକ୍ୟୁମେଣ୍ଟ ଯେପରିକି ପ୍ରବେଶ ଅନୁମତି ଏବଂ ଭିସା ନପାଇବା ପର୍ଯ୍ୟନ୍ତ ଶ୍ରଦ୍ଧାଳୁ ଭାରତରୁ ଯାତ୍ରା ଆରମ୍ଭ କରିବା ଉଚିତ୍ ନୁହେଁ। ନେପାଳରେ ଫସି ରହିଥିବା ଭାରତୀୟ ନାଗରିକମାନଙ୍କଠାରୁ ମନ୍ତ୍ରଣାଳୟକୁ ବାରମ୍ବାର ସାହାଯ୍ୟ ପାଇଁ ଅନୁରୋଧ ପାଉଛି। ସେମାନେ ଘରୋଇ ଟୁର୍ ଅପରେଟରମାନଙ୍କ ଦ୍ୱାରା ଠକାମିର ଶିକାର ହୋଇ ଆବଶ୍ୟକ ଅନୁମତି ବିନା କାଠମାଣ୍ଡୁରେ ପହଞ୍ଚିଥିଲେ। ସରକାର ଚେତାବନୀ ଦେଇଛନ୍ତି ଯେ, ଭିସା ପାଇବା ଆଶାରେ ଅବା ଅସମ୍ପୂର୍ଣ୍ଣ ଡକ୍ୟୁମେଣ୍ଟ ସହିତ ଘରୁ ବାହାରିବା ବିଦେଶରେ ଫସି ରହିବାର ଆଶଙ୍କାକୁ ବହୁ ପରିମାଣରେ ବୃଦ୍ଧି କରିଥାଏ। ଏହା ସହିତ, ତୀର୍ଥଯାତ୍ରୀମାନଙ୍କୁ କେବଳ ପଞ୍ଜିକୃତ ଏବଂ ଅଧିକୃତ ଟୁର୍ ଅପରେଟରଙ୍କ ମାଧ୍ୟମରେ ବୁକିଂ କରିବାକୁ ପରାମର୍ଶ ଦିଆଯାଇଛି।
୫୨ ଜଣ ଭାରତୀୟ ଫସି ରହିଛନ୍ତି
କାଠମାଣ୍ଡୁରେ ୫୨ ଜଣ ଭାରତୀୟ ତୀର୍ଥଯାତ୍ରୀ ଫସି ରହିଥିବା ଖବର ପ୍ରସାରିତ ହେବା ପରେ ଏହି ପରାମର୍ଶ ଜାରି କରାଯାଇଛି। ତୀର୍ଥଯାତ୍ରୀମାନେ ପବିତ୍ର ତୀର୍ଥସ୍ଥଳକୁ ଯିବା ପାଇଁ ଅପେକ୍ଷା କରିଥିଲେ, କିନ୍ତୁ ଆବଶ୍ୟକୀୟ କାଗଜପତ୍ର ଅଭାବରୁ ସେଠାରେ ଫସି ରହିଥିଲେ। ଏହି ଗମ୍ଭୀର ପ୍ରସଙ୍ଗକୁ ରାଷ୍ଟ୍ରବାଦୀ କଂଗ୍ରେସ ପାର୍ଟି (ଶରଦଚନ୍ଦ୍ର ପାୱାର)ସାଂସଦ ସୁପ୍ରିୟା ସୁଲେ ଉଠାଇଛନ୍ତି।
Trump: ଅସ୍ତ୍ରବିରତି ଉଲ୍ଲଂଘନ କଲେ ବିଶ୍ୱ ମାନଚିତ୍ରରୁ ଲିଭିଯିବ ଇରାନ: ଧ୍ୱଂସ କରିବାକୁ ଧମକ ଦେଲେ ଟ୍ରମ୍ପ
ସୁପ୍ରିୟା ସୁଲେ ସୋସିଆଲ ମିଡିଆ ପ୍ଲାଟଫର୍ମ ଏକ୍ସରେ ଏକ ପୋଷ୍ଟ ସେୟାର କରି ଲେଖିଛନ୍ତି ଯେ କୈଳାସ ମାନସରୋବର ତୀର୍ଥଯାତ୍ରାରେ ଯାଇଥିବା ପ୍ରାୟ ୫୨ ଜଣ ଭାରତୀୟ ନାଗରିକ ବର୍ତ୍ତମାନ ନେପାଳର କାଠମାଣ୍ଡୁରେ ଫସି ରହିଛନ୍ତି ଏବଂ ସେମାନଙ୍କୁ ତୁରନ୍ତ କୂଟନୈତିକ ସହାୟତା ଆବଶ୍ୟକ। ସେ ବୈଦେଶିକ ମନ୍ତ୍ରୀ ଏସ. ଜୟଶଙ୍କର ଏବଂ କାଠମାଣ୍ଡୁ ତଥା ଚୀନ୍‌ର ବେଜିଂରେ ଥିବା ଭାରତୀୟ ଦୂତାବାସକୁ ଟ୍ୟାଗ୍ କରି ଏହି ଶ୍ରଦ୍ଧାଳୁଙ୍କ ସୁରକ୍ଷିତ ଯାତ୍ରା ସୁନିଶ୍ଚିତ କରିବା ଏବଂ ସେମାନଙ୍କୁ ସମସ୍ତ ପ୍ରକାରର ମାନବିକ ସହାୟତା ଯୋଗାଇବା ପାଇଁ ନିବେଦନ କରିଛନ୍ତି।ସୂଚନାଯୋଗ୍ୟ, ଜୁନ୍ ୨୦ ତାରିଖରେ, କୈଳାସ ମାନସରୋବର ଯାତ୍ରା-୨୦୨୬ ପାଇଁ ତୀର୍ଥଯାତ୍ରୀମାନଙ୍କର ପ୍ରଥମ ଦଳ ସିକିମର ନାଥୁ ଲା ପାସ୍ ଦେଇ ଚୀନ୍‌ରେ ପ୍ରବେଶ କରିଥିଲେ।

Meet Esha Deol's ex-husband Bharat Takhtani, who turned his grandfather's 200 sqft bangle business into Rs 165 crore jewellery empire; now dating entrepreneur Meghna Lakhani
description: Esha Deol recently spoke about missing love, while ex-husband Bharat Takhtani has confirmed his relationship with entrepreneur Meghna Lakhani. Here's everything about his Rs 165 crore jewellery empire, family business, net worth, career, education and their new chapter.
content: Bollywood relationships have always fascinated fans, but what often goes unnoticed are the powerful business stories behind some of the industry's famous families. While Esha Deol recently made headlines for candidly admitting that she misses love and hopes to find romance again, her former husband Bharat Takhtani has also found himself back in the spotlight. The businessman, who separated from Esha in 2024 after over a decade of marriage, has now made his relationship with entrepreneur Meghna Lakhani official. Beyond his personal life, Bharat's journey from inheriting a family jewellery business to transforming it into a Rs 165 crore enterprise is equally compelling. Add Meghna's impressive entrepreneurial journey into the mix, and this becomes much more than just another celebrity relationship story. Why is Esha Deol talking about love again? During a conversation on Curly Tales, Esha Deol opened up about her belief in love despite experiencing heartbreak. The actor admitted that romance is currently missing from her life but insisted that her faith in love remains unchanged. "I think love and romance are the most important things in a person's life, which I am currently missing. I love to be romantic. I am a complete rom-com person. I love love songs and I love love stories," she said. Esha explained that break-ups are a part of life and do not change her belief in genuine relationships. She reflected on the unconditional love shared by her parents, Hema Malini and Dharmendra, saying it continues to inspire her idea of lasting companionship. She also acknowledged that separation is never easy, especially for public figures, but maintained that she and Bharat handled the phase with dignity.             What happened between Esha Deol and Bharat Takhtani? Esha Deol and Bharat Takhtani got married in 2012 and were together for over a decade before announcing their separation in February 2024. Their joint statement confirmed that the decision had been taken mutually and amicably, while stressing that their daughters, Radhya and Miraya, would remain their highest priority. The statement read, "We have mutually and amicably decided to part ways. Through this shift in our lives, the best interests and welfare of our two children is and will be of utmost importance to us. We'd appreciate our privacy is respected." Months later, Esha also spoke about co-parenting, explaining that while relationships may change, responsible parents must continue working together for their children. Speaking to the YouTube channel Mamaraazzi, she said that when two mature individuals have children, they should adapt to a new dynamic while keeping the family unit emotionally strong for their kids. She added that this is exactly what she and Bharat continue to do.           Who exactly is Bharat Takhtani? Bharat Takhtani belongs to Mumbai's Sindhi business community and comes from a family with deep roots in the jewellery industry. His father, Vijay Takhtani, is a well-known businessman, while his grandfather, Gurmukhdas Takhtani, laid the foundation of the family's jewellery legacy. What began as a modest workshop eventually became one of the country's recognised jewellery businesses. Did you know? Bharat represents the third generation of jewellers in his family, carrying forward a business that started more than seven decades ago. How did Bharat build a Rs 165 crore jewellery empire? The Takhtani family's journey began in 1950 when Gurmukhdas Takhtani established a 200-square-foot workshop with just eight employees. Over the decades, the business steadily expanded. When Bharat joined in 2007, he focused on modernising operations and expanding the company's reach. The business was rebranded as R.G. Bangle Pvt. Ltd. before evolving into ZAR Jewels, a brand known for handcrafted khila bangles and kundan bracelets. Today, the company operates from a 17,000-square-foot manufacturing facility employing more than 400 people.           Some key highlights of Bharat's business journey include: His grandfather founded the original workshop in 1950.Bharat modernised and expanded the business after joining in 2007.ZAR Jewels caters to customers in both India and Dubai.The company is known for traditional bangles and handcrafted jewellery.One of Bharat's major achievements has been expanding into the Middle East. The company established a modern manufacturing facility in Dubai to cater to international demand, strengthening its presence beyond India. What is Bharat Takhtani's educational background and net worth? Unlike many entrepreneurs who study abroad, Bharat completed his schooling and commerce education in Mumbai. However, much of his business education came from practical experience inside the family enterprise, learning directly from workshops, craftsmen and the jewellery trade. His estimated net worth was reported to be around USD 20 million, or approximately Rs 165 crore, in 2021. Given the continued growth of ZAR Jewels, industry observers believe the business has expanded further since then. Who is Bharat Takhtani dating now? After his separation from Esha Deol, Bharat has confirmed his relationship with entrepreneur Meghna Lakhani. The businessman recently shared a photograph with Meghna on Instagram, writing, "Welcome to my family," along with the hashtag "It's official." Meghna also posted a picture from Madrid, Spain, where the couple was photographed near the famous Origen de las Carreteras Radiales plaque. Her caption simply read, "The journey starts here."          Who is entrepreneur Meghna Lakhani? Meghna Lakhani has built an impressive career across aviation, business development and sustainability. She founded One Modern World, a UAE-based company launched in 2019 that focuses on sustainable products and environmentally friendly packaging solutions. At a time when businesses worldwide are trying to reduce plastic waste, her venture has positioned itself in the growing sustainability space. Did you know? Before becoming an entrepreneur, Meghna worked with both Jet Airways and Emirates, giving her years of experience in the aviation industry before switching careers.           How has Meghna Lakhani built her career? Meghna's professional journey spans multiple industries and countries. After working with Jet Airways and Emirates, she joined VFS Global in 2015 as General Manager of Business Development. She later co-founded Sisimol, a sustainable fashion marketplace based in Spain, before becoming associated with ventures including MTL Worldwide and Optas App. Alongside running One Modern World, she also serves in a sales leadership role at PVG OOKA. Her career milestones include: Working with Jet Airways and Emirates.Serving as General Manager of Business Development at VFS Global.Co-founding sustainable fashion platform Sisimol in Spain.Launching One Modern World in 2019.Taking on leadership responsibilities at PVG OOKA.What is Meghna Lakhani's educational background? Meghna studied at The Sixth Form College in Colchester before pursuing a bachelor's degree in Arts and Promotion from the University of the Arts London. She later strengthened her business credentials by completing an MBA from IE Business School in Spain, combining creative education with international business management.                     What lies ahead for everyone involved? While Esha Deol continues to focus on acting, motherhood and co-parenting, she has also made it clear that she still believes in love and remains open to finding it again. Bharat Takhtani, meanwhile, appears to be embracing a new chapter personally while continuing to lead the family jewellery business that has grown from a tiny workshop into a successful enterprise. Entrepreneur Meghna Lakhani, with her own achievements in sustainability and global business, brings an equally impressive professional story to the relationship.

title: Why Knowing Your Food's Expiry Date Before You Buy It Matters
description: Deceiving to sell: As e-commerce grows, providing complete product information should become standard practice, ensuring consumers can make informed decisions for better health outcomes.
content: Deceiving to sell: A few years ago, buying groceries meant walking into a store, picking up a product, turning it around, and reading the label. We checked the manufacturing date. We checked the expiry date. Sometimes we checked the ingredients. Many of us even compared two packets and chose the fresher one. Today, shopping has changed. Millions of Indians buy groceries through e-commerce and quick-commerce platforms because it is fast, convenient, and saves time. But convenience should never come at the cost of information. As a gastroenterologist, I encourage people to make informed food choices every day. I ask them to read nutrition labels, understand ingredients, reduce ultra-processed foods, and choose healthier options whenever possible. But there is one basic piece of information that is often missing when people shop online—the manufacturing date, expiry date, or best-before date. Without this information, how can someone make an informed decision? Many people think expiry dates are only about food poisoning. That is not true. Different dates tell us different things. An expiry date tells us when a product should no longer be consumed because it may no longer be safe. A best-before date usually refers to quality. The food may still be safe after this date, but its taste, texture, aroma, or nutritional value may not be the same. The manufacturing date tells us how old the product is. Even when two products have the same expiry date, many consumers naturally prefer the fresher one. This is normal. It is how people make food choices. Imagine ordering a tub of yogurt online. Wouldn't you like to know whether it was packed two days ago or two months ago? Imagine buying whole wheat bread. Wouldn't you prefer choosing the fresher loaf yourself instead of leaving that decision to chance? These are not unreasonable expectations. They are basic pieces of information that help consumers make decisions. As doctors, we often advise people with diabetes, kidney disease, digestive disorders, or weakened immunity to pay closer attention to the food they eat. For these individuals, freshness can matter even more. Parents buying food for young children may also want to choose products with a longer remaining shelf life. Older adults may want the same. Consumers deserve the opportunity to make those choices before they pay for a product. The online shopping experience should not remove that choice. Another important issue is trust. People are increasingly conscious about their health. They are reading nutrition labels. They are asking questions about sugar, salt, preservatives, additives, and ultra-processed foods. This is a positive change. But trust is built through transparency. When important information is hidden until after delivery, consumers lose the ability to compare products and make decisions based on facts. Transparency benefits everyone. Consumers feel more confident about what they are buying. Retailers build stronger trust with their customers. Brands that maintain high quality are recognised for it. Most importantly, people are empowered to make healthier choices. This is not about creating fear around packaged foods. Packaged foods have an important place in modern life. Many are perfectly safe when stored and consumed correctly. The issue is not whether packaged food is good or bad. The issue is whether consumers have access to complete information before making a purchase. Healthcare today is moving towards shared decision-making. Doctors no longer simply tell patients what to do. Instead, we explain the options and help patients make informed choices. Food purchases should follow the same principle. Consumers should have the information they need to decide what is best for themselves and their families. Technology has transformed the way we buy food. The next step should be making digital food shopping as transparent as buying food in a physical store. If I can see a product's manufacturing date, expiry date, best-before date, ingredients, and nutrition label while standing in a supermarket aisle, I should be able to see the same information while ordering that product on my phone. Health starts with informed choices. And informed choices begin with complete information. As online grocery shopping continues to grow across India, displaying manufacturing dates, expiry dates, and best-before information before purchase should not be viewed as an optional feature or a premium service. It should become the standard. Because every consumer deserves the right to know exactly what they are buying before they click "Place Order." Better information leads to better choices. Better choices lead to better health.(Dr. Palaniappan Manickam is a US-based board-certified gastroenterologist, lifestyle medicine expert, and medical educator who has redefined how health is communicated in the digital age.)

Woman Attack: ବୋହୂର ପନିକି ଚୋଟରେ ଶାଶୂ ଗୁରୁତର
description:
ଭୋଗରାଇ: ପାରିବାରିକ କଳହର କରୁଣ ପରିଣତି। ଶାଶୂଙ୍କୁ ପନିକିରେ  ହାଣିଲା ବୋହୂ, ଗୁରୁତର ଶାଶୂ କଟକ ସ୍ଥାନାନ୍ତର। ଅଭିଯୁକ୍ତ ବୋହୂଙ୍କୁ ଭୋଗରାଇ ଥାନା ପୁଲିସ ଅଟକ ରଖି ତଦନ୍ତ କରୁଛନ୍ତି। ଏପରି ଅଭାବନୀୟ ଘଟଣା ଘଟିଛି ବାଲେଶ୍ବର ଜିଲ୍ଲା ଭୋଗରାଇ ଥାନା ଅଧୀନ ପଥରଘଟା ଗାଁରେ।
କଟକ ବଡ଼ ମେଡିକାଲକୁ ସ୍ଥାନାନ୍ତର
ଏହି ଗାଁର ଶଙ୍କର ବାରିକଙ୍କ ସ୍ତ୍ରୀ ଶିବାନୀ ବାରିକ ଗତକାଲି ସନ୍ଧ୍ୟାରେ କୌଣସି କାରଣକୁ ନେଇ ହଠାତ ତାଙ୍କର ୬୫ ବର୍ଷୀୟା ବୃଦ୍ଧା ଶାଶୂଙ୍କୁ ପନିକିରେ ଆକ୍ରମଣ କରିଥିଲେ। ପନିକିରେ ବାରମ୍ବାର ଆକ୍ରମଣ କରିବାରୁ ଶାଶୂ ବେହୋସ ହୋଇ ପଡ଼ି ଯାଇଥିଲେ। ପରେ ତାଙ୍କୁ ଜଳେଶ୍ୱରପୁର ଗୋଷ୍ଠୀ ସ୍ବାସ୍ଥ୍ୟ କେନ୍ଦ୍ର ଓ ବାଲେଶ୍ବର ହସ୍ପିଟାଲକୁ ନିଆ ଯାଇଥିଲେ ମଧ୍ୟ ଅଧିକ ଗୁରୁତର ହେବାରୁ କଟକ ବଡ଼ ମେଡିକାଲକୁ ସ୍ଥାନାନ୍ତର କରାଯାଇଛି। ସ୍ୱାମୀଙ୍କ ଅଭିଯୋଗ ମୂଳେ ଭୋଗରାଇ ପୁଲିସ ଘଟଣାସ୍ଥଳରେ ପହଞ୍ଚି ବୋହୂକୁ ଗିରଫ କରି ତଦନ୍ତ ଆରମ୍ଭ କରିଛି। ତେବେ ଗତ ଚାରିବର୍ଷ ତଳେ ଶିବାନୀର ଶଙ୍କରଙ୍କ ସହିତ ବିବାହ ହୋଇଥିବା ବେଳେ ସେମାନଙ୍କର ଏକ ପୁତ୍ର ସନ୍ତାନ ଅଛି। ବହୁ ଥର ପାରିବାରିକ ଅଶାନ୍ତିରେ ନ୍ୟାୟ ବସିଥିବା ବେଳେ ଆଜି ଏପରି ଘଟଣା ଘଟିଛି।
TamilNadu Gas Leak: ଆଉ ଜଣେ ଓଡ଼ିଆ ଶ୍ରମିକଙ୍କ ମୃତ୍ୟୁ, ମୃତକଙ୍କ ସଂଖ୍ୟା ୧୩କୁ ବୃଦ୍ଧି

title: Vikrant Massey worked 16-hour days, cleaned tables at 16 and bought a house at 24; inside his Rs 26 crore net worth, sea-facing home, Mercedes GLS, Ducati Monster, and more
description: Vikrant Massey's inspiring journey began with cleaning tables at a Mumbai coffee shop at 16 before buying his first home at 24. Explore his Rs 20-26 crore net worth, sea-facing house, luxury cars, career, struggles and remarkable rise to stardom.
content: For millions of fans, Vikrant Massey is the man behind unforgettable performances in 12th Fail, Mirzapur, Criminal Justice and Broken But Beautiful. But long before the applause, awards and box office success, his life looked very different. At just 16, while most teenagers spent their evenings playing cricket or hanging out with friends, Vikrant was wiping tables at a coffee shop in Mumbai to help pay for his education and support his family. Those difficult years taught him resilience, discipline and gratitude, values that continue to define him even today. From surviving on biscuits during his struggling days to buying his first house at just 24 and now living in a stunning sea-facing apartment with wife Sheetal Thakur, Vikrant's story is one of Bollywood's most inspiring success stories. Today, with an estimated net worth of around Rs 20 to 26 crore, luxury cars parked in his driveway and critically acclaimed performances to his name, the actor has proved that perseverance often creates the most extraordinary journeys. How did Vikrant Massey's struggle begin at just 16? Vikrant has never hidden the hardships that shaped his childhood. Speaking at a recent conversation hosted by FLO Bangalore Official, the actor revealed that he started working at the age of 16 because financial stability was a necessity for his middle-class family. Recalling those days, he said no teenager willingly leaves the comfort of home to clean tables at a coffee shop unless circumstances demand it. His earnings helped fund his education while also contributing to the family's expenses.       The actor shared that buying his first home at the age of 24 fulfilled one of his mother's biggest dreams. "I started working at the age of 16... One of the reasons why I had to do that was to support my own education, to support my family financially. When I bought my first small little house at 24, I ticked that one important box in my mother's wish list that, 'No matter what happens, at least you have a home to come back to,'" he said. Why was Vikrant embarrassed to tell his friends where he was going? The emotional impact of working as a teenager stayed with him for years. Vikrant recalled watching his friends play cricket and football while he quietly headed to work every day. He admitted feeling embarrassed because he could not bring himself to tell them that he was leaving to earn money for his family. Looking back, he believes those years forced him to mature much earlier than most children. He shared that missing festivals, films and outings with friends was painful then, but those experiences eventually became the foundation of his personality. According to the actor, those struggles taught him resilience and prepared him for the uncertainties of the entertainment industry.       How did life come full circle for the actor? Today, Vikrant says the contrast between his past and present still feels surreal. He once worked to pay for his college fees, train pass and other daily expenses. Now, he and wife Sheetal Thakur find themselves comparing brochures of some of the country's most prestigious schools for their son. Reflecting on that transformation, the actor said it is incredible to think that the family which once worried about education expenses is now deciding between elite schools. He added that he feels grateful for everything life has given him. Did you know Vikrant's first earning wasn't from acting? Interestingly, Vikrant's journey into the entertainment industry began much earlier than television. While studying at St Anthony's High School in Versova, a team from a New Zealand health advisory board selected a few students for a catalogue shoot. Vikrant was one of them and earned Rs 200 for the assignment, marking his very first income. A few years later, while studying in Class 10, he joined Shiamak Davar's dance troupe as a contemporary dancer during his summer holidays. That became his first regular salaried job. Around the same period, he also worked at a coffee shop in Versova's Yari Road.       In an earlier interview with Mumbai Mirror, Vikrant recalled that the neighbourhood was filled with cafés frequented by people from the film industry. His plan was simple. Earn a steady salary while hoping someone from Bollywood would notice him. He also revealed that because he was underage, the café owner worried about legal trouble. To avoid complications, they told people he was three years older than his actual age. Did you know? Before acting changed his life, Vikrant had even cleared the initial rounds for a flight purser's job. However, once television offers started coming his way, he chose acting over aviation. How did television become his launchpad? Vikrant made his television debut in 2007 with Disney Channel's Dhoom Machaao Dhoom. He later became a familiar face through successful serials, including Balika Vadhu. His biggest gamble came when he walked away from television despite having a contract reportedly worth Rs 35 lakh per month. Speaking on Unfiltered by Samdish, the actor explained why he made that decision. "I quit TV at the time when I had a Rs 35 lakh per month contract in my hand. I decided to do good work and find peace," he said. The decision wasn't easy. During his transition into films, Vikrant has previously revealed that he survived on pocket money from his then-girlfriend while attending auditions and waiting for meaningful opportunities.       What transformed Vikrant into one of Bollywood's most respected actors? Instead of chasing commercial success immediately, Vikrant focused on performance-driven cinema. His memorable appearances in films such as Lootera and A Death in the Gunj earned widespread appreciation from critics. The OTT boom further expanded his popularity through projects like Mirzapur, Criminal Justice and Broken But Beautiful, introducing him to audiences across the country. His career reached a new high with 12th Fail, which emerged as both a critical and commercial success. The film later won the National Film Award for Best Hindi Film, making it one of the biggest milestones of Vikrant's career. What does Vikrant Massey's luxurious home look like? Success has certainly changed Vikrant's lifestyle, but his appreciation for simple joys remains unchanged. The actor lives with wife Sheetal Thakur in a sea-facing apartment on Madh Island in Mumbai, purchased in 2020. Estimated to be worth around Rs 1.2 crore, the residence features warm earthy colours, Boho-inspired interiors, comfortable furniture, bookshelves and artworks collected during the couple's travels. Speaking to Hindustan Times, Vikrant described his favourite corner of the house. "I have the sea right in front of me. It's a 180-degree sea view where I see nature's art every single day. My balcony is the best place to appreciate art right now," he said. Which luxury cars and bike does Vikrant own? As his career flourished, Vikrant also built an enviable collection of premium vehicles. His garage includes: Mercedes-Benz GLS worth over Rs 1.16 croreVolvo S90 valued at around Rs 60 lakhMaruti Suzuki Swift Dzire worth over Rs 8 lakhDucati Monster motorcycle priced at approximately Rs 12 lakhThe collection reflects a mix of luxury, performance and practicality rather than extravagant spending.       How much does Vikrant Massey earn today? According to reports by Lifestyle Asia, ABP Live and other publicly available estimates, Vikrant Massey's net worth is believed to be between Rs 20 crore and Rs 26 crore. Besides acting, he reportedly charges around Rs 1.5 crore per project. His earnings also come from brand endorsements, advertising campaigns and promotional collaborations, making him one of the most bankable actors in the content-driven entertainment space.       What's next for Vikrant Massey? Even after reaching a career high with 12th Fail, Vikrant continues to back stories that prioritise substance over spectacle. He will next be seen in the upcoming web series Pritam and Pedro, created by Rajkumar Hirani and directed by Avinash Arun. For someone who once cleaned café tables to pay college fees, Vikrant Massey's journey is proof that success is rarely instant. It is built through difficult choices, relentless hard work and the courage to choose passion over comfort, even when the easier path promises bigger pay cheques.

title: দলঙৰ তলত উদ্ধাৰ মৃতদেহ...
description:
ডিজিটেল ডেস্কঃ দেৰগাঁৱৰ ধোডাঙত সংঘটিত হৈছে এক চাঞ্চল্যকৰ ঘটনা। অঞ্চলটোৰ এখন দলঙৰ তলত এজন যুৱকৰ মৃতদেহ উদ্ধাৰ হোৱাক কেন্দ্ৰ কৰি স্থানীয় ৰাইজৰ মাজত তীব্ৰ প্ৰতিক্ৰিয়াৰ সৃষ্টি হৈছে।
প্ৰাপ্ত তথ্য প্ৰতিবেদন অনুসৰি, স্থানীয় একাংশ যুৱকে প্ৰথমতে দলঙৰ তলত মৃতদেহটো প্ৰত্যক্ষ কৰে আৰু লগে লগে এই বিষয়ে আৰক্ষীক অৱগত কৰে। ঘটনাৰ খবৰ পোৱা মাত্ৰকেই আৰক্ষীৰ এটা দল ঘটনাস্থলীত উপস্থিত হয়। আৰক্ষীয়ে ঘটনাস্থলীৰ পৰা মৃতদেহটো উদ্ধাৰ কৰি মৰণোত্তৰ পৰীক্ষাৰ বাবে দেৰগাঁও সামূহিক চিকিৎসালয়লৈ প্ৰেৰণ কৰে।
উল্লেখ্য যে, উদ্ধাৰ হোৱা মৃতদেহটো নতুন চাপৰি অঞ্চলৰ ৩১ বছৰীয়া যুৱক জয়ন্ত মুদৈৰ বুলি জানব পৰা গৈছে। অতি ৰহস্যজনকভাৱে, উদ্ধাৰৰ সময়ত মৃত যুৱকজনৰ মুখমণ্ডলত স্পষ্ট আঘাতৰ চিন প্ৰত্যক্ষ কৰা হৈছে। মুখৰ এই গভীৰ আঘাতৰ চিনৰ বাবে স্থানীয় ৰাইজে এয়া এক হত্যাকাণ্ড হ’ব পাৰে বুলি সন্দেহ প্ৰকাশ কৰিছে।
বৰ্তমান আৰক্ষীয়ে ঘটনাটোৰ সন্দৰ্ভত এক তদন্ত আৰম্ভ কৰিছে। মৰণোত্তৰ পৰীক্ষাৰ প্ৰতিবেদন অহাৰ পাছতহে যুৱকজনৰ মৃত্যুৰ প্ৰকৃত কাৰণ জানিব পৰা যাব বুলি আৰক্ষীয়ে প্ৰকাশ কৰিছে।

title: Messi Achieves Historic World Cup Milestone With Stunning Goal Against Jordan
description: Lionel Messi scripted history at the FIFA World Cup and became the first player in the world to score in seven consecutive World Cup matches.
content: Lionel Messi continued the goal-scoring spree at the FIFA World Cup 2026 and scored his sixth goal in the final Group J match against Jordan at AT&T Stadium in Arlington. Messi was benched from the game, but came as a substitute in the 60th minute and wasted no time in adding more goals to his tally. He converted a free kick in the 80th minute to give Argentina a 3-1 lead in the match. Earlier, goals by Lo Celso and Lautaro Martinez had put Argentina in the driver's seat, but a late strike by Jordan's Al-Tamari had brought life back into the contest.Lionel Messi Creates HistoryMeanwhile, it was a remarkable achievement by Messi, who became the first player in the world to score in seven consecutive FIFA World Cup matches. Messi broke the record of Just Fontaine of France and Jairzinho of Brazil, who scored goals in six consecutive World Cup matches. Messi scored a hat trick against Algeria and then scored two goals against Austria before hitting one against Jordan during the ongoing FIFA World Cup. He had also scored in each of the last four matches of the FIFA World Cup 2022, where he led Argentina to their third World Cup title.         LIONEL MESSI GOAL FROM THIS ANGLE IS INSANE 🤯 pic.twitter.com/dQOMWSm2kC— 𝙷𝚊𝚛𝚛𝚒𝚜𝚘𝚗 (@fcbharrison) June 28, 2026 Related News | Lionel Messi Will Not Start Argentina's Final Group Stage FIFA WC 2026 Clash VS JordanEXPLAINED: Why Lionel Messi Is Not In Argentina Playing XI For FIFA World Cup 2026 Match Vs JordanLionel Messi's Performance In Each Of The Last 7 MatchesAGAINSTMATCH TYPEGOAL(S)VENUEDATEAustraliaRound of 161Ahmad bin Ali Stadium, Al RayyanDecember 3, 2022NetherlandsQuarterfinal1Lusail Stadium, LusailDecember 9, 2022CroatiaSemifinal1Lusail Stadium, LusailDecember 13, 2022FranceFinal2Lusail Stadium, LusailDecember 18, 2022AlgeriaGroup J match (1st)3Arrowhead Stadium, Kansas CityJune 16, 2026AustriaGroup J match (2nd)2AT&T Stadium, ArlingtonJune 22, 2026JordanGroup J match (3rd)1AT&T Stadium, ArlingtonJune 27, 2026Who Will Argentina Face In Round Of 32?Argentina qualified undefeated and table toppers in their group and will face Cape Verde in the Round of 32 clash on July 4.  The undefeated run for Argentina mean that if they have to defend the title, they'll have to do it without losing a game.

title: Trump: ଅସ୍ତ୍ରବିରତି ଉଲ୍ଲଂଘନ କଲେ ବିଶ୍ୱ ମାନଚିତ୍ରରୁ ଲିଭିଯିବ ଇରାନ: ଧ୍ୱଂସ କରିବାକୁ ଧମକ ଦେଲେ ଟ୍ରମ୍ପ
description:
ୱାସିଂଟନ: ଆମେରିକା ଏବଂ ଇରାନ ମଧ୍ୟରେ ଉତ୍ତେଜନା ପୁଣି ଥରେ ବୃଦ୍ଧି ପାଇଛି। ଶାନ୍ତି ଚୁକ୍ତି କେବଳ ଆଲୋଚନା ଟେବୁଲ ଉପରେ ରହିଯାଇଛି। ରାଷ୍ଟ୍ରପତି ଡୋନାଲ୍ଡ ଟ୍ରମ୍ପ ଇରାନକୁ କଡ଼ା ଚେତାବନୀ ଦେଇ କହିଛନ୍ତି ଯେ, ଯଦି ଇରାନ ଅସ୍ତ୍ରବିରତି ଉଲ୍ଲଂଘନ ଜାରି ରଖେ ଏବଂ ଆମେରିକାକୁ ସାମରିକ କାର୍ଯ୍ୟାନୁଷ୍ଠାନ ଆରମ୍ଭ କରିବାକୁ ବାଧ୍ୟ କରାଯାଏ, ତେବେ ଇସଲାମିକ ଗଣରାଜ୍ୟ ଇରାନର ଅସ୍ତିତ୍ୱ ଶେଷ ହୋଇଯିବ। ବିଶ୍ୱ ମାନଚିତ୍ରରୁ ଇରାନ ଲିଭିଯିବ। ଏହି ବିବୃତି ଏପରି ଏକ ସମୟରେ ଆସିଛି ଯେତେବେଳେ ଆମେରିକା ଲଗାତାର ଦ୍ୱିତୀୟ ଦିନ ପାଇଁ ଅନେକ ଇରାନୀ ସାମରିକ ଘାଟି ଉପରେ ବିମାନ ଆକ୍ରମଣ କରିଛି। ଏହାର ଜବାବରେ ବାହାରିନ ଏବଂ କୁଏତ ଉପରେ ଆକ୍ରମଣ କରି ଇରାନ ପ୍ରତିଶୋଧ ନେଇଛି।
ଚୁକ୍ତିନାମା ଉଲ୍ଲଂଘନ କରିଛି ଇରାନ: ଟ୍ରମ୍ପ
ଟ୍ରମ୍ପ ତାଙ୍କ ସୋସିଆଲ ମିଡିଆ ପ୍ଲାଟଫର୍ମ, ଟ୍ରୁଥ୍ ସୋସିଆଲରେ କହିଛନ୍ତି ଯେ ଆମେରିକାର ଲଢୁଆ ବିମାନଗୁଡ଼ିକ ଇରାନୀ କ୍ଷେପଣାସ୍ତ୍ର ଏବଂ ଡ୍ରୋନ୍ ପ୍ରତିଷ୍ଠାନ ଏବଂ ଉପକୂଳବର୍ତ୍ତୀ ରାଡାର ସିଷ୍ଟମକୁ ଟାର୍ଗେଟ କରିଛନ୍ତି। ସେ ଅଭିଯୋଗ କରିଛନ୍ତି ଯେ, ଇରାନ ପୁଣି ଥରେ ଅସ୍ତ୍ରବିରତି ଚୁକ୍ତିନାମା ଉଲ୍ଲଂଘନ କରିଛି। ଟ୍ରମ୍ପ କହିଛନ୍ତି, ଆମେରିକା ଏପର୍ଯ୍ୟନ୍ତ ସଂଯମତା ଅବଲମ୍ବନ କରିଆସୁଛି, କିନ୍ତୁ ଯଦି ଇରାନ ଆକ୍ରମଣ ବନ୍ଦ ନ କରେ, ତେବେ ଆମେରିକା କଠୋର ପଦକ୍ଷେପ ଗ୍ରହଣ କରିବ ଯାହାର ଗମ୍ଭୀର ପରିଣାମ ହେବ।
Iran Attacks: ପ୍ରତିଶୋଧ ନେଲା ଇରାନ: ୮ ଆମେରିକୀୟ ସାମରିକ ଘାଟି ଉପରେ କ୍ଷେପଣାସ୍ତ୍ର-ଡ୍ରୋନ୍ ଆକ୍ରମଣ
ଆମେରିକାର ସେନାର କେନ୍ଦ୍ରୀୟ କମାଣ୍ଡ ସେଣ୍ଟକମ୍ କହିଛି ଯେ ରାଷ୍ଟ୍ରପତିଙ୍କ ନିର୍ଦ୍ଦେଶରେ ଏହି ଅଭିଯାନ କରାଯାଇଥିଲା। ଆମେରିକା ଦାବି କରିଛି ଯେ ଇରାନ ଏକ ଆତ୍ମଘାତୀ ଡ୍ରୋନ୍ ସାହାଯ୍ୟରେ ପାନାମା-ପତାକାଯୁକ୍ତ ତୈଳ ଟ୍ୟାଙ୍କର୍ ଏମ/ଟି କିକୁ ଉପରେ ଆକ୍ରମଣ କରିଥିଲା। ଜାହାଜଟି ହର୍ମୁଜ୍ ପ୍ରଣାଳୀ ଦେଇ ଗତି କରୁଥିଲା ଏବଂ ୨ ନିୟୁତ ବ୍ୟାରେଲ ଅଶୋଧିତ ତୈଳ ବୋହି ନେଉଥିଲା।

title: June 30 Financial Deadline: LPG e-KYC, passport hike, IT scrutiny & more - What taxpayers, gas cylinder users and railway commuters need to know
description: Important Deadline June 30, 2026: From gas companies to the Income Tax Department and Indian Railways, several major changes and stricter regulations have been announced, effective from the beginning of July. To avoid any last-minute hassles or penalties, review your list of essential tasks and complete them promptly before June 30, 2026.
content: Important Deadline June 30, 2026: The first half of 2026 is drawing to a close, and Tuesday, June 30, 2026, is a crucial date for financial and other essential activities. Several deadlines set by the government and various departments expire on this day.If you hold an LPG gas connection or have filed your Income Tax Return (ITR), the upcoming couple of days are particularly significant for you. Failure to complete these tasks on time could result in not only financial loss but also hefty penalties.From gas companies to the Income Tax Department and Indian Railways, several major changes and stricter regulations have been announced, effective from the beginning of July. To avoid any last-minute hassles or penalties, review your list of essential tasks and complete them promptly before June 30, 2026.Here’s a look at some of these critical tasks and rules that will directly impact your pocket. June 30 dealine for important financial tasks LPG e-KYC: For gas subsidy and connectionIf you use Indian Oil’s Indane, BPCL’s Bharat Gas, or HPCL’s HP Gas cylinders at home, you must complete the e-KYC process by June 30, 2026, without fail. Gas companies have initiated measures to update their records and ensure that subsidy benefits reach the intended beneficiaries.Failure to complete the e-KYC within the stipulated timeframe could hinder your access to the benefits of gas subsidies. Although companies have clarified that gas connections will not be disconnected after June 30, completing the process on time is essential to avoid inconvenience in the future.      Related News | Why gold prices are falling today? Strong dollar and Fed rate hike worries weigh inIncome Tax Scrutiny: Taxpayers may receive scrutiny noticesEven as the deadline for filing income tax returns (ITRs) is still some time away, June 30 is a crucial date for taxpayers who have already filed their Income Tax Return (ITR) for the Assessment Year 2025-26.For returns filed during FY 2025-26, June 30 is the last date by which the income tax department can issue a scrutiny notice under Section 143(2).A ‘scrutiny assessment’ is issued by the I-T department when it wants to verify certain details in an income tax return, such as income reported, deductions claimed or specific transactions. Additionally, if a mismatch is found between your declared income and records such as Form 26AS, AIS, TIS, or bank statements, or if a large, suspicious financial transaction is detected, the department may send you a scrutiny notice by June 30.However, receiving such a notice does not necessarily mean the taxpayer has committed fraud; it may simply be for the verification of details.Passport Fee Hike: Passports application to become costlier from July 1The government has hiked passport application fees, with a 36-page fresh passport or reissue of a passport now costing 2,500 rupees. The Passports (Amendment) Rules, 2026, will come into effect from July 1, 2026, which means June 30 is the last date.In a notification, the Ministry of External Affairs said that under the revised fee structure, a fresh passport or reissue of a passport under the Tatkal scheme will cost Rs 5,000.The fee for a 60-page ordinary passport or its reissue has been fixed at Rs 3,500, while under the Tatkal scheme, it will cost Rs 6,000. The existing fee for a 36-page passport is Rs 1,500, while that for a 60-page passport is Rs 2,000.In the case of a lost or damaged 36-page passport, the fee for issuing a replacement ordinary passport will be Rs 5,000. For a lost or damaged 60-page passport, the fee for issuing a replacement ordinary passport will be Rs 6,000.Railway Rules: Heavy fines for rule violationsThe Indian Railways will implement the Jan Vishwas (Amendment of Provisions) Act, 2026, from July 1, which, among other things, enhances the penalty for travelling without a ticket, travelling without a valid ticket, and other offences under the Railways Act, 1989.The amended provisions of the Act will come into effect from July 1. Under the revised provisions, the minimum fine for travelling without a valid ticket has been increased from Rs 250 to Rs 500, along with the actual fare.The existing provisions regarding maximum punishment for travelling without a ticket remain unchanged, including imprisonment up to six months, or a fine up to Rs 1,000, or both, as decided by the competent court.Under Section 138, the minimum excess charge, or penalty, for travelling without a proper ticket, or beyond the authorised distance, has been increased from Rs 250 to Rs 500.Also, the Act prescribes penalties for certain other offences, including Rs 2,000 for unauthorised hawking (Section 144), imprisonment for 24 hours or fine of Rs 1,000 for drunken nuisance (Section 145), Rs 2,500 for a male passenger travelling in a compartment reserved for women (Section 162), and Rs 2,000 for smoking in prohibited areas of railway premises or trains (Section 167).Deadline for TDS depositAdditionally, employers or taxpayers who have received approval from the Assessing Officer to deposit TDS on a quarterly basis will have until July 7 to deposit the TDS for the April-June quarter.

title: US airstrikes again hit Iran as Tehran strikes Bahrain and Kuwait, further imperiling interim deal
description:
Dubai, June 28: The US military launched a second round of airstrikes Saturday targeting Iran at President Donald Trump's direction as Tehran hit both Bahrain and Kuwait, underscoring rising tensions that threaten the interim deal between the two nations to stop the war.
The attack on Kuwait early Sunday was the first since the two sides signed a deal that aimed to halt fighting, and came as a multinational maritime body overseen by the US Navy said Saturday that it would expand a route near Oman in the strait to allow for both inbound and outbound traffic — likely setting up a new flashpoint with Tehran.
The US military's Central Command said it struck Iranian military “surveillance infrastructure, communication systems, air defense sites, drone storage facilities and minelayer capabilities” following an attack on a ship at sea early Saturday morning. That ship, the Panamanian-flagged tanker Kiku, carried crude oil for the state-run energy company of Qatar, a key negotiator between Iran and the US
In a social media post, Trump said the US had “struck Iranian missile and drone storage locations, and coastal radar sites, for violating the Cease Fire Agreement, AGAIN!” He warned of a point where the US may no longer be able to be reasonable “and will be forced to militarily complete the job."
“If that happens, the Islamic Republic of Iran will no longer exist!” Trump wrote on Truth Social.
The incident follows a similar back and forth that occurred just days prior when an Iranian drone struck a merchant vessel off the coast of Oman on Thursday and the US military retaliated with strikes.
US says strikes were a response to Iranian attack on oil tanker
According to ship tracking websites, the Kiku left a Qatari oil field in the middle of the Persian Gulf earlier in the week and was bound for a port in the United Arab Emirates that sits on the Gulf of Oman, just on the other side of the Strait of Hormuz.
It appeared to be attempting to use a route that was established near the coast of Oman that is serving as an alternative to the route sanctioned by Iran that runs through its own waters.
The US military said that “Iran had a chance to honor the ceasefire agreement” but “elected not to” when its forces attacked the Kiku.
Iran state TV reported explosions in an area just north of the Strait of Hormuz.
After the US strikes early Sunday, Kuwait's military said air defenses intercepted incoming Iranian drones and missiles. It offered no immediate information on any damage. Kuwait is home to a major US Army base.
Bahrain condemns Iran's drone attack
Earlier on Saturday, a statement from Bahrain's Foreign Ministry said a “number of Iranian drones” targeted the country. It called the attack “a flagrant threat to the security of citizens and residents.” There were no immediate reports of damage.
Iran's paramilitary Revolutionary Guard earlier issued a statement carried by the state-run IRNA news agency saying it had targeted several locations “of the US terrorist army in the region.” It did not name what areas were targeted.
Bahrain has been one of the strongest critics of Iran and is home to the US Navy's 5th Fleet. It just hosted US Secretary of State Marco Rubio for a meeting of the Gulf Cooperation Council's foreign ministers, which ended with a call for an end to Iran's attacks and for the strait to be completely open.
Overnight into Saturday, the US military's Central Command said it had struck Iranian missile and drone locations and coastal radar sites.
US Vice President JD Vance, who has led the negotiations with Iran, said on social media Friday night that Iran should “pick up the phone” if there are disagreements about the ceasefire agreement, “but violence will be met with violence.”
The US and Iran are negotiating terms of the deal including issues such as getting ships through the strait that's vital to global supplies of oil and natural gas and addressing the future of Iran's nuclear program and stockpile of highly enriched uranium.
Under the interim deal, the two sides have 60 days to work out the details. Ending the fighting in Lebanon between Israel and the Iranian-backed Hezbollah militant group is a key part of the deal.
Ship comes under attack as strait route expands
The British military's United Kingdom Maritime Trade Operations center said that a tanker was attacked Saturday in the strait, with the crew safe and no environmental damage reported. No one immediately claimed the strike, but suspicion fell on Iran.
Just after that report, the Joint Maritime Information Center, overseen by the US Navy, said the route near Oman's shore is expanding to allow for inbound and outbound traffic.
Iran has insisted that ships must obey its orders and warned it will start charging fees for transit through the strait. However, ships have been increasingly trying to leave the Gulf in recent days.
Ebrahim Azizi, who heads the Iranian parliament's national security commission, wrote Friday that “the Strait of Hormuz is governed by Iran, so: Respect the rules.”
The US and Gulf Arab states have rejected Iran's demands. The strait is considered as an international waterway, despite being the territorial waters of Iran and Oman.
The Joint Maritime Information Center warned that the threat to ships was “substantial,” adding that “mariners are advised of the existence of mines and should expect a naval presence as clearance operations continue.”
The International Maritime Organization on Friday halted a new effort to evacuate ships said it won't resume until there are guarantees that the other ships won't be attacked. It said about 115 ships have been able to move out of the strait in recent days.
